name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Defending Religious Liberty
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
Let’s get Minnesota back on the right track [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=6e8a8a0a15d5494aa775e4336ef04adf&_e=XS5vYlORyk4-a0IkhfosJTwlduzBwNNo6b7uRdOQ5Xku6oqyN5TBoli8WLk6vLBnL1VfY2GjClbu1Ra0J93rjP5-ORsRpxeg14uD2CyCL9dL9IkS1iy6hMX2rSHgUL42d1SgsQ5vy0BPneaTUAiyRZ9zJdFoErC_mBRCb7G2OtoQUn2K46ie0C1uVjVBuVG9v524qAxyN_7-pNj9-0eLoZKWn8-eKrp3pNQCrlOSqP9eUgzB1ch4CSoxhtKl99wwoNhglzru_0lEPvgOqjPAgQ8KsOzW4qnu0eJbqUR7VM4%3D)
Fellow Minnesotan,

No matter what your religion is – I am proud to stand by your side and defend your right to religious liberty. Tim Walz has failed you at every turn when it comes to your Constitutional rights.

As I continue to work up and down the state, I receive support and words of encouragement from pastors and various religious leaders. That's why I am proud to have earned the support of Pastors Michael Smith and Rob Ketterling.

[**_Will you help make sure our message is spread far and wide by contributing to our efforts today?_**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=6e8a8a0a15d5494aa775e4336ef04adf&_e=XS5vYlORyk4-a0IkhfosJZbAOA4Qf-o0lFSE0P-habUi-tD8ivH54uoZ_lZOeOgdpkzBs1LrCRU4MDVkrQx-3PmtZ4oXilsUkVB6a4VOZO-DEkq88h-onbkUQxWSFjhGk82eHItG5ptygKb1VSL6Jq61vi_i8BnQotefoBKazr7EqpPYqWtgtWp9gw5Z1TANaascPlDdy4liqN80wAlbAKwkbuVYwONtrImZPa3cAU0ufuwx7IkH-B0eqN_qrl6ErMIhD6UCFrEdy-FYyvTTbWRWvoxtpxHgJzi0fDS7AWStX4b99ZoQ007-IH-9-NdJtJlRBeRN4JNjB7Y0zImu8x34oBuhchtQsGVSMdUK-Vm9U34UoOVG-BcmZ7HYxNv1)
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=6e8a8a0a15d5494aa775e4336ef04adf&_e=XS5vYlORyk4-a0IkhfosJTwlduzBwNNo6b7uRdOQ5XkLsYb_52AQecS5dqNutEVOI0MrZIgw58NcaGqChP7yYdCz2Ab-kbRiMrgeOG6ovadvM_qNQI4JGZq9YtmnY0CXXFsz4fm2OcXqQVoMwnzSNGJivEjeek8FSxLbEsFRRq0u1zAhM-kv88IWpGbYh4iN52I30BZlOBx0zZVtaTqi-ZNqhuT2cJ4L-Xl6zEUV9_L5CPsQDYfb-TVAGIJLGvvb9gd8HRjziR1L9kHmTEznOWY4rNpdCDyJrTIIvshn9uY%3D)
[**Donate $20.22 to Stand Up for Religious Liberty**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=6e8a8a0a15d5494aa775e4336ef04adf&_e=XS5vYlORyk4-a0IkhfosJZbAOA4Qf-o0lFSE0P-habUi-tD8ivH54uoZ_lZOeOgdpkzBs1LrCRU4MDVkrQx-3PmtZ4oXilsUkVB6a4VOZO-DEkq88h-onbkUQxWSFjhGk82eHItG5ptygKb1VSL6Jk51SEu3SVvvqfUYCV4lsJGr0qVdNrGWIqbXgA1SkJlvTOXxQtU4URbR0NkHVsLnmtTFAGPvW0FK0s6xx0S1nqRWi2dQenYkvJ_I5vqNjZwFa4bk8-k0nWtSITy4u2H0IXeENUSpimG2mWvcxC7qCH8Zb6b96OxikmlMiIbB3NiDucki0SL9-20t0uHog8RQA6c5J1M-SVYpv-anf4ZoYAbD5O22sO2EAGH7F5okG1v-)
America was founded on a firm understanding of the separation of church and state. When Tim Walz tried to shut down our churches during the pandemic,**I stood in the way and fought tooth and nail to keep our places of worship open when we needed them most.**

This year, Minnesota has the chance to elect a governor who actually cares to defend you and your family.

Thank you,
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=6e8a8a0a15d5494aa775e4336ef04adf&_e=XS5vYlORyk4-a0IkhfosJZbAOA4Qf-o0lFSE0P-habUi-tD8ivH54uoZ_lZOeOgdpkzBs1LrCRU4MDVkrQx-3PmtZ4oXilsUkVB6a4VOZO-DEkq88h-onbkUQxWSFjhGk82eHItG5ptygKb1VSL6Jg7_cmSIdS1xVCmp6qVacS9AcT5uSmSnnuDmflMBzvqnFXykMmvsaT6ICniQx87UgMOeo_w8bSJelJN_OT-ZGPSS_KvE5-O2dOYzCak8KPPbyZUrNC-pfwBv4Zi9itNg6je2Ptz5bNGCru7YKOvFeC6iGZZfCWJ1lqrpN7qlJ3ja1dGsuj6ozIDhHAhq1HREIlsQd9tfUIzRCy0KivF_003NlEX1Kb4zEjtMOxSwpHTp)
**Senator Paul Gazelka**
_Candidate for Governor_
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=6e8a8a0a15d5494aa775e4336ef04adf&_e=XS5vYlORyk4-a0IkhfosJZbAOA4Qf-o0lFSE0P-habUi-tD8ivH54uoZ_lZOeOgdpkzBs1LrCRU4MDVkrQx-3PmtZ4oXilsUkVB6a4VOZO-DEkq88h-onbkUQxWSFjhGk82eHItG5ptygKb1VSL6Jsy8C2WP85buWcqZXa-D_ln-X5y-8a9Mi6Pwf8G1r5frENX9Ocsv6JvocFYUzzYYbgDyyw5F2a7uopdUIi8XdjQ38Kk6bTZLiQrwzEguQAOy_MsaDCeaLcXiC1lgippPCRbM-kZfxzLXWauQ11xHdOrd0lh7wMxoSIREnU05VdXguzpmnSQPN328uuTwBlUcCqZpSHSeSnvWm5BBF-3AVSFWlgE6QP5RK6CJFZxG_xkD)

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you make phone calls for our Day of Action tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need your help to make direct, personal contact with as many Texans as we can.
#
We’re building one of the biggest organizing programs Texas has ever seen so we can make history and elect Beto as our next Governor. And right now, we're turning our attention to the fight for reproductive rights.
It's never been more urgent to elect a governor who will protect a woman's right to abortion. That's why we're going to be out in full force this weekend talking to Texans about the stakes of this election.
We’re reaching out to you because the only way to protect a woman's right to choose in Texas is to make sure Beto wins in November, so we need your help to make direct, personal contact with as many Texans as we can.
[**Will you sign up today to make calls to Texans during tomorrow's Day of Action for abortion rights?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52814?utm_source=ema20220506-188171&t=1&akid=188171%2E444211%2EXDLUUb) We're setting a goal of making 100,000 calls, and Beto will be joining at the start to kick things off!
**[Make calls »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52814?utm_source=ema20220506-188171&t=2&akid=188171%2E444211%2EXDLUUb)**
We must do everything in our power to organize, win, and protect reproductive health care, so we hope you will join Beto in taking action.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54521?refcode=ema20220506-188171&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=188171%2E444211%2EXDLUUb)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220506-188171-footer&t=4&refcode2=188171_444211_XDLUUb&akid=188171%2E444211%2EXDLUUb)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=5&akid=188171%2E444211%2EXDLUUb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=188171%2E444211%2EXDLUUb)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:

** Come celebrate the ...
------------------------------------------------------------

** Grand Opening of the Lopez 2022 HQ!
------------------------------------------------------------

The Grand Opening of the Greg Lopez 2022 Headquarters is happening Wednesday!

Join us for light refreshments and drinks, meet Greg, his wife, Lisa, and the campaign team!

** The Details:
------------------------------------------------------------

When: Wednesday, May 11, 6:00pm-8:00pm

Where: 12539 N. HWY 83, Unit A, Parker, CO 80134

Who: You!
Find Out More (https://www.lopez2022.com/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=3d8a5f40b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_07_12_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-3d8a5f40b4-584862049)

============================================================
** One of us for all of us (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=3d8a5f40b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_07_12_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-3d8a5f40b4-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/771f7d066877/check-out-these-volunteer-opportunities?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

The Republican Primary is just a few weeks away on May 24th, but early voting has begun!

Kelvin continues to work harder than any other candidate in this U.S. Senate race and has now attended 350 events, not including his media appearances or fundraisers. He's campaigned in most counties at least twice and many over four times. Let's show Kelvin that we believe in him and his goal to protect and preserve the American Dream for us and future generations!

Over the next two weeks Team King will be hosting Virtual Phone Banks, Volunteer Days at Campaign HQ, and will be knocking on doors. Please show your support for Kelvin by helping out! You can sign up through Eventbrite by clicking on the links below:

[Virtual Phone Banks](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=b7da33ebee&e=7bbb93570f)

[Volunteer Days at Campaign HQ ](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=1875350ad0&e=7bbb93570f)

[Door Knocking](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=b538abed3a&e=7bbb93570f)

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Steil Campaign Update - April Recap
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Hi Peter, I wanted to provide you with an update on the campaign. April was a busy, but productive month. Come see what we did!
**_Steil Campaign Update: April 2022_** _**_Spring Elections_**_ My schedule in April was jam-packed.**At the beginning of April, my priority was to ensure conservatives were elected during the spring elections on April 5th.****We won big. Conservative candidates won seats on** **school boards, city councils, county boards, and in critical judicial races**. Including two huge victories in the races for the Court of Appeals and the Kenosha County Executive.**Judge Maria Lazar is a constitutional conservative** **who will uphold the rule of law. Samantha Kerkman was the first Republican EVER to be elected as the Kenosha County Executive**.It is important that we keep up the momentum as we head into the November elections. _**_Nomination Signatures_**_ I am working to collect nomination signatures to get on the ballot. In mid-April, we were able to begin circulating nomination papers.[**If you are interested in helping, you can download the form here by visiting my website.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-r/) If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to my team. I need to submit 2,000 signatures by June 1st to get on the ballot and I could really use your help. _**_Campaign Trail_**_ **Throughout the month I stopped at Lincoln Day Dinners, local Republican county party gatherings, and community events throughout Southeast Wisconsin.** That's all on top of my day job -- fighting for Wisconsin in Washington and pushing back against the radical agenda of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. **With the recent gerrymander by Governor Evers, I made sure to visit the areas located within the new district, like Whitewater, Beloit, and Cudahy to introduce myself to new voters. It was a great success.** While I was in Beloit, I stopped at a gas station to talk with voters about high gas prices and how we need to restore America's energy independence. They were eager to sign my nomination papers. I'm going to continue to work hard to ensure we elect conservatives to the office this fall and take back the House. [**If you are interested in volunteering, you can sign up by clicking here. I would appreciate your help.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-y/)**Thank you for supporting our campaign. I wouldn 't be able to do it without you. Check out the news coverage from April below. ** [Donate Now](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-j/) __**In the News**__ **[Steil campaigns in new territory: Beloit](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-t/)** \- Beloit Daily News [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-i/) **[Steil Gathers Nomination Signatures in Rock County](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-d/)** \- Janesville Gazette [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-h/) **[Steil: Produce Goods in the U.S.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-k/) **\- Racine Journal Times [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-n/) [**U.S. Congressman Bryan Steil talks supply chain, inflation concerns during tour of fire station** ](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-p/)\- Kenosha News [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-x/) **[Steil: Fighting Fentanyl in our communities](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-m/)** \- Racine Journal Times [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-c/) **[Representative Steil hosts fraud prevention workshop in Janesville](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-q/)** \- WKOW 27 News [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-a/) See you on the campaign trail! Thank you,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Donate Now](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-f/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-z/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-v/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-e/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zuutjkl-l-g) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

MAILING ADDRESS:
STEIL FOR WISCONSIN
1818 MILTON AVE. #1448
JANESVILLE, WI 53545 [Read our Privacy Policy](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-s/) You are receiving this email as you are subscribed for expressing interest in campaign updates from Steil for Wisconsin Inc.

For internal use only: RD442 [Preferences](https://steilforwisconsininc.updatemyprofile.com/j-zuutjkl-C89B6A88-idtjvlhlh-w) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-u-zuutjkl-idtjvlhlh-yd/)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Can’t Stop Me From Impeaching Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: I'm facing a war on three fronts. RINOs are primarying me. Leftists are pouring millions into my Democrat opponent, and the Media makes up lies about me non-stop. And all three are trying to kick me off the ballot before the election even happens! Frankly, if things don't change in my fundraising soon, I don't know how much longer I can hold out. **[That's why I'm sounding the alarm to every America First, Trump Loving, God-Fearing Conservative in America. I need your support! Will you help me continue my fight to get re-elected and even just to stay on the ballot with your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60328605:6ZeYxioKN:m:1:3317145305:EAC1B40F9D784240C6834F38740C0858:r "That’s why I’m sounding the alarm to every America
First, Trump Loving, God-Fearing Conservative in America. I need your support! Will you help me continue my fight to get re-elected and even just to
stay on the ballot with your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today?")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60328605:6ZeYxioKN:m:1:3317145305:EAC1B40F9D784240C6834F38740C0858:r "Event")This is the same coalition that went after President Trump and other members of the House Freedom Caucus. They don't care about the truth. They are Machiavelli incarnate - the ends justify the means. And the RINOs, Leftists, and Lamestream Media want me gone. They're sick of me speaking the truth to voters like you. They're sick of me calling out the COVID lies from Fauci, Pelosi, and the tyrannical leftist Governors. They're sick of me exposing the election fraud in 2020 and of me demanding election integrity in future elections. And They're worried that I'll be leading the efforts to investigate what's in Hunter's laptop and impeach Joe Biden! So they're going all out. Spending millions helping my RINO opponent and my Democrat Opponent while doing all they can to get me kicked off the ballot. **[The barbarians are at the gate, attacking from all sides. Will you stand with me and help me fight back with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60328605:6ZeYxioKN:m:1:3317145305:EAC1B40F9D784240C6834F38740C0858:r "The
barbarians are at the gate, attacking from all sides. Will you stand with me and help me fight back with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today?")** Like my Pastor always told me, Satan only attacks what's valuable to the Kingdom. And I truly believe the harder they come after me, the more I know I am doing the Lord's work. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60328605:6ZeYxioKN:m:1:3317145305:EAC1B40F9D784240C6834F38740C0858:r "Video")This is more than just a battle over one seat. This is a battle for the heart and soul of our country! The enemy hates what I'm doing, what I stand for, and that conservatives like you stand by my side. That's why I'm coming to you right now to ask for your help. Serious decisions about adjusting my campaign strategy are going to have to be made soon if freedom-loving Americans stay on the sidelines. This is your "go big or go home" moment. Do you believe what I am fighting for? Do you believe that taking back control of Congress is paramount to saving America from the Marxist onslaught? Then it's time to go big. Make no mistake, the RINOs, Leftists, and Lamestream Media have declared war against me. **[Please pray for me and then help me fight back against this three-front attack with your donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60328605:6ZeYxioKN:m:1:3317145305:EAC1B40F9D784240C6834F38740C0858:r "Please pray for me and then help me fight back
against this three-front attack with your donation today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329109:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)

---
Peter,

I have to admit - I hadn't heard of the far-left publication called _The Nation_ before last week. Now, I'll never forget it.

They published an attack piece against me - based on the color of my skin - that is beyond ridiculous and insulting.

While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece.

There are a lot of nasty things said about me in this article simply because I'm a Black Republican. Like this:

"Herschel Walker, the football star turned Georgia Senate candidate, is an animated caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives."
Or maybe this line:

"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."
It's shameful.

But the writer doesn't just take aim at me. He questions the support from folks like you, too:

"Most white people in the South vote 'R' like their entire white supremacist project depends on it."
Peter, I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign. However, can you imagine the reaction from the mainstream media if these things had been said about a Black Democrat? The outrage! There would be calls for the writer to be fired and the publication cancelled.

But I'm not calling for a protest of the author or a boycott of the publication's advertisers. Nothing like that.

_**I think the best answer is to prove them wrong at the ballot box.**_

**[Will you join me in standing up to these racist attacks?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329109:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)**

**[Stand with Herschel against far-left attacks](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329109:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)**
[** Chip in $4 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329110:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)
The media has been against our campaign since we launched last summer, but they have rarely been so brazen to say things as this:

"Georgia Republicans want Walker because he's Black and Warnock is Black, and they think they can defeat Warnock in November if they can shave just a little of the Black vote..."
I'm not **" any old Black person"** as the author of the article asserts. I'm Herschel Walker - a proud Georgian and a proud Republican - who has lived the American Dream and wants to secure that dream for the next generation of Americans from all walks of life.

_The best way to deal with racist tropes like these are to call them out, reject them, and prove them wrong._

I hope you'll stand with me against the political hit jobs that the far-left media keep throwing our way. **[Please support my campaign for the U.S. Senate today, and let's work together to unite this country instead of dividing it.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329109:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329109:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)
Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329109:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329111:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329112:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329113:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329114:6xjKxiokN:m:1:3253819041:731D38398B69D05C2595A3212F7DA818:r)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Left Attacks Supreme Court!
body:
Anti-Trump Memo Update

[INSIDE JW]

A Dangerous Obstruction of Justice

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27286&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL3YxM3NiNnYtbGVmdC1jb21taXR0aW5nLWNyaW1lcy10by1zdG9wLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtYmlkZW4tbWluaXN0cnktb2YtdHJ1dGgtdGFyZ2V0Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]

The leak of the Supreme Court draft opinion in the _Dobbs v Jackson_
case is a dangerous obstruction of justice. And, it could very well
lead to intimidation and violence directed at Supreme Court justices.
Indeed, leftwing protestors reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27287&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvbGliZXJhbC1ncm91cC1wcm90ZXN0cy1jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1qdXN0aWNlLWhvbWVzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
plan to appear at the homes of conservative justices.

This unprecedented leak fits with the Left’s continued assault
against the Supreme Court. As soon as the news of the leaked opinion
broke, leftwing protesters were at the Supreme Court.

There must be a full investigation, but I’m not holding my breath
when it comes to the Biden administration upholding the rule of law
– especially when administration allies, including Sen. Chuck
Schumer, have threatened the justices in the past.

In the meantime, let's hope the rule of law prevails and the precious
lives of unborn human beings can once again be protected under law.

We are directly involved in this case. In December 2021 we announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=26401&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc2NvdHVzLXJvZS12LXdhZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
our amicus
curiae
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=26377&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RvYmJzLXYtamFja3Nvbi13b21lbnMtaGVhbHRoLWFtaWN1cy0xMzkyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
brief with the Supreme Court in favor of overturning _Roe v. Wade_.
Our brief, filed in support of the constitutionality of
Mississippi’s Gestational Age Act, argues that states have the right
under the Constitution to regulate abortion and protect unborn life
(_Dobbs v. Jackson_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=26374&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9zZWFyY2guYXNweD9maWxlbmFtZT0vZG9ja2V0L2RvY2tldGZpbGVzL2h0bWwvcHVibGljLzE5LTEzOTIuaHRtbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No. 19-1392)).

Our brief argues that the Supreme Court should overturn Roe and
restore the regulation of abortion to the state:

Despite creative judicial legislating, it is crystal clear that
abortion does not involve war, peace, negotiation, foreign commerce,
or taxation. Abortion fits squarely into the states’ sphere of
objects that concern the “lives, liberties, and properties of the
people.” Not being an enumerated power, the _Roe_ Court did not have
the authority to overturn the abortion laws of the states.

Additionally, our brief notes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=26376&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RvYmJzLXYtamFja3Nvbi13b21lbnMtaGVhbHRoLWFtaWN1cy0xMzkyLXBncy0xNS0xNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
that _Roe v. Wade_ didn’t provide clarity, but instead muddied the
waters:

Far from creating a national consensus, _Roe _threw the states into a
48-year contentious legal battle. Even some abortion advocates eschew
the injudicious method of federalizing abortion as short-circuiting a
naturally evolving jurisprudence under state laws. As federal and
state judges attempt to apply this Court’s precedents, a national
landscape of inconsistent, inconclusive, and untenable rules have
emerged. As a national policy, abortion jurisprudence is, in a word, a
mess. Stubbornly holding on to unconstitutional precedent will never
have a positive outcome. It is time to return abortion policy to the
states where it belongs and where the democratic process can
effectively work.

I pray that the justices will remain steadfast in the fallout from
this egregious crime.

COURT ORDERS FBI TO DETAIL OFFICIALS LISTED IN ANTI-TRUMP MEMO

A federal court has ordered the FBI to disclose additional details
about FBI and other officials copied on the memo used to justify
launching the “Crossfire Hurricane” spy operation against
President Trump and his 2016 presidential campaign.

Judge Carl J. Nichols has given the FBI until June 16, 2022 to
respond. The order comes in our September 2019 FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27288&F=T&]
filed after the FBI failed to respond to a request for the memo, known
as an “Electronic Communication” or “EC.” (_Judicial Watch
v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=15499&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVsZWN0cm9uaWMtY29tbXMtY291bnRlcmludGVsLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjc0My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
(No. 1:19-cv-02743)).

In May 2020, we obtained
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27289&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVjbGFzc2lmaWNhdGlvbi1zcHlvcGVyYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
a

no-bid government contract that wasted $17 million on unused hotel
rooms for illegal immigrants, a federal audit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27291&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2lnLmRocy5nb3Yvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9hc3NldHMvMjAyMi0wNC9PSUctMjItMzctQXByMjIucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
reveals. The politically connected group, which had no experience
providing the services covered by the sole source federal contract,
also failed to meet COVID-19 health protocols required by the
government when the deal was signed. The highly questionable
arrangement was executed by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE),
the Homeland Security agency responsible for housing migrant families
in detention. The agency typically uses Family Residential Centers
(FRC) to house family units, but in early 2021 ICE anticipated
increased apprehensions of illegal immigrant families along the
southern border and awarded a contract to harbor them in hotels while
completing intake processing, auditors from the Department of Homeland
Security (DHS) Inspector General explain in a recent report.

The group that received the lucrative no-bid award, Endeavors, had
never provided beds or all-inclusive emergency family residential
services when ICE hired it to do so, auditors found. Formerly known as
Family Endeavors, the Texas-based nonprofit claims
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27292&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbmRlYXZvcnMub3JnL2Fib3V0LXVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
to passionately serve vulnerable
people in crisis through its innovative, personalized approach. Last
year a national news outlet reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58830&L=27293&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tL3RleGFzLW5vbnByb2ZpdC1ib3JkZXItY29udHJhY3QtYmlkZW4tb2ZmaWNpYWwtMjNhNDkzZjQtNjc3OS00NGYwLWE1ZDQtZGI4NjkwZjExYWVjLmh0bWwjP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that Endeavors won a colossal $530 million government contract just
months after it hired Biden administration official Andrew
Lorenzen-Straight as its senior director for migrant services and
federal affairs. The contract is by far the largest ever awarded to
the nonprofit, according to the article, and is potentially worth more
than 12 times the group’s most recently reported annual budget.
Lorenzen-Strait, a former ICE official who also advised the
Biden-Harris transition team on Department of Homeland Security (DHS)
policy and staffing matters, must have pulled some strings.

The recently published audit focuses on an $87 million chunk of the
Endeavors deal to increase housing capacity for detained migrant
families early last year. The sole source contract was for
approximately six months, from March to September 2021, to provide
1,239 beds and other necessary services in hotels. Because ICE did not
seek multiple bids for the work as it is obligated to do, the agency
blindly agreed to pay for a block of more than 1,200 hotel rooms,
regardless of how many got used. It resulted in $17 million worth of
hotel rooms that remained mostly empty, the DHS IG found. “ICE did
not adequately justify the need for the sole source contract to house
migrant families and spent approximately $17 million for hotel space
and services at six hotels that went largely unused between April and
June 2021,” the reports state. “ICE’s sole source contract with
Endeavors resulted in millions of dollars being spent on unused hotel
space.”

The DHS watchdog reveals that the deal was penned after Endeavors
provided an unsolicited proposal for housing migrant families in
hotels. Government agencies typically receive proposals from
contractors after putting out requests for proposals. “However,
Endeavors provided a proposal without such a request from ICE,”
investigators found. ICE then cited “unusual and compelling
urgency” as the basis for an exception to the competitive
contracting process. The agency’s justification noted that Endeavors
was the only known source capable of meeting the requirements to
provide 1,239 hotel beds and all-inclusive emergency family
residential services to support the surge of asylum seekers. “Based
on our analysis of ICE’s justification for sole sourcing the
contract to Endeavors, we determined ICE did not have supporting
documentation to establish that Endeavors was the only contractor that
could provide the services needed,” the DHS IG writes.

Additionally, Endeavors did not meet the government’s healthcare
protocols or ensure proper COVID-19 testing for families. “For
example, families were not tested by ICE for COVID-19 prior to being
transported to hotels and were not always tested by Endeavors staff
upon arrival at or departure from hotels, putting migrant families and
the outside population at risk of contracting COVID-19,” the report
states. “Further, Endeavors did not follow required ICE standards to
ensure the proper care for housing migrant families while such
families were residing in its facilities.”

Until next week,

clean_body: Anti-Trump Memo Update [INSIDE JW] A Dangerous Obstruction of Justice [=] The leak of the Supreme Court draft opinion in the Dobbs v Jackson case is a dangerous obstruction of justice. And, it could very well lead to intimidation and violence directed at Supreme Court justices. Indeed, leftwing protestors reportedly [] plan to appear at the homes of conservative justices. This unprecedented leak fits with the Left’s continued assault against the Supreme Court. As soon as the news of the leaked opinion broke, leftwing protesters were at the Supreme Court. There must be a full investigation, but I’m not holding my breath when it comes to the Biden administration upholding the rule of law – especially when administration allies, including Sen. Chuck Schumer, have threatened the justices in the past. In the meantime, let's hope the rule of law prevails and the precious lives of unborn human beings can once again be protected under law. We are directly involved in this case. In December 2021 we announced [] our amicus curiae [==] brief with the Supreme Court in favor of overturning Roe v. Wade. Our brief, filed in support of the constitutionality of Mississippi’s Gestational Age Act, argues that states have the right under the Constitution to regulate abortion and protect unborn life (Dobbs v. Jackson [==] (No. 19-1392)). Our brief argues that the Supreme Court should overturn Roe and restore the regulation of abortion to the state: Despite creative judicial legislating, it is crystal clear that abortion does not involve war, peace, negotiation, foreign commerce, or taxation. Abortion fits squarely into the states’ sphere of objects that concern the “lives, liberties, and properties of the people.” Not being an enumerated power, the Roe Court did not have the authority to overturn the abortion laws of the states. Additionally, our brief notes [=] that Roe v. Wade didn’t provide clarity, but instead muddied the waters: Far from creating a national consensus, Roe threw the states into a 48-year contentious legal battle. Even some abortion advocates eschew the injudicious method of federalizing abortion as short-circuiting a naturally evolving jurisprudence under state laws. As federal and state judges attempt to apply this Court’s precedents, a national landscape of inconsistent, inconclusive, and untenable rules have emerged. As a national policy, abortion jurisprudence is, in a word, a mess. Stubbornly holding on to unconstitutional precedent will never have a positive outcome. It is time to return abortion policy to the states where it belongs and where the democratic process can effectively work. I pray that the justices will remain steadfast in the fallout from this egregious crime. COURT ORDERS FBI TO DETAIL OFFICIALS LISTED IN ANTI-TRUMP MEMO A federal court has ordered the FBI to disclose additional details about FBI and other officials copied on the memo used to justify launching the “Crossfire Hurricane” spy operation against President Trump and his 2016 presidential campaign. Judge Carl J. Nichols has given the FBI until June 16, 2022 to respond. The order comes in our September 2019 FOIA lawsuit [==] filed after the FBI failed to respond to a request for the memo, known as an “Electronic Communication” or “EC.” (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [=] (No. 1:19-cv-02743)). In May 2020, we obtained [] a redacted version of the previously secret memo, authored by former FBI agent Peter Strzok. The Biden Justice Department argued [==] that there is no significant public interest in disclosing the names of officials copied on the memo. We filed a motion [==] countering that claim and arguing that the public had a significant interest in knowing who at the FBI had knowledge of the memo and presumably approved the investigation. The court held a hearing [==] on the dispute in September 2021, and on May 2, 2022 issued a minute order requiring the FBI to file a supplemental memorandum of up to 5 pages, supported by an affidavit or declaration, explaining the positions and seniority held by any persons whose names are redacted from the “CC:” section of the document. In support of our position, we provided the Court with two declarations by Kevin Brock, former assistant director of the Directorate of Intelligence and former FBI principal deputy director of the National Counterterrorism Center. Brock testified that it is not standard procedure to have an EC drafted, approved, and sent to and from a single agent and that doing so violates FBI oversight protocols: In the EC document here, the “From” line indicates the EC – and authorization to begin an investigation as required under FBI policy – is from a part of the FBI’s Counterintelligence Division. The contact listed is Peter Strzok. The EC was drafted by Peter Strzok. The EC was approved by Peter Strzok. On the face of the document produced, it appears the EC that initiated a criminal FARA investigation of unidentified members of the Trump presidential campaign was created by Peter Strzok, approved by Peter Strzok, and sent from Peter Strzok to Peter Strzok. This is not the usual procedure. FBI policy prohibits an agent from initiating and approving his or her own case. Such action violates FBI oversight protocols put in place to protect the American people from an FBI agent acting unilaterally. In fact, the EC does not identify any individual by name as a target of the investigation. It does not articulate any factors that address the elements of FARA as required by routine FBI policy and procedure and the Attorney General Guidelines and, therefore, does not contain sufficient justification for initiating an investigation into USPERs [U.S. persons]. Based upon my experience, no reasonable and experienced FBI counterintelligence squad supervisor in the field would have approved the EC at issue here – as released – which opened the Crossfire Hurricane investigation. The unredacted information released in the EC document here offers no legitimate predication justifying the investigation of USPERs involved in a presidential campaign or subsequent FISA intercept of a U.S. citizen. The Biden administration is still covering up who was involved in the Obama administration’s unprecedented and illicit spying on Donald J. Trump. This court decision is another step forward in accountability for the worst government corruption scandal in American history. QUESTIONS ABOUT PFIZER/BIONTECH VACCINE’S EFFECTS While drug giant Pfizer is reporting [=] a 61 percent leap in profits for the first quarter, due to COVID, we’re learning more about the vaccines that were rushed to market during the pandemic. We received 466 pages [] of records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) that show a key component of the vaccines developed by Pfizer/BioNTech, lipid nanoparticles (LNPs), were found outside the injection site, mainly the liver, adrenal glands, spleen and ovaries of test animals, eight to 48 hours after injection. Pfizer/BioNTech’s mRNA-based COVID vaccine relies on LNPs as a delivery system. Pfizer said in a January 10, 2022 press release [=] that Acuitas Therapeutics LNP technology is used in COMIRNATY, the Pfizer/BioNTech COVID-19 vaccine. We also received 663 pages [==] of records from HHS revealing that Johnson & Johnson relied on studies showing that vaccine DNA particles and injected virus particles were still present in test animals months after injection. The records also show that Johnson & Johnson, as part of its submission to the FDA for approval of its COVID vaccine, did not include studies of the spike protein encoded in the J&J vaccine. We obtained the records in response to a FOIA lawsuit (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [=] (No. 1:21-cv-02418)) filed after the Food and Drug Administration, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and the National Institute for Allergy and Infectious Disease failed to respond to a June 8, 2021, FOIA request for: [A]ccess to biodistribution studies and related data for the Pfizer, Moderna, and Johnson & Johnson vaccines used to treat and/or prevent SARS-CoV-2 and/or COVID-19. Biodistribution [] is a method of tracking where compounds of interest travel in an experimental animal or human subject. The Pfizer records include a report [], which was approved in February 2021, on the animal trials on the distribution of the Pfizer COVID vaccine in rat subjects. In a section titled “Safety Pharmacology” the report notes, “No safety pharmacology studies were conducted with BNT162b2 [the BioNTech vaccine] as they are not considered necessary for the development of vaccines according to the WHO guideline (WHO, 2005).” Similarly, under “Pharmacodynamic Drug Interactions,” is “Nonclinical studies evaluating pharmacodynamic drug interactions with BNT162b2 were not conducted as they are generally not considered necessary to support development and licensure of vaccine products for infectious diseases (WHO, 2005).” This Pfizer report notes that when lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) “with a comparable composition” to that used in the Pfizer COVID vaccine were injected into rats, “Total recovery (% of injected dose) of LNP outside the injection site was greatest in the liver and was much less in the spleen, adrenal glands, and ovaries.” ... “in summary” ... “the LNP distributes to the liver.” In the detailed analysis, the report states, “Over 48 hours, the LNP distributed mainly to liver, adrenal glands, spleen and ovaries, with maximum concentrations observed at 8-48 hours post-dose. Total recovery (% of injected dose) of LNP, for combined male and female animals, outside of the injection site was greatest in the liver (up to 18%) ...” This same Pfizer/BioNTech study notes “No genotoxicity studies are planned for BNT162b2 [the Pfizer/BioNTech COVID vaccine] as the components of the vaccine constructs are lipids and RNA and are not expected to have genotoxic potential (WHO, 2005).” Similarly, “Carcinogenicity studies with BNT162b2 have not been conducted as the components of the vaccine construct are lipids and RNA and are not expected to have carcinogenic or tumorigenic potential.” The conclusion of the study begins: “The nonclinical program demonstrates that BNT162b2 is immunogenic in mice, rats, and nonhuman primates, and the toxicity studies support the licensure of this vaccine.” The report notes that “boost immunizations” were also being tested on the animals in the trial. Also, “Vaccine-related microscopic findings at the end of dosing for BNT162b2 were evident in injection sites and surrounding tissues, in the draining iliac lymph nodes, bone marrow, spleen, and liver.” Also included in the Pfizer records is a report [==], approved in January 2021, titled “Pharmacokinetics Tabulated Summary.” A table in the report shows the biodistribution of lipid nanoparticles containing mRNA used in the vaccine using rats as the clinical trial subjects reports LNPs accumulating after 48 hours, especially in the lymph nodes, ovaries, small intestine and spleen. A summary of a study [=], approved in November 2020, of LNP mRNA distribution in rats, sponsored by Acuitas Therapeutics, notes that the concentrations of the LNP mRNA saw “levels peaking in the plasma by 1-4 hours post-dose and distribution mainly into liver, adrenal glands, spleen and ovaries over 48 hours. Total recovery of radioactivity outside of the injection site was greatest in the liver, with much lower total recovery in spleen, and very little recovery in adrenals glands and ovaries. The mean plasma, blood and tissue concentrations and tissue distribution patterns were broadly similar between the sexes and ... did not associate with red blood cells.” A September 2020 “Confidential” appendix to the clinical trial studies [] submitted for the Pfizer/BioNTech COVID vaccine (BNT162b2), titled “Justification for the absence of studies in CTD Module 4 (part of 2.4)” notes under “Safety Pharmacology” that “No safety pharmacology studies were conducted as they are not considered necessary according to the WHO guideline (WHO, 2005).” And under “Pharmacodynamic Drug Interactions,” is written: “Nonclinical studies evaluating pharmacodynamic drug interactions were not conducted as they are not generally considered necessary to support development and licensure of vaccine products for infectious diseases (WHO, 2005).” Under the heading “Genotoxicity,” is: “No genotoxicity studies are planned for BNT162b2 as the components of the vaccine constructs are lipids and RNA that are not expected to have genotoxic potential (WHO, 2005).” Regarding “Carcinogenicity (including supportive toxicokinetics evaluations)” is written: Carcinogenicity studies with BNT162b2 have not been conducted as the components of the vaccine constructs are lipids and RNA that are not expected to have carcinogenic or tumorigenic potential. Carcinogenicity testing is generally not considered necessary to support the development and licensure of vaccine products for infectious diseases (WHO, 2005). In a “Confidential” Pfizer study [], approved in April 2020, looking at four COVID vaccine variants, the company tested a vaccine with an RNA strand “that self-amplifies upon entering the cell.” It “encodes the Venezuelan equine encephalitis (VEE) virus RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RDRP or replicas).” In the same Pfizer study, the authors note that, “Although liver function tests will be carefully monitored during the clinical development of these vaccines, BioNTech’s prior clinical experience indicates that the distribution to the liver does not pose a safety concern. Also, the Pfizer study authors note, “Based on previous nonclinical and clinical experience with the three RNA platforms, a beneficial safety profile is anticipated, and may include transient local reactions (such as swelling/edema or redness) and body temperature increases.” The Johnson & Johnson [=] records include a 2007 study [=] of the biodistribution of an intramuscular-administered adenovector-based viral vaccine [=] using New Zealand white rabbits, which showed that the vaccine accumulated in “the spleen, iliac lymph node, and the muscle at the site of injection.” A biodistribution table included as an appendix to the 2007 rabbit study showed that the vaccine DNA particles were still present in the iliac lymph nodes 91 days after injection. A chart of pharmacokinetics data from a November 2020 report [==] of a study on “VAC31518 JNJ-78436735,” the Johnson & Johnson vaccine, on rabbits shows the collection of the injected virus particles in the spleen and iliac lymph nodes up to three months later, as well as particles found in the skin and muscle at the injection site. In a November 4, 2020 report [==] submitted to the FDA regarding the Johnson & Johnson COVID vaccine, the authors discuss the 2007 New Zealand rabbit study in which adenovirus-vectored vaccine is trialed, but note that “No pharmacokinetic or biodistribution studies have been conducted with AD26.COV2.S specifically.” The report notes that metabolism, excretion, and pharmacokinetic interactions with other drugs were not studied in this trial because they are “Not applicable to vaccines.” It is also noted that “biodistribution studies have not been conducted with Ad26.COV2.S.” A table in the report shows that the vaccine virus continued to appear in the rabbits’ iliac lymph nodes 180 days after injection. A June 2020 “Pharmacokinetics Written Summary [] for the Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccines notes that: Ad26COVS1 (also known as VAC31518 or JNJ-78436735) is a monovalent, recombinant replication-incompetent adenovirus type 26 (Ad26) vectored vaccine encoding a severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) Spike protein.... No specific pharmacokinetic studies have been performed with Ad26COVS1. However, to assess distribution, persistence, and clearance of the Ad26 vector (platform), biodistribution studies were conducted in rabbits using two other Ad26-based vaccines encoding [redacted] and [redacted] antigens.... [T]he available biodistribution results are considered sufficient to inform on the biodistribution profile of Ad26COVS1, for which the same Ad26 vector backbone is used. These documents show why many Americans have concerns about whether the novel COVID vaccines that were developed at such an accelerated pace were tested properly and thoroughly. name: Herschel Walker
subject: A caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329667:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)

---
Peter,

I have to admit - I hadn't heard of the far-left publication called _The Nation_ before last week. Now, I'll never forget it.

They published an attack piece against me - based on the color of my skin - that is beyond ridiculous and insulting.

While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece.

There are a lot of nasty things said about me in this article simply because I'm a Black Republican. Like this:

"Herschel Walker, the football star turned Georgia Senate candidate, is an animated caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives."
Or maybe this line:

"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."
It's shameful.

But the writer doesn't just take aim at me. He questions the support from folks like you, too:

"Most white people in the South vote 'R' like their entire white supremacist project depends on it."
Peter, I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign. However, can you imagine the reaction from the mainstream media if these things had been said about a Black Democrat? The outrage! There would be calls for the writer to be fired and the publication cancelled.

But I'm not calling for a protest of the author or a boycott of the publication's advertisers. Nothing like that.

_**I think the best answer is to prove them wrong at the ballot box.**_

**[Will you join me in standing up to these racist attacks?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329667:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)**

**[Stand with Herschel against far-left attacks](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329667:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)**
[** Chip in $4 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329668:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)
The media has been against our campaign since we launched last summer, but they have rarely been so brazen to say things as this:

"Georgia Republicans want Walker because he's Black and Warnock is Black, and they think they can defeat Warnock in November if they can shave just a little of the Black vote..."
I'm not **" any old Black person"** as the author of the article asserts. I'm Herschel Walker - a proud Georgian and a proud Republican - who has lived the American Dream and wants to secure that dream for the next generation of Americans from all walks of life.

_The best way to deal with racist tropes like these are to call them out, reject them, and prove them wrong._

I hope you'll stand with me against the political hit jobs that the far-left media keep throwing our way. **[Please support my campaign for the U.S. Senate today, and let's work together to unite this country instead of dividing it.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329667:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329667:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)
Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329667:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329669:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329670:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329671:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60329672:65ZceioN7:m:1:3317145305:CC8ABD7FB760EB6DB5D0DF2379F65BFF:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Jason Johnson
subject: ATTENTION PATRIOTS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kurka for Governor PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687
body:
Volunteer meeting this coming Monday!

| Hi Peter, Thanks to all of you AMAZING PATRIOTS who have already signed up to be VOLUNTEERS for our campaign to MAKE ALASKA FREE !! There is no doubt that your love for God and Country has motivated you to partner with the most God-honoring Candidates Christopher Kurka & Paul Hueper who will aggressively fight to protect your God-given and inalienable rights! This Monday we will be having a volunteer meeting at our HQ in Wasilla. The momentum and excitement is off the Charts!! [](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Vd9casvicYtJcYPUWrBZNa67IaC8WR2u4IPfDc3fa-w&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_meeting&n=1) **If you haven’t signed up yet but want to join the movement to take back our liberties, JOIN US this Monday night at 6 PM.** 190 E Paulson Ave, Wasilla AK. (If the map takes you to Donut King, don't stop there and have a treat - we have a State to save! Just go down Paulson - the street that runs perpendicular to Main Street - and continue straight at the stop sign. The road ends in our parking lot. We're the unit on the end opposite the mini storage.) **BIG NEWS !** We will soon be opening a HQ in Anchorage - if you have a large office space or warehouse you would be willing to let us use, please private message us! I'm looking forward to working with you to WIN for liberty in Alaska! Jason Johnson Volunteer & Operations Manager PS. We are actively raising a LITTLE money from A LOT of grassroots donors from across Alaska to get our message out. For as little as $0.83 cents a day you can further our efforts to MAKE ALASKA FREE ! Prayerfully consider becoming a grassroots donor and donating $25 a month! To donate click the link > [https://www.chriskurka.com/donate](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzW-zEK-3Z9mAZxjdCeR3iqLWUT4kcfhLZxsXf_4rl-GR&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_meeting&n=2) [www.ChrisKurka.com](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzZYHrXjSSqDZFm4adezdWWY&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_meeting&n=3) Paid for by Kurka for Governor PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc29d02qie0ad5j81jspskf211jqj5hh8jivl1u0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ujhb1d5gscrmco3lccq7cpb4m9iecdj3ctjr6phgm6qmfc9ke9q64obkelqn2c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shhcopb9cr56up74phim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5chie8pr3c9ie49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo1kno3ln290ghnbn0dafg46vjido941ploo7vno_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cji6eor2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztjgh8ae4lvpcvr56sekrkb3gv54eroubc58tvlg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cji6eor2cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zae3m2qv7n8c8adrhv3s1ask3suvnijvaq7oo8jo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cji6eor2cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Action News
subject: Hillsdale’s newest free online course
body:
Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z68teqhj8ljr1enigod56eb8348u4ndtn0fi2ll8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u2q6aorgm1h70tbmepij9phjehoraodk6aqm0s3hehg6bdbk6jg7co766dg7ac77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shhcopb9cr56up72phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5chie8pr3chge49fg)

---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16, so we can promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** **** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cs-lewis-christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpi6iooslam57ta69it736h4eck67aqnehne4gio_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cji6eor4c3h2bs)** Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: Left’s response to Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
| | | **BREAKING NEWS: The Supreme Court intends to overturn Roe v Wade and the left is going wild in response. **_Join me to protect our constitution and TAKE BACK THE SENATE!___
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60330994:6DLF4ioNu:m:1:3317145305:CCE5CC953460CD4E65A76830A355F788:r)
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60330994:6DLF4ioNu:m:1:3317145305:CCE5CC953460CD4E65A76830A355F788:r)
---
Peter, It was recently revealed that the Supreme Court intends to overturn Roe v Wade and return the power to regulate abortion to the states and to the people - where it belongs. As a father and as a doctor I am 100% pro-life. And as an American, I believe it is the role of our government to defend innocent life. _I am proud to see our Supreme Court stand for the individual rights of the most vulnerable Americans. _ But of course, liberals don't like this at all. In response, liberals are already trying to find a way to force their agenda on the American people. They want to pack the court and add several new judges who value big government over individual liberty.**[FIGHT BACK >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60330994:6DLF4ioNu:m:1:3317145305:CCE5CC953460CD4E65A76830A355F788:r)** There's no doubt adding justices to the bench now would contribute to a dangerous, growing government and division in our country, and endanger the millions of lives saved by overturning Roe v Wade. But we don't have to sit back and accept this progressive agenda or any new progressive justices. All we have to do is win in November and gain ONE MORE SEAT to take back the majority and reject the mob-rule, big-government agenda of the modern left. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. D. User Submissions. To comply with Federal election law and the regulations of the Federal Election Commission, we are required to do our best to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 per election cycle. Generally, contributions are non-refundable. Should you choose to contribute, you will receive an e-mail confirmation of your contribution. C. Information You Choose to Provide to Us. We collect any information you provide to us on or through the services or in any other way. For example, we collect any information you provide when you update your user account and profile ("User Account"); participate in contests, surveys, and other promotions; and sign up to receive newsletters and other communications. In addition, the Services may include features that rely on the use of information stored on, or made available through, your mobile device. We may also ask to collect or use the specific location of your mobile device (e.g., by accessing your Device's GPS). If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at . D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. We may collect any information you submit, post, or provide in such activities and reserve the right to store any information about the people you contact via the Services. FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States | | PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

body:
---
| | | | | |

| [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e6bc56f888e62d59219aa4c481823414d124d449aa85f438339b9bcc58f34725eeea792f722da2619b0cdbc1909811d547faaac15f9b4abb89)
---
| | **House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter**
---

Welcome to the House Conservatives Trust Bi-Weekly Newsletter. This is a chance for us at HCT to share an inside look at news and events shaping our fight to take back the House for Republicans in 2022.
**An assault on our judicial system has taken place.** The Supreme Court draft leak is a danger to the integrity of our court processes and judicial system. It is clear that such an action was intended to incite increased pressure from the Radical Left in order to intimidate Conservative justices regarding their decisions and opinions on Roe v. Wade. We must come together and ensure that the pressure from the liberal mob does NOT disrupt our judicial proceedings!

**Biden 's despotic, dystopian regime has reached a whole new level.** The Disinformation Governance Board is a threat to free speech and a threat to our democracy. This week, both Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas and Press Secretary Psaki discussed the bureau, describing its goals of 'fighting the spread of disinformation on the internet'. Not unlike George Orwell's 1984 novel Ministry of Truth or the departments of many totalitarian regimes throughout history, Biden wants to police our free speech in order to control his own narrative. Our speech was already in danger from the Big Tech oligarchs censoring our proud conservative ideals on social media. Now Biden's own regime is implementing crackdowns on our constitutional rights. He must be STOPPED!
---
* * *
---

**" In 2022, we're going to take back the House" \- President Donald J. Trump
**
---
| | | | [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e635c7de03d7b3ee07f051c10a6264ecd3e05007b631d264d6fe4ae4b99434f7e13b5b85a29cd18430286f0fab6fa2d8fa562849c94af8ef02)
---
|
**Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed agenda has led to rampant inflation, a border crisis, American families suffering and embarassment abroad. We must fight back TODAY. Will you join us?**
---
| | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e633c16ca092b334bbd5e50f49297594f81dcd7d15339c1b71ea39a35fdc155f4a1099a5c946db5cb9763d84668d94b678)
---
* * *
---
**TRUMP ENDORSES JIM BANKS**
---
Last week, President Trump _**[released a statement](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e6f0eb3807a9a90472a8343a843b7936b162c603457169b8f9e131b93a05719e8438a65c7da8c3e0e2ec4fe1da3378655f "released a statement")**_ announcing his support and endorsement of Congressman Banks for his re-election campaign in Indiana's 3rd District. Trump described the Chairman as a "Conservative Warrior for our America First agenda in Congress" who will "Secure our Southern Border, Fight Inflation, Grow our Economy, Support our Military and Vets, Protect Life, Defend the Second Amendment, and Stand Up to the Woke Mob destroying our Country." Congressman Banks is excited to continue to represent the great people of Indiana and fight for these conservative values.
---
| [](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e6a1f38bab60819bc21862ed77089ce67915fd86ebe201a611fc843c04307bcc3f2c18ba17de85e07ba3dd6154420119f7)
---
| | | [READ TRUMPS RELEASE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e608e9e6a18ca23182cac7bc9848b8ca28d4ee85161998eb66b3e4c11f99b101cb4338fb2054322152b5911b17cdc02e18)
---
* * *
---
**THE END OF ROE v. WADE?**
---
An official draft opinion of the U.S Supreme Court was**_[LEAKED on Monday to Politico](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e6fb0b97f3cf44f8c73d34935d1fd7b2d2e067988951504a45156b093dccb9b33889ffad52ba35e253d91736b1c0c3d5eb "LEAKED on Monday to Politico")_ **, revealing a vote to overturn the abortion rights under Roe v. Wade and place the power of outlawing abortion into the hands of the states. In its wake, a barrage of protests set on pressuring the Conservative Justices to change their opinions and protect abortion. The leak is currently under investigation, but Liberals hope that the leak will give them an opportunity to have an impact on the final ruling. We can not allow the Liberal mob to intimidate our Supreme Court! Now is the time to stand up and push back against this pressure. Life must be protected at all costs.
---
| | [READ THE POLITICO LETTER](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e654eb8a99a0fba24ba51be749868ee0f14d14ae986d804653e664928f8723f8e4c83e2944851cd7625a40dde13512242f)
---
| | | [MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e634c0f5e09ed021f7a14b640a00d3394a3a1ea3b51bcd6bffbee9651971df556db260b9664b2569693c289ebef4bddaf3)
---
* * *
---
**BIDEN 'S MINISTRY OF TRUTH**
---
Biden has now created his own _Ministry of Truth_ as a police force for information on the internet, attempting to crack down on our freedom of speech. This is an unconstitutional move by the President in an attempt to tighten his grip on conservative speech and ensure that the censorship Americans have faced on social media platforms will continue. Although the exact mission and execution of the bureau appears very vague, Biden must be held accountable for such an attack on our Constitutional Rights. It is clear that the Left has their own definition of "disinformation" and will continue to push its narrative whenever possible. If our leaders can not agree on what disinformation is, we can NOT trust Biden to attempt to police it. We must protect the values on which our nation was founded and continue to fight for free speech.
---
| | | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e6cc3177d77d4ff9fd0d41fccdd99883b8729837c7252f83ffba534c95381119076ff789c8c7aafb7d7054c1b5c582a9d5)
---
* * *
---
** BIDEN'S BORDER CRISIS CONTINUES**
---

Biden's border crisis continues to surge. It was confirmed this weekend by secretary Mayorkas that over 1 million migrants have been caught and released into the country since Biden first took office. It is estimated that between 1.2 and 1.4 million migrants have entered the country illegally under Biden, contrasted by Biden's measly 60,000 deportations during that time - record lows in that category. Biden is not cracking down on illegal immigration and his deportation policies leave many migrants who have entered the country illegally in the past as non-prioroties. These policies and statistics will only serve to encourage more and more surges at our border moving forward, with an estimated 4 million will attempt to enter the country when Title 42 is officially lifted. We can not continue to have an open border! We must protect our country and the people in it.
---
| | | [READ MORE HERE](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=f764bbfc12d0d7e69136febc7dcc78e1a7be470dbce78432b4ed27b32ba91130f708f76d3b2eabe639b8aebf8073d0ac7d1ad83d805f8793)
