name: American Update
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9937%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PfPBPLq5zCXt%2boniEVMmbA&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21590%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eUCvpJdCJA%2fcqkDV%2bi8E7w&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21591%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yVssGpfcYPowku6ouCatiQ&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21592%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SkZ3jWsjoMkRfTSKyqDpBg&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wqtt2tm4sdkY%2bAVboSoj1A&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9937%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PfPBPLq5zCXt%2boniEVMmbA&sysid=1)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that cha
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ed43ueb35ra1g7inkd4l30jtrr9n32kp2d0qdo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6cjk64q68tbjm1gecc5gciqe2d1jcpoj8ppm69jr1obimdjrep9hm4q3asj26urt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor9cr4supb2phksipmadtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim8p72chh68pr24no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z770bhdttqhu8jvkoprq3rv13d4kgnoso6iid4u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqge4kr9s5djt33s7f83p48b584sou3cteflqd3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbj85jjj945gceekpf6h9eaohsfheh8u4et3pkso_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpss8mk3bipcppfvj0uhs850lndl2je6us86fl60_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo50gngt3a5ueqb2cs3v86a33p2po7m4iitjj698_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvj74ug1hbj77efkvf31pi2r24m0uoj8di4drl7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z12vjvhtdbgu7rbgknib9vo4qakmm3jtnie0r75g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze6gmmq4u9k9987unnu4pcjb74co5mgjgljcjq7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkmnfgudv1bmclo7fi3pthd1i8lfrbmscv2nhvq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdlkjga6gjh5cmhst1vcagfvik3f7hb33v21ljp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhlv0646qrnt9o7gd528eatdu92hpskdsnb3gdeo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh68oj4cth2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z94al45sqhqqtfm5ld78in24p7hnocghfje51esg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg2593247uo4vv3c5aiqullfeocb5mqo56f3d30o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5chie4p32chjm49fg)

In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61869%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2btWGcMxBadO6tl%2fsdOQRpw&sysid=1)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61863%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PTI%2bdwg7WZYGln6FIQsiDg&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61864%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NtwbiDS7metFH5JTcNmQnA&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61869%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2btWGcMxBadO6tl%2fsdOQRpw&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61861%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0m406AeUeHTzvxMHoVzufA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6973%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JX6Vvmj5rWNHVvCltcFk7w&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6973%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JX6Vvmj5rWNHVvCltcFk7w&sysid=1)

Dan in Forrest Gump. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 5/6
body:
On to November!
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 5/6/22
Good evening,The May 3rd Primary has come and gone and we are now on to the general election this November. Congressman Chabot will be taking on a radical Pelosi's protege who used his position to push for extreme partisan legislation such as defunding the police. Congressman Chabot has been traveling the district to discuss his record of delivering results for the hardworking families of Ohio's First Congressional District. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _May 3rd Primary_ This past Tuesday was Primary Day. The Congressman was uncontested in the race but still traveled across the district to meet with voters who came out to vote. The Congressman's visits included stops in South Lebanon and Anderson Township. _Grassroots Engagement_ This week, Congressman Chabot spoke to the Rising Republicans of Greater Cincinnati about the campaign, the issues of the day, and the importance of being involved at the grassroots level. We had a great conversation about a wide range of topics. This group is energized and ready to help take the House back this fall! _East End Community Council_ This week Congressman Chabot attended the East End Community Council meeting. It was great to learn about everything going on in the East End. Very happy to have the opportunity to meet everyone in attendance! _PRESS RELEASE -Chabot Campaign Slams Landsman For Comments On Former Boss Pelosi; Disregard For Disastrous Impact Of Pelosi Agenda On OH-01 Families_ Congressman Steve Chabot's campaign issued the following statement Friday reacting to comments from out-of-touch Congressional candidate and former Nancy Pelosi staffer Greg Landsman."Nancy Pelosi's extreme partisan agenda has hit hardworking families in Ohio's First District with disastrous results, including rising crime and out-of-control costs for everyday essentials like groceries and gas," said Chabot campaign manager John Gomez. "But to former Pelosi staffer Greg Landsman, 'what does it matter?'""Landsman, like his mentor Pelosi, has exposed himself as having a callous disdain for the intelligence and best interests of hardworking families and small businesses," Gomez continued. "As a city councilor, Landsman wrote Pelosi-inspired policies to defund the Cincinnati police and hit struggling small businesses with costly mandates -- now, he's desperate to downplay the disastrous impact of his former boss's radical agenda so he can get to Washington and vote to keep her in power. Unfortunately for Landsman, voters do care, very much, who will control the levers of government in the U.S. House next year and what their policies mean for their families."In an interview this week, Landsman told the Cincinnati Enquirer, "the voters in the 1st Congressional District don't care about Pelosi... When asked his current opinion of Pelosi, Landman answered the question with a question. 'What does it matter?' Landsman said."The full release can be found [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-y/). _This Week 's Blog - "Education - Another KEY Issue This Year"_This week's blog is about education and the opportunity for Republicans this fall._" It's parents, teachers and local school boards who should be calling the shots on their children's education"_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-j/). As we work toward November, we'll need help to carry our message across the district. If you would like to help the campaign, please sign up at the link [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-t/)!Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-i/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-u/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-o/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-p/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tytrktdk-l-z) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-tytrktdk-961825B2-kujkulhluu-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-tytrktdk-kujkulhluu-e/)
---

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: I bet you won't hear this on Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45022772/344134960/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NhMmU0MS1mZGNkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yuTM_fAUsJ21qudAp5OKiM1ENcvUpD3MpWsbhh8LF4=&emci=e932d829-cccd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=97ca2e41-fdcd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45022773/344134964/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NhMmU0MS1mZGNkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yuTM_fAUsJ21qudAp5OKiM1ENcvUpD3MpWsbhh8LF4=&emci=e932d829-cccd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=97ca2e41-fdcd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $20,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**

clean_body: Hello, I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump. Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat. Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of kompromat Russia has on him... Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him. I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now. The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now. We’re facing a critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $20,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Donald Trump has already come and hosted one campaign rally for Grassley in Iowa. He’s sure to be back. But they have a big problem with this admiral. Everything the far-right thinks they ‘own’ – patriotism, service, and blue-collar ethics – will be empty rhetoric against me. Thank you so much for being such a critical part of this campaign, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) | Fellow Patriot,

I wanted to make sure you were aware that early voting began this week here in Georgia. I've been honored to have your continued support throughout my campaign, and now that we're in the final stretch I need your help.
Today is the first Saturday of early voting. Please make sure to head to the polls today if you can, or by May 24th at the latest. It would really help our campaign if you could remind 20 people, whether friends, family, or colleagues to head to the polls to support our campaign. It is critical that we get out the vote.

name: American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm7hakj3bk72mce25h6dav5632glcq92g6ajrq9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjhmhin5cr2e1h72dhle5jj4o74e2qj4dpjmuoj3cr5cgpn6cbm62om9dr4mmoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p32phim2pm4ptnc5j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsfe5jbvk6auc5846n2b3ajkio68knstq2emomio_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality—including a denial of an objective good—is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16, so we can promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** **** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cs-lewis-christianity](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhl4vnh3hfm1du38h0e3sgstvdrl5dvcqgr4u1v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74c3h2bs)** Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Roe OVERTURNED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
In an unprecedented move, a Supreme Court decision regarding Roe v. Wade was leaked to the press. Reading the decision, it is cl
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv15nvqcvn4ka9d5idf8fpccncp07oocs3csluc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3db6e6rr8pljc8rr1ohlelh62p3me9or8cbn6gpr1dhgm1h7ep1jm1pj8ptge3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor9cr4supb8phmcipmcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim8p72c5ge8pj24no)
| | | **ALERT: A new leak from the Supreme Court suggests Roe v. Wade will be overturned! The left is already responding radically to push their will on the people.___It's time to stand up now to protect our court and defend life._**
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z00r5p3olfb94mq3e4s2u882vj82lr7e2f32du5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjoio47uq5dv15gdlochepe1ho8m3dukbdlnsllg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, history is being made...
In an unprecedented move, a Supreme Court decision regarding Roe v. Wade was leaked to the press. Reading the decision, it is clear the Supreme Court intends to faithfully uphold the Constitution and overturn Roe v. Wade.

49 years ago, Roe v. Wade was wrongly decided—it was an abuse of judicial power and took power away from the people. Before Roe, voters—and their elected representatives—were empowered to regulate abortion and enact pro-life laws.
* _That means power is returning to the people._
* _That means Congress and state legislatures can act to save lives._
* _That means we can save millions of babies._

But it's obvious the Left is not taking the news well. _ _ This leak appears to be a full-throated effort to inspire and empower a radical mob to put pressure on the Supreme Court Justices into changing their decision.

To further intimidate Justices, **socialist Rep. Ilhan Omar** is calling for Congress to pack the Supreme Court.

And others, like **Senator Bernie Sanders** , want to END THE FILIBUSTER and ram the “Abortion for All Act” through the Senate._ _ These are historic battles, and we can't afford to lose them. That's why we're empowering our grassroots army now to tell legislators to STAND STRONG, defend the integrity of our courts, and protect the lives of babies._ _ Will you chip in to fund their efforts now?
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpm25d9go8tno5r2c5k4bpcbgjlujcrtc8g4bsm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $75**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2foba05urbff2qf0p3r92ca244p8q3vgiacfdt0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfudpg1r7bj80uv9mloo2bpgikll8vjkbbaskjl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)
---
[**YES: CHIP IN $35**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7ekdlkinpjchgm6sje27iee0cdujgtija9nuio_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)
---
This fight is about protecting the sanctity of life and defending our Constitution.

Remember, our work began long ago—we started by supporting the Supreme Court nominees that would uphold the Constitution. **We put the pressure on our Senate to confirm President Trump’s 3 nominees - Gorsuch, Kavanaugh, and Barrett - and without them this decision would have never been possible.****

**But this is only the beginning. If Roe is overturned, we will have more work to do—at the state level—to pass pro-life legislation. The next battleground will be in Congress and state legislatures!

We’ve built our team, strengthened our network, and we’re prepared to defend life across this nation. **This kind of “boots-on-the-ground” grassroots organizing is only possible with your generous support. ** **We’re organized. We’re prepared. We just need your help to take action when the time comes.** Please, chip in now to protect our court and protect babies. Support Heritage Action’s mission: **[https://heritageaction.com/action-5745205/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ouccppqn8kusom73b6v4l7q0tisbhtr2n47iso_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o74cph2bs)** Thank you,Jessica AndersonHeritage Action - Executive Director

body:
These people shouldn't be allowed within 100 yards of a school – nevermind in a classroom or on a school board, shaping curric
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9m9kgu319o3l4qe5ffrgp3g9khpq0l288kh0fk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o76c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5geeo6as34s3gb6o5hmpqeepbhm1jb6cpim2oe3cjgejhj0s3im9qb3d3n61jjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33d5jcjjr5d366phb6p37m2qmash5u)
These people shouldn't be allowed within 100 yards of a school – nevermind in a classroom or on a school board, shaping curriculum. |
I don't know you and you don't know me – but I know we have some important things in common.

I know what's happening in schools across our country appalls you and sickens you, just like it appalls and sickens me.

You know that children belong to their parents – not their teachers, not their schools and not Joe Biden.

But what you might not know is that there's something you can do today, no matter where you are or who you are, to fight for our children and root Left Wing radicals out of our education system.

**The 1776 Project PAC is going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against sexuality and gender indoctrination in our schools.**

Instead of waiting around on politicians in Washington to do something, we're going straight to the source.

We're challenging Left Wing radicals wherever we find them, but we don't stand a chance without you.

[**Can I count on your donation today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmudajtnscq6lf4uvmdbeakseqjj1bcmcc2ne1r8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o76c3h2bs)

My name is Cindy Rose, and I'm one of the many candidates the 1776 Project PAC is supporting for school board.

I could tell you just how bad my county has gotten, and how it's only a matter of time before this evil reaches the little ones you love, but you don't have to take my word for it.

Take it from another mother in my district, who isn't asking for your money or your vote.

_"Five weeks ago my daughter was to begin the family life unit in her 6th grade health class.

A permission form was sent home, three days before the unit was to begin, with a link to review the materials being used.

Wanting to know what topics were being covered I went to the link only to find nothing was posted and there were no materials to review.

I promptly emailed the teacher and asked him to send me any materials he would be using during the unit. I received his response the night before the class was scheduled to start.

It contained several links to a respectable medical organization and a slide show of accurate and age appropriate material. Based on that information we decided it would be fine to let her remain in class.

**Thirteen hours later my 11 year old daughter was sitting in health class being read a story by her adult male teacher about an 8th grade girl and another person who were kissing, touching, removing clothes and insinuating adult relations.**

At the conclusion of the story, the teacher made sure to point out that the second person did not have any pronouns associated with it so the students could imagine them in this intimate scenario as either a boy or a girl.

My daughter was then made to work in a group of 2 other boys to discuss the story and answer questions. My daughter returned home from school that day mortified and embarrassed. I immediately contacted the teacher and asked for a copy of the story, which he had omitted from my original request.

After a second attempt to obtain the story, it was finally sent to me and there was no mistake, it was exactly the story my daughter had told me about."_
This is what we're up against.

This is why we're doing what we're doing, and why we desperately need your support.

[**Will you donate to the 1776 Project PAC today, and give us the ammunition to force resignations, recall the bad actors, and replace them with patriots that will protect our children?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3gn10ke1489uhi1404nj13i7ldfsq8sao78j838_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o76c3h2bs)

**These people aren't just poisoning young minds with Marxist garbage – they're preying on the most vulnerable among us.**

I don't tell you this to upset you (even though I understand why it did).

I told you this because it's true – and it's happening all over our country.

And if you can believe it, what I've already told you isn't even the worst of it.

_"On the bottom of the paper I noticed the emblem [for] Advocates for Youth. So I did a little research and was appalled at what I found.

The... curriculum, which I confirmed with the district is used in Frederick County public schools, makes many disturbing claims such as infants and children are sexual beings and asks teachers to actively and purposefully invalidate heterosexual relationships to validate non-heterosexual ones."_
They're groomers, plain and simple.

These people shouldn't be allowed within 100 yards of a school – nevermind in a classroom or on a school board, shaping curriculum.

That's why I'm running for school board, and why I hope the 1776 Project PAC can count on your generous support.

Sincerely,

**Cindy Rose**

P.S. When and how a child learns about these topics is up to PARENTS. Not teachers, not school boards, and not Joe Biden.

In front of a room full of teachers, Joe Biden said "they're all our children. They are not somebody else's children. They're yours when they're in the classroom."

Leftists in every level of government have declared an all out war on the family, and it doesn't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.

[**Please make a generous donation to the 1776 Project PAC today, and keep our children safe from predators and perverts.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze19ue61mlbdv5eqffnhk1murcipl5pi0j55tmjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o76c3h2bs)
[ TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS DONATE NOW ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ec666s0l6bho8m1ue8abec7igtclq9erdcgdgg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjh62o76c3h2bs)

body:
There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45023594/344137848/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220507_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI0OWE4Ni0wM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9PBg-BMTFnRz-nvY48mol2MTqybz9Q9Xj6Nnm5CBmw=)

Friend,

I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and our people during his time as governor, I can feel my blood pressure rise. It seems there’s _no end_ to what he’ll do to advance his own political career.

He signed **the most restrictive anti-choice legislation** in Florida’s history since _Roe v. Wade_ , banning almost all abortions, with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points with Presidential Republican primary voters, so he supports it.

DeSantis signed legislation **targeting LGBTQ+ kids in the classroom** , outright banning any discussion of gender issues and further marginalizing already vulnerable students. We should be nurturing _all_ of Florida’s future leaders, not tormenting some for political gain.

He’s determined to silence _anyone_ who opposes him. One autocracy expert recently claimed in _Politico_ that **DeSantis is trying to turn Florida into his own personal “mini-autocracy**.” He’s even created an “elections police” unit that people fear will be more about voter intimidation than voter protection.

And now he’s **banning math textbooks**! Sadly, you can’t make this stuff up.

Suffice to say, the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House.

**The good news: a recent Listener Group poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track, I need your grassroots support to help us hit our $35,000 goal in the next 24 hours. Will you pitch in right now to help keep up the momentum?**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm throwing everything I've got into this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
End the filibuster. Codify Roe with a national law protecting abortion rights. Expand the Supreme Court. Stop this horrifying injustice in its tracks. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45023601/344137857/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ4Y_ROE_E_20220507_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQ0ZGI1ZC0wM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_GDAfXEr_o9cknAnZ8lYz1gC6UbWLD68oibl0ibqCA=&emci=359504c7-01ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=40d4db5d-03ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
This week has been enraging. But it hasn’t been surprising. For decades now, Republicans have been scheming to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. They’ve stacked the Supreme Court with out-of-touch right-wing extremists. They’ve passed state law after state law to shred abortion rights. And they’re already plotting nationwide abortion bans if they take back Congress and the White House. **I'm not accepting defeat. Here's my plan to fight back even harder:** **1\. Pass the Women’s Health Protection Act in the Senate.** This legislation would protect abortion rights nationwide — no matter what the Supreme Court does to _Roe_. **2\. If that means getting rid of the filibuster, then that means getting rid of the filibuster.** The House has already passed the Women’s Health Protection Act. President Biden is ready to sign it. But Republicans have used the Senate filibuster to block it. So we need to vote on getting rid of the filibuster. The filibuster is a Jim Crow relic. It gives Mitch McConnell veto power over bills that the American people elected a Democratic Senate to pass. It makes no sense to keep it around. If our vote to eliminate the filibuster doesn’t pass, we need to hold every single person who puts their name next to “nay” accountable — and we need to elect more Senate Democrats in November who understand the stakes of this moment and will end the filibuster. **3\. Expand the Supreme Court with at least four new members to rebalance this institution that has been hijacked by right-wing extremists.** The vast majority of Americans support upholding _Roe v. Wade_ , which has been the law of the land for nearly five decades now. When the Supreme Court has gotten this far out of sync with American values, then it’s time to expand the Supreme Court and pull it back toward the mainstream. Congress has already used its constitutional authority to expand the Supreme Court _six times_. Court expansion isn’t new. It isn’t radical. It’s what we must do to rein in a Court that Republicans packed and that clearly doesn’t feel limited by the rule of law. **There is a way forward, and this is what we must do to defend abortion rights. I’m throwing everything I’ve got into this fight. And I’m asking you to stay by my side. If you’re angry, like I am, own your anger. Channel it. Let’s stop this horrifying injustice in its tracks.** [_**Add your name to say you support this plan to defend abortion rights — including ending the filibuster to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and expanding the Supreme Court to defend our Constitution.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45023602/344137858/1241969976?refcode=EMZ4Y_ROE_E_20220507_V1S1_F&ms=EMZ4Y_ROE_E_20220507_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQ0ZGI1ZC0wM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_GDAfXEr_o9cknAnZ8lYz1gC6UbWLD68oibl0ibqCA=&emci=359504c7-01ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=40d4db5d-03ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45023603/344137859/1241969976?refcode=EMZ4Y_ROE_E_20220507_V1S1_F&ms=EMZ4Y_ROE_E_20220507_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGQ0ZGI1ZC0wM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C_GDAfXEr_o9cknAnZ8lYz1gC6UbWLD68oibl0ibqCA=&emci=359504c7-01ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=40d4db5d-03ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)

We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://action.elizabethwarren.com/p/mro2ZCtYVU2VH5ECFYaTwQ2?unsubscribedata=8%2Bb6mXP0hQtPsON%2B2wIqiVfOv%2B0dXH5Os5A5M4a3XlLECTmsuGXp7caKXlWeylYF%2FJxQxff5lcCxgzolzv5GEt%2FG8WnRfzYEKDO6NufbMz8y5vuX9sSOahAbXqENMvOWvX%2BlrZ91vc40vBNn0psssmliWrDJnBXaxUlfBYYP%2BQfx4CH%2FyLVjImp8OA4cLFDAckgOJIPgN83eLJ2gCpxK6z6SrUFLWHZ%2BzUY3ATxnG%2BsJ3PpQE846Mz0dMdhAtUsVLB%2FxTjbi144nCB%2BdRa%2BN3avwsIUp23kqdR00QtVrj08Khkg0jd6hEBtzbtoShSkztnD10zBD9Is%2BNJUqYmJUR49sJ8O%2BNZQQdpeWc5T8BW%2BcfxuiAlqvyi6t7ZR93iQvA5xAYSe8ioqF5ahQCS0IWAAKVFidXLcA5BitXvtISkk%3D).
clean_body: End the filibuster. Codify Roe with a national law protecting abortion rights. Expand the Supreme Court. Stop this horrifying injustice in its tracks. | | | This week has been enraging. But it hasn’t been surprising. For decades now, Republicans have been scheming to overturn Roe v. Wade. They’ve stacked the Supreme Court with out-of-touch right-wing extremists. They’ve passed state law after state law to shred abortion rights. And they’re already plotting nationwide abortion bans if they take back Congress and the White House. I'm not accepting defeat. Here's my plan to fight back even harder: 1\. Pass the Women’s Health Protection Act in the Senate. This legislation would protect abortion rights nationwide — no matter what the Supreme Court does to Roe. 2\. If that means getting rid of the filibuster, then that means getting rid of the filibuster. The House has already passed the Women’s Health Protection Act. President Biden is ready to sign it. But Republicans have used the Senate filibuster to block it. So we need to vote on getting rid of the filibuster. The filibuster is a Jim Crow relic. It gives Mitch McConnell veto power over bills that the American people elected a Democratic Senate to pass. It makes no sense to keep it around. If our vote to eliminate the filibuster doesn’t pass, we need to hold every single person who puts their name next to “nay” accountable — and we need to elect more Senate Democrats in November who understand the stakes of this moment and will end the filibuster. 3\. Expand the Supreme Court with at least four new members to rebalance this institution that has been hijacked by right-wing extremists. The vast majority of Americans support upholding Roe v. Wade , which has been the law of the land for nearly five decades now. When the Supreme Court has gotten this far out of sync with American values, then it’s time to expand the Supreme Court and pull it back toward the mainstream. Congress has already used its constitutional authority to expand the Supreme Court six times. Court expansion isn’t new. It isn’t radical. It’s what we must do to rein in a Court that Republicans packed and that clearly doesn’t feel limited by the rule of law. There is a way forward, and this is what we must do to defend abortion rights. I’m throwing everything I’ve got into this fight. And I’m asking you to stay by my side. If you’re angry, like I am, own your anger. Channel it. Let’s stop this horrifying injustice in its tracks. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Team Cooper
subject: re: North Carolina’s open Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Roy is working hard to flip this Senate seat blue. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45024048/344140008/823540626?refcode=ea.d6b272a2-05ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.d6b272a2-05ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmIyNzJhMi0wNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Z_Zr3OWGZ-SeWVb91gOkhut2AlyKCZFm_mkaftVCAU=&emci=f7c79df4-56cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d6b272a2-05ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
This week, the right-wing got what they’ve wanted for so long: a clear sign that _Roe v. Wade_ is going to be overturned. Now, Democrats in Washington are working to protect access to reproductive care at the federal level — and we have a chance to help them. name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Reminder: Roe v. Wade Is a Bit of a Personal Matter for Me
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iEWkd7PkgSxhy_yZlIKYg-hObf1pCFUie4o2I9mRg2pAO1qMdIFG95AU9hkm_oM8zvxafDmxZkg86_qWlNDRPASFu3FrqxUSX6I2_IgwRDBXTQGfn-MUNfFufrmv8J5vWF5WMR5soa7NBy3blED6Cse0bR58YS_RbPHjnVY5GXjeqLIi8Ov07w==&c=SiD0IfzDNFILcdDi95MAXw5aLIiri9BIg2vNxDAdrnmNKw7WqrMl7Q==&ch=-lXXVinrOcqI-0Z7blVHBzOEyg7B7WKl_eFYysO_vp2ky6P-8J34Ww==)
---
| Peter \-
Given the recent news regarding Roe v. Wade, I feel compelled to talk to you about how important a matter this is to me.
I'm the byproduct of rape. My mother was eleven when I was conceived. In the world the Left desires, I would never have been born. If you've heard my story, you know how grateful I am for the decision my grandparents made to support my very young mother and allow me to live rather than be aborted. Were it not for the good graces of my grandparents, you wouldn't be receiving this email because I would have never existed. That baby would have never grown up to join our armed forces, enjoy the beauties of marriage and motherhood, and eventually run for Senate to write you this email.
And that same potential is in every child.
Your life matters. My life matters. All lives matter and I value all life, from conception until natural death. Every one of us was created with a purpose and I am greatly encouraged to see that our nation is prepared to engage in the long overdue discussion about when life begins and when constitutional protections come full force.
In times like these, we need leaders with a steady hand to direct our nation through these difficult, but necessary discussions. Our U.S. Senators must proceed in this manner and behave like the long-term stewards they were elected to be. In saying that, I fully realize that once elected I would be one of those leaders, and I suppose I just needed you to know that I will answer the call and do what is right for our glorious nation.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iEWkd7PkgSxhy_yZlIKYg-hObf1pCFUie4o2I9mRg2pAO1qMdIFG95AU9hkm_oM8zvxafDmxZkg86_qWlNDRPASFu3FrqxUSX6I2_IgwRDBXTQGfn-MUNfFufrmv8J5vWF5WMR5soa7NBy3blED6Cse0bR58YS_RbPHjnVY5GXjeqLIi8Ov07w==&c=SiD0IfzDNFILcdDi95MAXw5aLIiri9BIg2vNxDAdrnmNKw7WqrMl7Q==&ch=-lXXVinrOcqI-0Z7blVHBzOEyg7B7WKl_eFYysO_vp2ky6P-8J34Ww==)
---
| Thank you for everything you've always done. You can always help by contributing at the link above, or by simply sharing my story in the discussions I'm sure we'll all be a part of in the near future.
Blessings, Kathy Barnette
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Kathy Barnette for Senate
---

body:
Hosted Monday at Platte Canyon High School
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hMVx4GAYd_4nqO9dGNrgScM2lGYVMXCS2iEN-V8_mtmbB354uTUM3GSw6AQeHXnVFYXX3M0wD87rnYYTw01W3kE4ynDPsViyh5WfMvT66YM5TcBK7ro6Y8sZYjxTFMCHPBz3wh4_T5tpHGCrjU33LCTmUWUgcCqS&c=DXmCyWBdgulkDRMKBbrP2Un2lf9uWjhuBplszbdvZmYVM3ViwS7X2g==&ch=BF7Mg1wQqplmmMgkYAy6GyIJ-SypAH83BgaV_bheCaW2TPYiBczwHQ==)

| Congressional Candidate Debate Monday in Bailey
---
| |
---|---
|
This Monday, May 9th, the Platte Canyon High School in Bailey will host a Candidate Debate for Congressional District 7 (CD7).

All candidates who are on the ballot for the primary election on June 28th will attend this event.

Don't miss the opportunity to hear point and counterpoint from all the candidates who wish to represent us in Washington DC, and are asking for your vote next month!

The fun begins at 6:00PM, Let's Go!

Platte Canyon High School is at 57243 Hwy 285 in Bailey

name: Rand Paul
subject: Roe ruling has the left running wild
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
| | | **BREAKING NEWS: The Supreme Court intends to overturn Roe v Wade and the left is going wild in response. **_Join me to protect our constitution and TAKE BACK THE SENATE!___
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60331078:6C_YNWoNE:m:1:3253819041:CAE775081DCB1C1E9CFEFE0124DDD780:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60331078:6C_YNWoNE:m:1:3253819041:CAE775081DCB1C1E9CFEFE0124DDD780:r)
---
Peter, It was recently revealed that the Supreme Court intends to overturn Roe v Wade and return the power to regulate abortion to the states and to the people - where it belongs. As a father and as a doctor I am 100% pro-life. And as an American, I believe it is the role of our government to defend innocent life. _I am proud to see our Supreme Court stand for the individual rights of the most vulnerable Americans. _ But of course, liberals don't like this at all. In response, liberals are already trying to find a way to force their agenda on the American people. They want to pack the court and add several new judges who value big government over individual liberty.**[FIGHT BACK >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60331078:6C_YNWoNE:m:1:3253819041:CAE775081DCB1C1E9CFEFE0124DDD780:r)** There's no doubt adding justices to the bench now would contribute to a dangerous, growing government and division in our country, and endanger the millions of lives saved by overturning Roe v Wade. But we don't have to sit back and accept this progressive agenda or any new progressive justices. All we have to do is win in November and gain ONE MORE SEAT to take back the majority and reject the mob-rule, big-government agenda of the modern left. But I'm going to need your help. **Will you chip in today to help me TAKE BACK THE SENATE and SAVE OUR COURT?:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60331078:6C_YNWoNE:m:1:3253819041:CAE775081DCB1C1E9CFEFE0124DDD780:r)**

In Liberty,Rand Paul __
---
| | |
---
| |
---

body:
|
| | | Conservatives are preparing for battle, and right now, **we need you with us more than ever before. **

The Midterm Election results will define the future we leave behind for our children and grandchildren. We cannot hesitate. The time to strike is now. **[Are you with us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60332778:JvUQQWoNz:m:1:3317145305:36E453ED15E30B19602D2DB0F0C4C8DC:r "Are you with us?")**

**[Will you commit TODAY by chipping in an 850% matched contribution to help us start the RED WAVE?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60332778:JvUQQWoNz:m:1:3317145305:36E453ED15E30B19602D2DB0F0C4C8DC:r "Will you commit
TODAY by chipping in an 850% matched contribution to help us start the RED WAVE?")**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60332778:JvUQQWoNz:m:1:3317145305:36E453ED15E30B19602D2DB0F0C4C8DC:r)

---
_850% Match Activated until 11:59 PM_
We refuse to lie to you, and we won't sugarcoat it for you either. The Radical Left is energized, and they're determined to destroy every lasting legacy President Trump left on this great nation.

_They have the money, and the manpower._

The odds are stacked against us, and **no Conservative is safe.**

We CANNOT afford for our base to sit on the sidelines. If we want to bring on a RED WAVE and take back our Conservative Majority, we need to work hard and earn it.

**[That's why I'm asking you to take a stand right now with House Conservatives. If you commit to starting the RED WAVE by 11:59 PM, we will match your contribution by 850%!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60332778:JvUQQWoNz:m:1:3317145305:36E453ED15E30B19602D2DB0F0C4C8DC:r "That’s
why I’m asking you to take a stand right now with President Trump and House Conservatives. If you commit to starting the RED WAVE by 11:59 PM,
we will match your contribution by 850%!")**

---

_850% Match Activated until 11:59 PM_
Every second we wait, the stakes get higher and higher. **We need you on our team.**

House Conservatives need us to step up more than ever before. We need to show the liberal establishment that we are ready to fight for our President.

**[Are you with us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60332778:JvUQQWoNz:m:1:3317145305:36E453ED15E30B19602D2DB0F0C4C8DC:r "Are you with
us?")**

Onwards to battle,

House Conservatives

---
| |
* * *

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60332779:JvUQQWoNz:m:1:3317145305:36E453ED15E30B19602D2DB0F0C4C8DC:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Matt Benda
subject: Matt Benda will fight to Protect Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Benda for Congress

In January 2017, the Department of Homeland Security declared the U.S. election systems a part of the nation’s critical infrastructure.

In January 2017, the Department of Homeland Security declared the U.S. election systems a part of the _nation’s critical infrastructure_. We also know that strengthening our critical infrastructure from cyber-security has also been identified as a national priority. With this background, why is it so hard to obtain election information from our local county officials in southern Minnesota? Many concerned citizens have shared their outrage over not receiving cooperation from local election officials in obtaining election information. In response, I quickly initiated a series of public data requests in five counties – Olmsted, Rice, Blue Earth, Fillmore and Nobles. My questions were simple - provide an inventory of the election machines they use, including the software, inspections, incident logs, vendors, and other details. **To date, I have not received this information from any of the five counties.** Based upon written responses I’ve seen from other similar data requests; I expect that these disclosures will be incomplete and hidden behind the artificial shroud of “nonpublic security data.” _Trust me, the more resistance we receive in obtaining this information the more persistent I will become._ Citizens must be allowed to participate in the important role of protecting our critical infrastructure. Government works for us, not in a secret world beyond our view. I expect a fight ahead. Will you [help](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWnBYf4hb_F9W9gFmG46lQttDW5GRJ1L4JP03fN2F3N3h3q90pV1-WJV7CgJw4W6RKWVw4q-dr2W1zkBMF1xj_v_W3n-VS25P1cnsW9hyShQ6HfYQmV6lGDQ2jcgchN8b9T7TwdqZRW3x1WwC83HRdRW5Wr3Bz66b6_RW3zY4z38SvXYbN62-zZ4f6Hc4W5Lhhqt1mtv2RF5ypSbMkh5wW627ngm1zBrH6W7W5SZg5pmXrZW8sXZZl6vbwtWW7GmRGJ7nqwgsW7Hk07m3swfyLW4SgsV62bLbtSW3jlK9f26N993W1QcMSD7MtpZ9W5Zw2sl1YNpXrW6fnw68817QXMVWNJdy7lXbl7W6lWWVs9cl-RlW2YM0M78RW0ddN3vZyBh8ZWTh34vQ1) me? Thank you,
---
---
Matt Benda P.S. Later today I will be watching the world premier of 2,000 Mules, a documentary billed to expose a ballot-harvesting scheme during the 2020 election. He called pregnancy from rape “inconvenient” and said overturning Roe would be a “victory.” JD has the full backing of the entire Republican Party on his side and they’ve committed to spending hundreds of millions to try to take back Senate control. = = Having JD Vance in the Senate would be terrible for Ohio, and I need your help defeating him so we can invest in Ohio families and finally cut workers in on the deal. This is the big one—so let’s do this. Happy to have you in my corner, —Tim | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Republican Task Force
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuhDAM_RrYQBACgYHhpOq2q6qqUsfI5zhcVJKgJLTq3zf02qlDJS_2e35-fmpWqKDF0sysYazpG9FM_cin-joKjqCGoWWdmEZe8AZWCqkOtO3X1SC4BPFN-4BUo7flbWYacaC-50ILPio9tBNruxZUS6S46MrXi7yAWY1bHsHSHJKWIUoHEtBUpOIe3ulT9pWoGJOsXOdbSlssulPBzrm81hRinVfDcR59cLlP3lHtw5IJpHaEZLyTd6ljrTvvycro9-yz6B624ONGmLKHgg0HZEmZ3WaIbPb2M0SwG5jFHeM_oneGd4lcyoSnU_X8cq5-8yvDrLYPs64mDiKnthyy3wml_z7-Aspchj4) [[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuhDAM_RrYQBACgYHhpOq2q6qqUsfI5zhcVJKgJLTq3zf02qlDJS_2e35-fmpWqKDF0sysYazpG9FM_cin-joKjqCGoWWdmEZe8AZWCqkOtO3X1SC4BPFN-4BUo7flbWYacaC-50ILPio9tBNruxZUS6S46MrXi7yAWY1bHsHSHJKWIUoHEtBUpOIe3ulT9pWoGJOsXOdbSlssulPBzrm81hRinVfDcR59cLlP3lHtw5IJpHaEZLyTd6ljrTvvycro9-yz6B624ONGmLKHgg0HZEmZ3WaIbPb2M0SwG5jFHeM_oneGd4lcyoSnU_X8cq5-8yvDrLYPs64mDiKnthyy3wml_z7-Aspchj4)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! This year I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuhDAM_RrYQBACgYHhpOq2q6qqUsfI5zhcVJKgJLTq3zf02qlDJS_2e35-fmpWqKDF0sysYazpG9FM_cin-joKjqCGoWWdmEZe8AZWCqkOtO3X1SC4BPFN-4BUo7flbWYacaC-50ILPio9tBNruxZUS6S46MrXi7yAWY1bHsHSHJKWIUoHEtBUpOIe3ulT9pWoGJOsXOdbSlssulPBzrm81hRinVfDcR59cLlP3lHtw5IJpHaEZLyTd6ljrTvvycro9-yz6B624ONGmLKHgg0HZEmZ3WaIbPb2M0SwG5jFHeM_oneGd4lcyoSnU_X8cq5-8yvDrLYPs64mDiKnthyy3wml_z7-Aspchj4) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuhDAM_RrYQBACgYHhpOq2q6qqUsfI5zhcVJKgJLTq3zf02qlDJS_2e35-fmpWqKDF0sysYazpG9FM_cin-joKjqCGoWWdmEZe8AZWCqkOtO3X1SC4BPFN-4BUo7flbWYacaC-50ILPio9tBNruxZUS6S46MrXi7yAWY1bHsHSHJKWIUoHEtBUpOIe3ulT9pWoGJOsXOdbSlssulPBzrm81hRinVfDcR59cLlP3lHtw5IJpHaEZLyTd6ljrTvvycro9-yz6B624ONGmLKHgg0HZEmZ3WaIbPb2M0SwG5jFHeM_oneGd4lcyoSnU_X8cq5-8yvDrLYPs64mDiKnthyy3wml_z7-Aspchj4) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

body:
Peter, it’s crunch time: our next public filing deadline is one month from today!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45030989/344168773/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220507-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220507-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220507&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d0b0bf01-0ece-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGIwYmYwMS0wZWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwa5JPSEDDTuiU65dcL3CqesY9ml3b4NI338ueOvmOo=)
---
**Peter, it’s crunch time.** Exactly ONE MONTH from today, we have to report our fundraising numbers for the next Maryland Board of Elections filing deadline. This is a public report, Peter. So how much we raise will be public for everyone to see — from the press, to our opponents, to undecided voters — so it’s crucial that we come out strong. **Especially since we are less than THREE MONTHS from Election Day.** That’s why we’re emailing you today — it’s critical that we secure the funds needed to put up a good showing on June 7th... which is coming up fast. name: Team Veronica
subject: Trump's cruelest policy took effect four years ago today.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
The "zero tolerance" policy shattered families and caused serious harm to border communities, friend

| |
---
Team — four years ago today, the Trump administration began its "zero tolerance" policy at the border. **_Under this shockingly cruel policy, over 5,000 children were separated from their families._** And countless more asylum seekers were detained and deported — even though seeking asylum is entirely legal and protected under U.S. and international law. Thankfully, President Biden rescinded the "zero tolerance" policy during his first week in office. But rolling back the cruelty of the Trump administration is not enough. **For too long, our broken immigration policy has shattered families, militarized border communities, and stoked xenophobia and fear.** Until we pass comprehensive, compassionate immigration reform, the echoes of the "zero tolerance" policy will continue to haunt our nation and our borderlands. Which is why Veronica personally sponsored the Reimaginging Asylum Processing Act, which has taken major steps forward for immigration reform. **[Veronica is leading this fight, but she can't do it alone. Do you agree that NOW is the time for immigration reform?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45033312/344175173/-1908627171?refcode=220507_team_zero_tolerance_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM3NGVmNy0wZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKAraRHP7-QDyESBqbSmfB-C8lEExj-3cXGFh3RbwoI=)** **[Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45033313/344175175/-1908627171?refcode=220507_team_zero_tolerance_yes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM3NGVmNy0wZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKAraRHP7-QDyESBqbSmfB-C8lEExj-3cXGFh3RbwoI=)** ****[No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45033314/344175176/-1908627171?refcode=220507_team_zero_tolerance_no&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM3NGVmNy0wZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKAraRHP7-QDyESBqbSmfB-C8lEExj-3cXGFh3RbwoI=)**** ******[I'm not sure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45033315/344175177/-1908627171?refcode=220507_team_zero_tolerance_oth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM3NGVmNy0wZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKAraRHP7-QDyESBqbSmfB-C8lEExj-3cXGFh3RbwoI=)****** Thank you for sharing your thoughts, friend, and for standing with us in this fight. — Team Veronica

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6976%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=akE%2f8wBERF9yJKCkdBqIPQ&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61876%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N2NXoUq05RSx3ZKFAbxfYw&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61877%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bA2Aqb5jZQ8cTs8XKXnjtQ&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! This year I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61878%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uBI4%2bsp0rXtcsSjrHn4Nyw&sysid=1) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61879%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mA8UHHODProN6iUSKmfW9Q&sysid=1) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Tobias Read GOTV Team
subject: Can you do some outreach?
body:
With just ten days left before election day, we need to step up our GOTV efforts.
---
| | Dear Peter,

With just ten days left before election day, we need to step up our GOTV efforts. Every indication is that this race will be extremely close. **This primary could be decided by just a handful of votes, and we can’t leave anything to chance.**

[**That’s why we’re reminding you to join OutreachCircle and contact your network of Oregon Democrats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45037955/344181433/-1255390845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmZTg5OC0xM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Brauo2ONGeqsga-uJA1MWyk9yOTgCM-hpZzSudZ3hLE=&emci=6fc8e375-87cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5fcfe898-13ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)

It’s critical that our supporters turn in their ballots now. This is too important to risk waiting for the last day to mail in or drop off your vote. Even something as simple as sharing our latest campaign video and asking your friends to do the same will help keep Tobias Read top of mind. **If every person reading this signs up for OutreachCircle we can reach tens of thousands of voters in minutes.**

OutreachCircle will look through your network and show you who the Oregon Democratic voters are so you can focus your efforts. Texting or emailing your contacts, sharing social media posts, and posting our latest TV ads are all easy and effective ways to mobilize people.

[**So, can you do some outreach this weekend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45037965/344181435/-1255390845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNmZTg5OC0xM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Brauo2ONGeqsga-uJA1MWyk9yOTgCM-hpZzSudZ3hLE=&emci=6fc8e375-87cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5fcfe898-13ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)

Thanks,
Tobias Read GOTV Team

clean_body: With just ten days left before election day, we need to step up our GOTV efforts. | | Dear Peter, With just ten days left before election day, we need to step up our GOTV efforts. Every indication is that this race will be extremely close. This primary could be decided by just a handful of votes, and we can’t leave anything to chance. It’s critical that our supporters turn in their ballots now. This is too important to risk waiting for the last day to mail in or drop off your vote. Even something as simple as sharing our latest campaign video and asking your friends to do the same will help keep Tobias Read top of mind. If every person reading this signs up for OutreachCircle we can reach tens of thousands of voters in minutes. OutreachCircle will look through your network and show you who the Oregon Democratic voters are so you can focus your efforts. Texting or emailing your contacts, sharing social media posts, and posting our latest TV ads are all easy and effective ways to mobilize people. Thanks, Tobias Read GOTV Team * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

Rachel Maddow is right, friend. The Supreme Court will likely overturn _Roe v. Wade_ in the next few months – and when they do, at least 36 million women in more than 25 states will lose access to the fundamental right to make personal decisions about their own body.
This is an appalling decision that turns the clock back on women's rights by nearly 50 years, taking our country back to a time when women had no choice but to undergo dangerous back-alley procedures.
**Make no mistake, friend; this is a coordinated attack on a fundamental right that the GOP has planned for decades. I'll never stop fighting for the right to reproductive choice – and if I win this Senate race, Democrats can use our expanded pro-choice majority to federally codify abortion rights.**
**If you're ready to join the fight for reproductive freedom, will you split $5 or more between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s campaign today? Every contribution will help me flip Florida blue and take action to protect abortion access for all. **
