name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: Endorsement alert: Trump senior advisor David Bossie!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0e2d984480ed/were-off-and-running-7098021?e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
| | **Trump senior advisor David Bossie endorses MAGA candidate Kerry McQuisten for governor**
Baker City, OR—Oregon Republican gubernatorial candidate, Kerry McQuisten, is honored to announce that her candidacy has been officially endorsed by David Bossie. Bossie is the senior advisor to former President Trump, Deputy Campaign Manager for the Trump 2016 Campaign, producer of the newly released film “Rigged,” and President of Citizens United.
Bossie tweeted out the endorsement on May 3: “I’m proud to endorse Kerry McQuisten for Oregon Governor. Kerry is a Trump supporting principled conservative who will fight every day to Make Oregon Great Again. Oregonians need real leadership and common sense reforms from a political outsider who will always put Oregon first.”

McQuisten says, “We have four decades of leftist destruction to reverse. Oregon is upside down in every area due to failed management and infringement on our freedoms. Whether the issue is stopping this culture of crime that has been deliberately created here, or handing the power back to parents when it comes to our kids’ educations, I look forward to bringing back the Oregon we all once loved.”

McQuisten has also been enthusiastically endorsed by Steve Yates, President of Radio Free Asia under the Trump administration; President Trump’s first lady of election integrity, Dr. Kelli Ward, who serves as Chair of the Arizona Republican Party; former Oregon State Representative Greg Barreto; Utah State Rep. Ken Ivory who founded the American Lands Council; dozens of businesses around the state; and hundreds of individuals and elected officials from all corners of Oregon. She received gubernatorial endorsements from the Eastern Oregon Mining Association, Oregonians for Medical Freedom, and Restore Oregon NOW.

If elected, McQuisten, who is the mayor of Baker City, a seventh generation Oregonian, and a business owner, would become Oregon’s first female Republican governor, and the first governor from eastern Oregon since the 1950s. She would also be Oregon’s first Republican governor in four decades.
Additional information can be found at the candidate’s web site: www.KerryMcQuisten.com.

**I am a fierce defender of the First Amendment and am overjoyed that Mr. Musk is taking over Twitter._Do you know why?_ Because he gets it. **
Until now, Twitter was run by my hostile friends, the Wokers. You know Wokers - the crank wing of the Far Left.

I think the reason they are so upset is that there is no longer a place to hide when it comes to censoring Conservative voices. Mr. Musk isn't fighting for something extraordinary - he just believes in free speech. **There's a new sheriff in town; go fill out a hurt feelings report and get over it.**

As I gear up to get into the nitty-gritty of my Senate Re-election campaign, it has never been more important for you to support protected free speech.

**I have always fought for the rights of ALL Americans, no matter if we agree on the matter at hand or not. And that is why I am running for re-election: to keep doing just that.

subject: I’ll always be a vote for choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress P
body:
But we can’t take our progress for granted

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45046233/344220358/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDY0ZDBiOS0zM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDmnU44KypimLSvq0stbR5nT_1nuwrF9pz1jdV0RtLo=)
---
Hi, I wanted to share some astonishing news with you: | “If _Roe_ falls, Illinois abortion providers plan for influx of up to **_30,000 more patients_** traveling here each year”
-Chicago Tribune
---
With reproductive freedom under attack in much of the country, Illinois remains a safe haven state for access to reproductive health care. I’m proud of the steps Illinois has taken to make abortion affordable and accessible, _but we can’t take this progress for granted._

Last year, the five Republicans in the Illinois congressional delegation signed on to a legal brief asking the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade._

**And just this past week, we saw that this could soon be a terrifying reality.**

I’m running for Congress to serve as the steadfast advocate IL-13 needs for the right to choose, so that _all_ people, in Illinois and around the country, are able to access the health care services they need.

clean_body: But we can’t take our progress for granted | = Hi, I wanted to share some astonishing news with you: | “If Roe falls, Illinois abortion providers plan for influx of up to 30,000 more patients traveling here each year” -Chicago Tribune With reproductive freedom under attack in much of the country, Illinois remains a safe haven state for access to reproductive health care. I’m proud of the steps Illinois has taken to make abortion affordable and accessible, but we can’t take this progress for granted. Last year, the five Republicans in the Illinois congressional delegation signed on to a legal brief asking the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. And just this past week, we saw that this could soon be a terrifying reality. I’m running for Congress to serve as the steadfast advocate IL-13 needs for the right to choose, so that all people, in Illinois and around the country, are able to access the health care services they need. = GOAL: $6,000 || DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for your support, Nikki Nikki Budzinski Democratic Candidate for Congress, IL-13 | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Did you see our TV ad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, this is a
big moment for us.

We’re officially live with our FIRST TV ad. We want to make sure as many
voters as possible hear about Charles’ message for bold, progressive
change before our primary election on May 17th, so we launched our first
TV ad buy.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220507?refcode=em20220507-1890&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1890_346206_QrmB9C&akid=1890%2E346206%2EQrmB9C ][IMG]

To be honest with you, running TV ads for the next 10 days is a huge cost
for our campaign. But we know that running TV ads is an important part of
our strategy to reach out to Kentuckians from the hood to the holler.

That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $10,000 today for our TV ad
campaign. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220507?refcode=em20220507-1890&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1890_346206_QrmB9C&akid=1890%2E346206%2EQrmB9C ]Will you chip in $10 or anything you can to help us run our
TV ads leading up to the primary election?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220507?refcode=em20220507-1890&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1890_346206_QrmB9C&akid=1890%2E346206%2EQrmB9C ]Chip in $10 →

Our volunteer team has done tremendous work texting and calling voters,
making sure folks have the resources they need to cast their ballots, and
sharing Charles’ big vision for Kentucky.

This kind of grassroots outreach is the reason why we’ve been able to
build our historic movement to replace Rand Paul.

But now with just 10 days until the primary, it’s urgent we crank up the
heat and double down on our efforts to reach out to voters.

That’s why we’re rushing to invest as much money as we can into our TV ad
buys. We know there’s still voters who don’t know who Charles, but would
strongly resonate with his people-first message.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220507?refcode=em20220507-1890&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1890_346206_QrmB9C&akid=1890%2E346206%2EQrmB9C ]Please help us raise at least $10,000 today so we can raise the funds

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, this is a big moment for us. We’re officially live with our FIRST TV ad. We want to make sure as many voters as possible hear about Charles’ message for bold, progressive change before our primary election on May 17th, so we launched our first TV ad buy. [ ][IMG] To be honest with you, running TV ads for the next 10 days is a huge cost for our campaign. But we know that running TV ads is an important part of our strategy to reach out to Kentuckians from the hood to the holler. That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $10,000 today for our TV ad campaign. [ ]Will you chip in $10 or anything you can to help us run our TV ads leading up to the primary election? [ ]Chip in $10 → Our volunteer team has done tremendous work texting and calling voters, making sure folks have the resources they need to cast their ballots, and sharing Charles’ big vision for Kentucky. This kind of grassroots outreach is the reason why we’ve been able to build our historic movement to replace Rand Paul. But now with just 10 days until the primary, it’s urgent we crank up the heat and double down on our efforts to reach out to voters. That’s why we’re rushing to invest as much money as we can into our TV ad buys. We know there’s still voters who don’t know who Charles, but would strongly resonate with his people-first message. body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
I'm committed to fighting for workers' rights, clean energy investments, affordable housing, and reproductive freedom in the Assembly — and I have the experience to back it up.
THAT'S what AD-80 voters will be voting for when they mark my name on the ballot.
My opponent, on the other hand, stands for special interests and Big Oil. That's what the Republican party likes to see — which is why they're now backing him with thousands of dollars of campaign spending.
Election Day is officially ONE MONTH AWAY — and ballots will be hitting mailboxes within the next week. We need to make sure that AD-80 voters know what they're deciding between in this election. Will you help us reach voters by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_050722_OneMonth]
I really appreciate you!
-- Georgette

A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us.
Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race.

name: Cecile Richards
subject: What we do next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
The only way to fight back is getting serious about power.
#
Many of us knew this day was coming. But like people all throughout America, I still woke up Tuesday morning struggling to comprehend the dangerous news that the Supreme Court is poised to strike down _Roe v. Wade._
Access to safe, legal abortion has changed everything for women in America. The ability to finish school, plan a family, pursue a career, support your children. Now, all of those freedoms are in peril.
In Texas, women have already had to leave the state to receive reproductive care thanks to Greg Abbott’s extreme six-week abortion ban. Now, nearby states like Mississippi and Oklahoma are poised to ban abortion outright, and Texans are going to have no place to go.
To be honest, these thoughts overwhelmed me as soon as I woke up Tuesday. **Then my phone rang.** It was Beto, one of the first people to call me about the news.
I was immediately struck by how much Beto cares about what’s happening to people in Texas and across the country. He cares about those who are being affected by this painful news.
We talked about Justice Alito’s draft opinion, which is full of callous disregard for pregnant people and for women. Then we talked about how it’s a mirror reflection of what we’re seeing in Texas from Greg Abbott and other Republican leaders.
Greg Abbott is so craven that he’s willing to trade off the future of generations of women for his own political purposes. They’re cynically using this issue to drive a divide between people in Texas. It’s not about life. It’s about power.
**Beto and I agree: The only way to fight back is by getting serious about power, too.**
As difficult as this moment is, we have the opportunity to channel the anger we feel into real action. Gaining political power is the only way to meet this challenge — and if the Supreme Court is going to leave it up to the states to decide who’s in control over a woman’s body, we MUST come together and elect a governor in Texas who believes in a woman’s right to choose.
[**Please contribute $3 or more right now to help elect Beto and defeat anti-choice Greg Abbott in November. Every donation brings us one step closer to a governor who will protect reproductive rights no matter what.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220507-1?refcode=ema20220507-188047&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=188047_444211_iLtuQ-&akid=188047%2E444211%2EiLtuQ-)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220507-1?refcode=ema20220507-188047&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=188047_444211_iLtuQ-&akid=188047%2E444211%2EiLtuQ-)**
I’ll end with this. I’ve been a Texan all my life — and sometimes people from other states will question if things can ever really change for this state.
When I look at what we’re doing together with Beto’s campaign, _I know they can_.
Future generations are counting on us. Let’s do this.
—Cecile
Cecile Richards
National Finance Chair, Beto for Texas
Former President of Planned Parenthood

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220507-188047-footer&t=21&refcode2=188047_444211_iLtuQ-&akid=188047%2E444211%2EiLtuQ-)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=22&akid=188047%2E444211%2EiLtuQ-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=188047%2E444211%2EiLtuQ-)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

clean_body: Wanted to shoot you a quick weekend message to talk about our fundraising. | | | Hey Peter, I wanted to shoot you a quick weekend message to talk about our fundraising. The truth is, we’re only going to be able to run this campaign against a multi-millionaire Republican who’s backed by corporate PACs with your help. As we figure out our budget for ads, organizing, events, staff, and so much more this summer, we really depend on grassroots supporters giving whatever they can. That’s why I wanted to reach out and ask: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: On Odessa’s Finance Team, we’re all about figuring out the best way to allocate our resources and we appreciate every single donation right now. It will be tough to campaign against Mark Green as he takes money from defense contractors, corporate PACs, and pro-insurrection politicians like Jim Jordan. The only way we can compete is if our grassroots supporters step up RIGHT NOW and help us out. Thank you SO much for your support of our campaign. Aarica Finance Team, Odessa for Congress | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Conservative veterans stick together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
As the only combat veteran in my primary race, I knew I could call on other conservative warriors to help finish this mission alongside me. [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=978e2c843bc141a1bf980fbf992b378d&_e=Gh7LgKFX71GBBrgcq9O-4x88s03TWCZWQKYwsoVOpVw4Fnurt-E1GfU2yex0e1DQjdcgje8VCr6vxgl2NMoG-dmRSZPVUlBaq9ThJhW9rDlZiUkJKsv5dNRC_7MsCPOwrN03_zpy1wpi4mG8U6PiBfjOjBiBP0uRi9bKSOgex_OOzNeBqddzTFm8r71MQo4O2kNy_8GPo4Mk_9qPC-E4CPJ-qOyGHUNW_jIRwF48yhGFeRhU9TPl4aAMVkooo2U3KRkzqn5iXd_o-lXBGGZuTFnHntN26ZKUBSsactbrPLFdWONyB6oMkZmBK6mZ9NgWvxuErLOU5vpl9R_JhNCGKstdXyTY9UqZrKvwfkHGtVRnHuv0dR-vGXTwFaa0jiGSDvNuwXVguEHNt8uvNyEPJi9UtiqTFR-XK42g5dCfHek%3D) Peter, As the only combat veteran in my primary race, I knew I could call on other conservative warriors to help finish this mission alongside me.

**That’s why I’m proud to work with fellow conservative veterans Jeremy Hunt and Pat Harrigan on the America First Veterans Initiative.**
[](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=978e2c843bc141a1bf980fbf992b378d&_e=Gh7LgKFX71GBBrgcq9O-4x88s03TWCZWQKYwsoVOpVw4Fnurt-E1GfU2yex0e1DQjdcgje8VCr6vxgl2NMoG-dmRSZPVUlBaq9ThJhW9rDlZiUkJKsv5dNRC_7MsCPOwrN03_zpy1wpi4mG8U6PiBfjOjBiBP0uRi9bKSOgex_OOzNeBqddzTFm8r71MQo4O2kNy_8GPo4Mk_9qPC-E4CJ-ApRhnacI1Vwjr_pEIQoEKzlS-IW_gupvNdOx_KRzQiu9kkQ1YKHnc_NMMxTyB22rOT0-HoN2FBX_tff1bfqDXSD7DmULK6FyiCPlWeftKwF-vE0JLNes-tFMy7sZ3z7MOnYom5YhlvWK91WjnrMZY4cbfyHrK5YkRCtjkfc9P6cYrdpQL4at1IKuvpN5hNznaCVxvQ22LyGLLIyKIsPg%3D) We risked our lives to defend our democracy abroad, and we won’t give up on America just because we’ve hung up our uniforms.

clean_body: As the only combat veteran in my primary race, I knew I could call on other conservative warriors to help finish this mission alongside me. Peter, As the only combat veteran in my primary race, I knew I could call on other conservative warriors to help finish this mission alongside me. That’s why I’m proud to work with fellow conservative veterans Jeremy Hunt and Pat Harrigan on the America First Veterans Initiative. We risked our lives to defend our democracy abroad, and we won’t give up on America just because we’ve hung up our uniforms. Now, we’re recruiting other freedom-loving Americans to our team, and we want YOU in the fight to take back the House alongside us. Conservative veterans are the KEY to taking back the House, and this mission needs YOU to succeed. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) | | 🇺🇸 COUNTDOWN TO PRIMARY 🇺🇸 Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Herschel Walker
subject: There isn't much time left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Georgians started casting their ballots May 2, and we need your help.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6i2c4bj8j5476net9gc8i4f25ke9gsjbipku708_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uor38ojheljm8c9j6ph30ohlcjgrcp5hclj7fc5jegqb4opleirr8spn68o7ac37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmipm9o3i61j38p5jckrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5chieao30chjm49fg)

| | | Friend,

There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Georgians started casting their ballots on May 2, and we need your help.

To defeat Senator Raphael Warnock in November, I must win the Republican primary that's rapidly approaching.

If Senator Warnock wins again, there will be dire consequences for our country. Not only will we be re-electing a Democrat who has supported the disastrous Biden agenda nearly 100% of the time during his first term, we'll be risking our chance of taking back the Senate majority.

_**[If you have anything to spare, we're asking you to step up today to help us win in Georgia and reclaim the conservative majority in the Senate.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1bb6tn6ac7bp6dr0gg264nvkoee6cr9fh59oio0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjim0o34cth2bs)**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1v5iugkljnvu41471sdk5afaa0ob2at9g8jgu90_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjim0o34cth2bs)
---

All eyes are on Georgia. We cannot afford to let the Democrats win the Peach State again.

**We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls show us slightly ahead of Senator Warnock!**

That's why Democrats are rushing in millions of dollars to fuel my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, he raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION!

If we can gather the resources, we can defeat Senator Warnock and flip the Senate.

**Will you help us win the Republican primary that 's quickly approaching and defeat our Democrat opponent in November?** Every single dollar you give will impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, signs we can distribute, and voters we can reach.

_**[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $3.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnuapej4jpm1ge4btevrdv5488ht2hhtsembb78_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cjim0o34cth2bs)**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

To victory,

Herschel Walker

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: clown car
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
All jokes aside, this is serious.
#
Derek,
The GOP clown car was in Pennsylvania last night. 🤡
Yep, **Donald Trump** hosted a rally for **Dr. Oz** , but Ohio GOP Senate candidate **JD Vance** and My Pillow Guy **Mike Lindell** joined them.
All jokes aside, this is serious. We just saw in Ohio how Trump’s support can supercharge a Senate campaign with JD Vance.
Trump, Dr. Oz, Vance, + Lindell all sharing a stage last night is going to mean a MASSIVE wave of donations, support, and momentum in the press for Oz from across the country.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220507-2?refcode=em20220507-5697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5697_434096_3sitmz&akid=5697%2E434096%2E3sitmz)
We can’t afford to lose _any_ momentum this close to the primary, especially not to a bunch of self-funding millionaires (who are notably not from PA) hanging out together.
[**Will you rush a donation of any amount to help us meet our $100,000 emergency goal? We need a massive showing of grassroot support as soon as possible to overpower Trump’s involvement in this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220507-2?refcode=em20220507-5697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5697_434096_3sitmz&akid=5697%2E434096%2E3sitmz)

Thank you for your support, Derek.
—Team Fetterman

All jokes aside, this is serious. We just saw in Ohio how Trump’s support can supercharge a Senate campaign with JD Vance. subject: A super PAC is spreading lies about Cora
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
A shady Super PAC funding our opponent is running attack ads against Cora. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45047141/344224928/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlhOTBjNS0zYmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFJM-WuOiBkY8Zl6BEoUzYc54kRW3qQweFxEZNrQbUY=) I have some concerning news, team. **Earlier this week, we got word that a shady super PAC supporting one of our opponents has launched TV attack ads against Cora. ** These attacks are being propped up by a near six-figure expenditure, and are running on televisions across Montana. Needless to say, they’re filled with false claims about Cora -- **not to mention the ads were being run unethically and are ignoring federal transparency requirements.** It’s unfortunate that one of our opponents would resort to nasty attacks -- especially in today’s already hyper-partisan environment. It’s clear they’re intimidated by the strength of grassroots movement. Frankly, it’s a desperate attempt to buy this seat with special interest money. **[We’re running positive TV ads to share our message about who Cora is and what she will work to accomplish in Congress. Will you help us counter these super PAC attacks by chipping in $3 to expand our ad to our TV budget?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45047142/344224929/-10092236?refcode=em-5.7.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlhOTBjNS0zYmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFJM-WuOiBkY8Zl6BEoUzYc54kRW3qQweFxEZNrQbUY=)** | **[Chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45047143/344224930/-10092236?refcode=em-5.7.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlhOTBjNS0zYmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFJM-WuOiBkY8Zl6BEoUzYc54kRW3qQweFxEZNrQbUY=)**
---
For our part, we’re sticking to running a positive campaign about Cora’s vision for the future of Montana. We’re focused on local issues: jobs, the economic well-being of working families, public lands, housing, health care, and more.
These types of attacks represent everything that’s wrong with Washington; more division, more lies, and less time focused on the issues that actually matter. Smearing Cora isn’t helping anyone but Ryan Zinke.
[**Your donation today will help us fend off these attacks and set the record straight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45047144/344224931/-10092236?refcode=em-5.7.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlhOTBjNS0zYmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFJM-WuOiBkY8Zl6BEoUzYc54kRW3qQweFxEZNrQbUY=)

name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Work for equity, equality, justice at the PCRG Community Development Summit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

With the pressing threats to our democracy and our rights, now is the time to come together, plan, and organize in our communities. That’s why we’re sharing an opportunity to do just that.

Sign up for the [https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.pcrgsummit.org_&d=DwMFaQ&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=XsZnG1pG3cn-u_vTtue7-zAyBy5WDSBlPqjy_XNOKwc&m=UUy2LW1ATRBBMaNAExRrOkXlv83DE5TlhVQz0BQBynk&s=6PACjPsB4KxY38JRyaNgjYR7eqZU0ooOGxESyGAHnRo&e=] PCRG Community Development Summit [https://www.pcrg.org/summit] today, or share this event with friends and family who want to be more involved in building the world we want to live in.

The event is led by our close partner, Pittsburgh Community Reinvestment Group (PCRG), and features a keynote address by senior management from one of our principal statewide partners, Deborah Archer, President of the American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU).

The PCRG Community Development Summit expands collaboration and capacity in the region's community development and community-based organizations and continues its focus this year on Equity, Equality, and Justice within the community development sector. As you know, there is a critical connection between community-based organizing and civic participation. And we need you to help us mobilize our communities. Sign up today!

REGISTER HERE. [https://12th-annual-community-development-summit.heysummit.com/checkout/select-tickets/]

See you there!

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

Peter, if we can’t win in critical battleground districts like this one, then we’ll lose our fragile House Majority. **A Republican‐controlled House would spell DISASTER for our democracy!**

And the MAGA GOP is eyeing this battleground seat — _it’s time we PROVE that when they take us on, they’ll lose._

body:
We have now completed getting out all of our envelopes thanks to all of you. With just over a week until the election, we still have plenty to do! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/volunteer57?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| | Hi team,

We have now completed getting out all of our envelopes thanks to all of you. With just over a week until the election, we still have plenty to do!

Two main asks today:

1\. Today from 2-5pm we'll be putting together a new shipment of our small yard signs at the office - 9066 Perry Hwy, Pittsburgh, PA 15237 - and we'd love for you to drop by!

2\. We are looking for poll-greeters to hand out literature to voters on Election Day, Tuesday May 17th. You can either help at your own polling location or reach out to me and I can let you know a strategic location to go to.

We also have some upcoming events I put below. Hopefully see you soon!

Thanks again,
Trevor Naglieri
Campaign Manager
(508) 826-5135

Friend,

Joe Biden’s done one thing really well since taking office: **_Completely ignore the national security crisis that’s taking place at our Southern Border._**
| [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT TO SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNkctugzAQRb8GdiCwTaALFpWq7NJtl5axJ-DGL41No_x9TR7Nrq3khXVm7tx5qFFJJVpZ6pE0hDRd07dd13ashp4xCqSXbBgmILJgjTCAqUYI62S0FC6JeDp6lFBLb8tlZGxgza4Vsj0Cm1T3Mg20p7R9oTs1tMDKjwM_CG20m9-FhRHTkWPkScz8BM6BulTRr2kBdLyr-ooQTkozLimFWNDXguzziyBXhPqsHYLajDO7q_PvPgT9KTR5VIBKRxETYBWCTFsdurfewYUHA2qGgr4lXKEgO9yqY27wiSz3IWn3BGuy3ILSq80M4SsuAh882-Z9ZH4zurLsu2V--sU9xjSiiuDucSlsEHreHP5o_yHwLoFLz_z-t3GrvOYKbN57lgvr15uyK3FU4ayN0XHX5-vOW8r1kulfl_kGoj_CwA)

name: Katie Britt for Alabama
subject: For AL County Captains: Britt News Blast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** **ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Mobile Mayor Sandy Stimpson** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=1c25fb532bf24a04ae574a78529ae734&_e=vgCOdIj8gfgfpEbdxk8RibdGuqFhV-CL3TpUBMnsNVHMWsIUSlUQ0ooG7qqQXDYvsc0Koq9I_rtcsHlBHVOq9vD5VuMD9UeQCf_YZLTdBaBs5S44iecmdYF5nUqTJad9b1oXTbUkrJTG71bQPTbPW0NGtB3RNpRNoR7orwoR-Z62G7JmIoAcdwOWjA65u4CVRV4LS1Bu8MozKJto97qRRg9D1ldOO5GXjNq92aUiRTOQg82F7BFlLOrPQ8BAivQvJhGLEeKxBMw6RLYL7RlAbid4p3kmEtyqj4Jg7-hNd1I%3D) I am thrilled to have Mayor Sandy Stimpson’s endorsement! Local leaders across our state know their respective communities best, and I’ll always have an open door and be their partner in tackling challenges and opportunities facing their areas. As Alabama’s next U.S. Senator, I’ll fight to grow 21st century opportunity and good-paying jobs for hardworking Alabamians in every corner of our great state. Together, we will preserve the American Dream and build strong, safe communities for our children and our children’s children. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Mobile Mayor Sandy Stimpson I am thrilled to have Mayor Sandy Stimpson’s endorsement! Local leaders across our state know their respective communities best, and I’ll always have an open door and be their partner in tackling challenges and opportunities facing their areas. As Alabama’s next U.S. Senator, I’ll fight to grow 21st century opportunity and good-paying jobs for hardworking Alabamians in every corner of our great state. Together, we will preserve the American Dream and build strong, safe communities for our children and our children’s children. **Katie Opposes Biden on Iran Terrorist Delisting The Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps is a terrorist organization with blood on its hands. Joe Biden’s plan to remove their terrorist designation and lift sanctions on Iran is a threat to our national security. All-America Football Star Siran Stacy Endorses Katie Britt - In the U.S. Senate, I will always fight for our religious liberties and defend our Christian conservative values. Together, we will save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children! Katie Observes Teacher Appreciation Week 2022 Thank you to the incredible teachers across Alabama who dedicate themselves to ensuring our state’s students reach their full potential! Katie Responds to SCOTUS Leak Whoever leaked the draft Supreme Court decision should be prosecuted. This is an attempt to intimidate, and it’s an attack on the institution of the Court. I’m praying that the justices stay safe and strong and finally allow us to protect unborn life. Katie Observes National Day of Prayer On this , we hope you’ll join us in praying for our leaders and the future of our communities, our state, and the country we know and love. Colossians 2:6-7 Show Your Support! With only 18 days left, it’s time to show your support and help remind family and friends to get out the vote on May 24! Let everyone know that you’re on Team Britt today by changing your cover photo to the picture above. Our grassroots momentum is growing every day! Together, we’ll win for Alabama Now you can show your support for our #1 Alabama first candidate without even leaving your home! Grab yourself a 3x5 Katie Britt flag NOW and start flying it with your American flag. Get yours today before they sell out: . name: Team Schmidt
subject: Derek Schmidt is ready to win in November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
As election day draws closer, Derek has been overwhelmed by the constant outpouring of support he’s received across every corner of our great state. H Friend, As election day draws closer, Derek has been **overwhelmed** by the constant _outpouring_ of support he’s received across every corner of our great state. He has the endorsements, the support, and the **momentum** needed to DEFEAT Laura Kelly and **KEEP KANSAS RED.** Kansans know that in order to defend their values and grow our economy we NEED strong, Republican leadership in the Governor’s office. **Friend, that’s exactly what Derek intends to do.**
See the impressive list of new endorsements Derek has earned 👇 down below 👇, and join them today to support Derek Schmidt for Governor! [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3787e447f6564c1caf38864189106da9&_e=HSpjj3J61ASait4x31ykZ_fUAf6biJLs6zD3fvC9HmySPTvMoeqvrpni1ZwUQ9uBgj37Euox3ijTO2RNLDj2Q6VP9tCl4NahQjHUcsR3SCODHG1JlWlOMx4__WXmM56iVj1HDuZbRI0V7SWwXJeB-QYR9ltfmdSgxATJA2AAaqqqiybGUPaE3fCnxFcVXVCP5je_sFvteDwOwHplNhTRcJ5RgPZOS8_erXOIv85yU7o7yZzjRQywAU8TfGahzDLrI7ksBLa3HUlOopwwrKpMtgTRybYvxjQozIefaWLCmRuaDYz6VgfMI_o8cR3d_jTikKLaE9m6FqCYyVnQMqwHvQ2KDACO8s5jnNxyyvzwbJm59tEeXo14LIs7_tbvHY0Ct3eEqerZTaXH3lAM1Ks4W_gwGS-L98kR2D0wpo1qeMnbDvaAco9iYzIieJTLdXEzwLY5O8erxcKpj4kL1660FsI4SWwBfTik40Uuw5yGqFg%3D) _“I am happy to endorse Derek Schmidt for Kansas Governor. I served many years with Derek including when he was Majority Leader of the Senate. Derek was fair to everyone in allowing debate and management of the Senate calendar. I have been pleased lately as Derek has joined in lawsuits regarding protecting the U.S. southern border and restricting government overreach into our lives.”_ **Former State Senator and Secretary of Revenue Nick Jordan** _
__“Kansas needs Derek Schmidt in the Governor’s office. He has earned strong support across our state over the years for always defending our Kansas values as Attorney General. He’s fought for our constitutional rights when federal administrations have overreached and he has been a defender of agriculture when Washington has been crushing farmers and ranchers with bad policies and regulations. He will be a great governor and I encourage all Kansans to vote for him in November.”_ **Former State Senator Mark Taddiken** _“Derek Schmidt is a great friend of law enforcement. He's always had our back as Attorney General and he will make sure we are trusted and respected and have the resources we need to keep Kansas safe when he is governor. As a native of Southeast Kansas himself, he'll always keep our needs at the top of his mind when considering new ideas and policies. He will be a great governor for all Kansans, and he has my support in November.”_ **Allen County Sheriff Bryan J. Murphy** _"The Wichita County Republican Committee announces an endorsement of Attorney General Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. Derek has a strong track record of fighting for individual liberty, putting the interest of Kansas families first. He shares our values and priorities as a native son of rural Kansas. It is our recommendation that every Kansan join us in supporting Derek Schmidt for Governor."_ **Wichita County GOP** _"__Derek Schmidt is the person we need to lead our state out of the division and partisanship fostered under our current governor these last few years and into a focused path towards prosperity for all Kansans. Derek has a record of fighting for Kansas families, schools, and small businesses and he will serve all of us well as our next governor.__"_ **Former State Senator Julia Lynn** _"__The Crawford County Republican Party Central Committee is proud to announce we have endorsed Derek Schmidt in his run for Governor of Kansas. Laura Kelly has failed our state time and again. She has no meaningful accomplishments to show for her term as governor and has a record of destroying jobs, closing small businesses, restricting liberty, and losing taxpayer dollars. She’s vetoed bills to preserve fairness in women’s sports, protect the role of parents in education, and numerous bills to cut taxes. She puts the left wing of the Democrat Party first, always. Derek Schmidt is a proven leader who always puts the needs of Kansans first. He will work to advance a commonsense conservative agenda, not block it. He will always have our backs when Joe Biden tramples on our liberty. Instead of growing government, he’ll get it out of the way so our business and farms can grow and prosper. For these reasons, Attorney General Schmidt will make a great Governor. He has our full support and we encourage all voters to join us in electing him this November.__"_ **Crawford County Republican Party** We sincerely appreciate all of the support and hope you will join us as we fight to make Derek Schmidt the next governor of the great state of Kansas. –Team Schmidt | |
---

clean_body: As election day draws closer, Derek has been overwhelmed by the constant outpouring of support he’s received across every corner of our great state. H Friend, As election day draws closer, Derek has been overwhelmed by the constant outpouring of support he’s received across every corner of our great state. He has the endorsements, the support, and the momentum needed to DEFEAT Laura Kelly and KEEP KANSAS RED. Kansans know that in order to defend their values and grow our economy we NEED strong, Republican leadership in the Governor’s office. Friend, that’s exactly what Derek intends to do. See the impressive list of new endorsements Derek has earned 👇 down below 👇, and join them today to support Derek Schmidt for Governor! “I am happy to endorse Derek Schmidt for Kansas Governor. I served many years with Derek including when he was Majority Leader of the Senate. Derek was fair to everyone in allowing debate and management of the Senate calendar. I have been pleased lately as Derek has joined in lawsuits regarding protecting the U.S. southern border and restricting government overreach into our lives.” Former State Senator and Secretary of Revenue Nick Jordan “Kansas needs Derek Schmidt in the Governor’s office. He has earned strong support across our state over the years for always defending our Kansas values as Attorney General. He’s fought for our constitutional rights when federal administrations have overreached and he has been a defender of agriculture when Washington has been crushing farmers and ranchers with bad policies and regulations. He will be a great governor and I encourage all Kansans to vote for him in November.” Former State Senator Mark Taddiken “Derek Schmidt is a great friend of law enforcement. He's always had our back as Attorney General and he will make sure we are trusted and respected and have the resources we need to keep Kansas safe when he is governor. As a native of Southeast Kansas himself, he'll always keep our needs at the top of his mind when considering new ideas and policies. He will be a great governor for all Kansans, and he has my support in November.” Allen County Sheriff Bryan J. Murphy "The Wichita County Republican Committee announces an endorsement of Attorney General Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. Derek has a strong track record of fighting for individual liberty, putting the interest of Kansas families first. He shares our values and priorities as a native son of rural Kansas. It is our recommendation that every Kansan join us in supporting Derek Schmidt for Governor." Wichita County GOP "Derek Schmidt is the person we need to lead our state out of the division and partisanship fostered under our current governor these last few years and into a focused path towards prosperity for all Kansans. Derek has a record of fighting for Kansas families, schools, and small businesses and he will serve all of us well as our next governor." Former State Senator Julia Lynn "The Crawford County Republican Party Central Committee is proud to announce we have endorsed Derek Schmidt in his run for Governor of Kansas. Laura Kelly has failed our state time and again. She has no meaningful accomplishments to show for her term as governor and has a record of destroying jobs, closing small businesses, restricting liberty, and losing taxpayer dollars. She’s vetoed bills to preserve fairness in women’s sports, protect the role of parents in education, and numerous bills to cut taxes. She puts the left wing of the Democrat Party first, always. Derek Schmidt is a proven leader who always puts the needs of Kansans first. He will work to advance a commonsense conservative agenda, not block it. He will always have our backs when Joe Biden tramples on our liberty. Instead of growing government, he’ll get it out of the way so our business and farms can grow and prosper. For these reasons, Attorney General Schmidt will make a great Governor. He has our full support and we encourage all voters to join us in electing him this November." Crawford County Republican Party We sincerely appreciate all of the support and hope you will join us as we fight to make Derek Schmidt the next governor of the great state of Kansas. –Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

subject: Codify Roe Now!
body:
My pledge to defend and expand reproductive rights | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/73d0fecd8918/codify-roe-now?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | Friends,
In light of the recent threats to Roe V.Wade it is more important than ever that those in leadership and decision making positions are committed to defending and expanding reproductive justice. Reproductive justice is essential for the health and well being of all individuals. I will work hard against any federal, state, or local rollbacks or restrictions that impede on the ability of individuals to access quality reproductive healthcare services such as birth control, or medically accurate sexuality education. I believe in Medicare for All that provides open access to safe and legal abortion, birth control, and family planning services. Reproductive Justice also means access to adequate, affordable pre- and post-natal care, for all people, regardless of their income, location, or background. When elected I will urge Congress to **Terminate the Filibuster** and **Expand the Supreme Court** under Biden's administration as a means to codify reproductive rights under Federal Law.

_Neal Walia_
Candidate for Congress

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Will you volunteer to elect Erica Smith?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
With 10 days until the primary election, we’re using our people-power to talk to as many voters as possible in North Carolina’s 1st District.
#
With 10 days until the primary election, we’re using our people-power to organize across North Carolina’s 1st District.
Right now, we need more volunteers to help us connect with voters to tell them about Erica, her policies, and why we need a rural, pro-choice champion in Congress.
[**Can you sign up for an upcoming phone banking shift now? We'll provide everything you'll need to get started!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52520?t=1&akid=1162%2E3698%2EsoE6a5)
**[Sign up](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52521?utm_source=em20220507%3Frefcode%3Dem20220507-1162&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1162%2E3698%2EsoE6a5)**
This is a crucial swing district and a must-win race for Democrats to defend reproductive rights and our Democratic House majority — but we can’t do it without your help.
To have the greatest impact and reach as many voters as we can in the time we have left before Election Day, it’s critical that we have as many people making calls as possible.
[**Please sign up to make calls for Erica.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/52520?t=3&akid=1162%2E3698%2EsoE6a5)
Let’s do this,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220507-1162-footer&t=4&refcode2=1162_3698_soE6a5&akid=1162%2E3698%2EsoE6a5)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

# Golf Scramble Fundraiser
Ed Thelander **will win** Maine’s District 1 for Congress in November, but will Ed win a Golf Scramble in June?_**Play at Old Marsh Country Club June 20th!**__**You won’t want to miss this match folks!**_ Format: 4-person Scramble, Gross, and Net scoringThis is an 18-Hole scramble, starting at 9:00am with a shotgun start.You may create your own team or allow the Thelander for Congress staff topair you to create a 4-person team.Please provide your handicap. Maximum handicap for men is 20, maximumhandicap for women is 30.Not a golfer? Join us for lunch! subject: 🚨 Sheriff Jenkins Endorses Matthew Chappell 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt for VA
body:
I just got of the phone with Sheriff Scott Jenkins | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/73ae99c8b368/2022-rpv-advance-16092380?e=9ee2863374)
---
| |
---
| |
# _Endorsement Alert_
---
| Friends,

I just got off the phone with Sheriff Scott Jenkins. He called to support me and encourage you to come out and vote for our grassroots-driven campaign today!
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
# _VOTE TODAY BEFORE 4 PM_

Show up TODAY and vote for our grassroots campaign - we can't take back the 11th District without your support.
The **Canvass **to elect the Republican nominee for Congress for the 11th Congressional District, voting will be open from **9:00 AM – 4:00 PM**.
_Who can vote on the congressional nominee?_ Any registered voter in Fairfax County who lives in the 11th District.
_Voters must bring a photo ID. No fee to vote. Voters will use ranked choice voting. For more details, please click_ [**HERE**](https://chappellforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2bbb67d628f97b4388ee28de&id=41390220ff&e=9ee2863374).
---
|
Thank you again for all the support we've received to date. I look forward to working with all of you to defeat Gerry Connolly in November!

Onward,

Matthew Chappell
---
|

| | Peter, The election is only ten days away. I am energized and grateful for the many grassroots supporters who stand with me. name: Devon Davenport, Team Schrier
subject: It's never been more important to elect pro-choice leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
After the news broke that the Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade, Kim reaffirmed her commitment to defending reproductive rights in Congress. Her Republican opponents, on the other hand, have been silent. We think we know why: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45043513/344208467/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWE2ZDYyOS0yN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YiBjyJWCX_XWUEvh7IRq4VleO_Yx8LRmSvP9y5tI_X8=&emci=f3b7f407-4acd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=75a6d629-27ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

After the news broke that the Supreme Court is poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , Kim reaffirmed her commitment to defending reproductive rights in Congress. Her Republican opponents, on the other hand, have been silent. We think we know why:

Kim's Republican opponents know that their party's extreme position on abortion is deeply unpopular in the district and around the country. A _Gallup_ poll found that approximately 80% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal. They're staying silent in the hopes that Washingtonians will overlook their party's extreme and dangerous position on reproductive rights.

The Republicans’ position on abortion isn't just a threat to red states – members of the Congressional GOP have called for federal bans that would make abortion illegal nationwide -- without exception. **That's why, more than ever, we need leaders in Congress who will defend the rights of Americans to make their own reproductive decisions.**

As the only pro-choice, woman doctor in Congress, Kim will always fight back against these attacks on safe, legal abortion and ensure deeply personal medical decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only.

clean_body: After the news broke that the Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade, Kim reaffirmed her commitment to defending reproductive rights in Congress. Her Republican opponents, on the other hand, have been silent. We think we know why: Peter, After the news broke that the Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade , Kim reaffirmed her commitment to defending reproductive rights in Congress. Her Republican opponents, on the other hand, have been silent. We think we know why: Kim's Republican opponents know that their party's extreme position on abortion is deeply unpopular in the district and around the country. A Gallup poll found that approximately 80% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal. They're staying silent in the hopes that Washingtonians will overlook their party's extreme and dangerous position on reproductive rights. The Republicans’ position on abortion isn't just a threat to red states – members of the Congressional GOP have called for federal bans that would make abortion illegal nationwide -- without exception. That's why, more than ever, we need leaders in Congress who will defend the rights of Americans to make their own reproductive decisions. As the only pro-choice, woman doctor in Congress, Kim will always fight back against these attacks on safe, legal abortion and ensure deeply personal medical decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only. | Thanks, Devon Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. subject: THANK YOU for your activism & support!

body:
See key Alabama primary election dates inside >>>
| | | Hey Peter,

First and foremost, I want to say THANK YOU for your conservative activism and support.

I know you’re frustrated with the direction our nation is headed, and I share your concerns. But I also know that standing united we can save America this November.

**The RED WAVE is growing and we can’t let up!**

Please be sure to make your voice heard in our Alabama primary election this month. Here’s a list of key dates that are coming up fast. Election Day is May 24.

_May 9: Deadline to register to vote_

_May 17: Last day absentee ballot applications can be returned via mail_

_May 19: Last day absentee ballots can be returned by hand_

_May 23: Last day to return absentee ballots by hand to the Absentee Election Manager_

_May 24: All absentee ballots returned by mail by 12 p.m. to the Absentee Election Manager_
Thank you, again, for being part of our fight-to-win grassroots team.

[**Please consider pitching in $5 or $10 to sustain our fight to TAKE BACK THE SENATE.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3cda8e55930c4622/2111d143584b9575c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

\- Coach

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

------------------------------------------------------------
HEADLINES: Nina vs. SuperPACS | New Endorsements! Amy Vilela - Brittany Ramos DeBarros - Summer Lee | Bernie Calls Out Biden | Ro Khanna | NY Health Act | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1011&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day — the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day.

Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.”

Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.

Become a member of Our Revolution, and receive your commemorative MAY DAY STICKER today! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5451?t=1012&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1013&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Join us this Tuesday at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight!

RSVP HERE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=1014&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS

Billionaires and oil barons are lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “Mainstream Democrats PAC” to try to stop progressives from taking power.

Working-class fighters like Nina Turner, Rep. Andy Levin, David Segal, and Jessica Cisneros are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, we have their back, and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the true mainstream positions of the people in this country.

The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races.

Our candidates rely on the power of the movement — campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. Join our Phonebank Force (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=1017&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money.

★ ★ ★

The primaries are heating up, and we have some truly phenomenal candidates on the ballot – organizers, teachers, and diverse working-class fighters – stepping forward to lead with our movement. Become a Movement Builder today to help progressives seize the levers of power from corporate Dems. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_1MO_20220507_1_1&recurring=true?t=1018&refcode2=2883_5885482__a8fME&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1019&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2
THE HOMESTRETCH

Folks, this is not a drill —
This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress!

Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now! So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT!

If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave.

“The energy on the ground is palpable!” Nina told us. “Now is the time to maximize our efforts together.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1020&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 — and the billionaires know it. But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale!”

As Katrina vanden Heuvel wrote in The Washington Post (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5452?t=1021&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) , noting Our Revolution’s support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the soul of the party.”

“Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated.

“Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it — both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree.

NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1022&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1, and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that.

“The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All, and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.”

Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district.

“This work is paying off big time,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a more engaged voter base, and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!”

Healthcare justice advocate Michael Lighty said, “Our Revolution walks the walk and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.”

“They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing — we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country,” Nina said.

This is a new day and a new district — which includes all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points, and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go!

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1023&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs, which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote.

So far, 150 Our Revolution volunteers have made 60k phone calls and sent 40k texts and 330k emails connecting with voters for Nina.

Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night! With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line.

VOLUNTEER FOR NINA (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4901?t=1024&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1025&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

As one of our movement’s fiercest champions for Medicare for All, Our Revolution is honored to endorse Amy Vilela for Congress in Nevada’s 1st District.

Amy served as Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat.

“I am running to represent the working class,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table.”

Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate — she knows the struggle firsthand. Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when tragedy struck in 2015.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1026&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

“The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise — or die trying.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1027&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Electing true allies like Amy is how we change the composition of Congress and make democracy work. Now we need your help to win this crucial race for our movement.

VOLUNTEER FOR AMY (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5437?t=1028&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1029&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Our Revolution and Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network are backing Brittany Ramos DeBarros for Congress in NY-11!

Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community.

“I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible,” Brittany said on our National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1030&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) on Monday.

The Amazon Labor Union drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1031&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story — though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship.

“Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education.”

Medicare for All and a Green New Deal are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said.

In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.”

If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. Click here to get started (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5434?t=1032&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) !

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1033&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

“This race is a huge opportunity,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and we will make history.”

We hope you’ll help Our Revolution ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. Your calls will make a huge impact in this district!

SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5435?t=1034&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1035&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Summer Lee for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District!

Summer worked as a labor organizer with the Fight for $15, organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead voter mobilization efforts to strengthen our democracy.

In 2018, she made history as the first Black woman from Western PA ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of Our Revolution.

“Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office,” Summer said on our National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1036&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) on Monday.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1037&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

“As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside — that’s a powerful movement right there,” she said.

In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy.

“The number one support for lazy incumbency is low voter turnout and voter suppression. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said.

“We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape.”

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1038&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Rep. Lee has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution Pennsylvania. Help us elect progressive allies like Summer to make democracy work for all of us.

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1039&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters like Amy Vilela, Brittany Ramos DeBarros, Summer Lee, and of course Nina Turner! We must replace the enemies of progress in Congress with strong movement partners.

Our Revolution Volunteer Taylor Pinckney told us how good it feels when our efforts pay off. While she was phone banking, a voter a voter mentioned that her call and a mailer from Our Revolution helped him switch from a centrist candidate to Erica Smith for Congress in NC-1.

“He thanked us for opening his eyes that Erica was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor told us. “It was cool to see the impact — when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going.”

If you have just one hour a week, you can make a difference, too! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power!

JOIN THE FORCE! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=1040&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

★ ★ ★

BERNIE ENDORSES NIDA ALLAM

Our Revolution is backing Nida Allam for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th district — and, now it’s official, Bernie is too!

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1041&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

“Nida Allam knows that it takes a true grassroots movement to defeat big money special interests and deliver real change for working people,” Bernie said. “Together in Congress, we will fight for the working class by standing up for M4A, GND, and a living wage.”

Nida was political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign and currently serves on the Durham County Commission. The first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in North Carolina, she voted to raise the minimum wage for county employees to a living wage.

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1042&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1043&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

BERNIE STANDS WITH WORKERS,
CALLS ON BIDEN TO ACT!

This weekend, Our Revolution joined Bernie and AOC as they hit the road to rally with workers fighting to unionize against some of the most powerful corporate forces on Earth.

On Sunday afternoon, Bernie addressed (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5454?t=1044&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) Amazon Labor Union ahead of their 2nd union election at the LDJ5 facility in Staten Island. By evening, he was speaking to a crowd at a concert (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5455?t=1045&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) for Starbucks Workers United in Richmond, Va.

On Tuesday, Bernie was live on the Senate floor (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5456?t=1046&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) calling out Amazon’s “illegal anti-union tactics” and calling on President Biden to issue an executive order prohibiting any company that engages in union-busting from getting federal government contracts, Reuters (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5457?t=1047&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) reports.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1048&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

“Amazon is the poster child for why this anti-union busting Executive Order is needed,” Bernie said. “President Biden, you promised to prevent union-busters like Amazon from receiving lucrative contracts from the federal government. Keep that promise.”

Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is — Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better future.

It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward. Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us. Become a movement builder today to help carry the torch. (http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1049&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1050&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.

LARRY COHEN ON THE LABOR FIGHT

Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen, a lifelong labor leader, joined our National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1053&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) on Monday to dig into the rise of worker organizing.

“This is an exciting time — not only at Amazon and Starbucks, but there’s all kinds of organizing at workplaces across the country. The first Apple retail store joined my union CWA,” Larry said. “This is organizing from the bottom up, and that’s what we believe in here at Our Revolution.”

Why now? Larry told Aaron White of Open Democracy (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5458?t=1054&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them.”

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1055&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

RO KHANNA TALKS POLICY FIGHTS

Also on our latest National Organizing Call (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=1056&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME) , Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen asked US Rep. Ro Khanna about legislation to end taxpayer subsidies to the fossil fuel industry.

“Greta Thunberg testified and said it would be a gut punch for Democrats to have both chambers and the presidency and not repeal fossil fuel subsidies,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.”

To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s Billionaires Tax, Ro said: “There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires, and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.”

Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “Folks don’t believe the promises anymore,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse — decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country.”

Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build Our Revolution and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.”

★ ★ ★

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=1057&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME

FIGHTING FOR HEALTHCARE IN NY

On Tuesday, Our Revolution joined Campaign for NY Health and other groups in Albany for a Day of Action calling on the state to pass the NY Health Act to provide universal healthcare to every New Yorker and end medical debt.

Organizers, activists, labor leaders, and legislators all came together to march, rally, and speak in one voice to demand New York electeds prioritize healthcare justice before they go on recess on June 2 to campaign for re-election.

Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar spoke to attendees at the rally: “Every New Yorker — and every person in America — deserves full healthcare and to be free from the burden of medical costs. Our lives are on the line.”

Become a member of Our Revolution to help us continue this fight in New York and across the country. Every step towards Medicare for All is a step toward healthcare justice. (http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1058&akid=2883%2E5885482%2E_a8fME)
