clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Nina vs. SuperPACS | New Endorsements! Amy Vilela - Brittany Ramos DeBarros - Summer Lee | Bernie Calls Out Biden | Ro Khanna | NY Health Act | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day — the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day. Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.” Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice. Become a member of Our Revolution, and receive your commemorative MAY DAY STICKER today! () ★ ★ ★ Join us this Tuesday at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot. We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! RSVP HERE () ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS Billionaires and oil barons are lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “Mainstream Democrats PAC” to try to stop progressives from taking power. Working-class fighters like Nina Turner, Rep. Andy Levin, David Segal, and Jessica Cisneros are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, we have their back, and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the true mainstream positions of the people in this country. The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races. Our candidates rely on the power of the movement — campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. Join our Phonebank Force () to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money. ★ ★ ★ The primaries are heating up, and we have some truly phenomenal candidates on the ballot – organizers, teachers, and diverse working-class fighters – stepping forward to lead with our movement. Become a Movement Builder today to help progressives seize the levers of power from corporate Dems. () ★ ★ ★ NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2 THE HOMESTRETCH Folks, this is not a drill — This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress! Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now! So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT! If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave. “The energy on the ground is palpable!” Nina told us. “Now is the time to maximize our efforts together.” This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 — and the billionaires know it. But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale!” As Katrina vanden Heuvel wrote in The Washington Post () , noting Our Revolution’s support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the soul of the party.” “Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated. “Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it — both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree. NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1, and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that. “The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All, and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.” Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district. “This work is paying off big time,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a more engaged voter base, and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!” Healthcare justice advocate Michael Lighty said, “Our Revolution walks the walk and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.” “They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing — we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country,” Nina said. This is a new day and a new district — which includes all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points, and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go! Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs, which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote. So far, 150 Our Revolution volunteers have made 60k phone calls and sent 40k texts and 330k emails connecting with voters for Nina. Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night! With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line. VOLUNTEER FOR NINA () ★ ★ ★ As one of our movement’s fiercest champions for Medicare for All, Our Revolution is honored to endorse Amy Vilela for Congress in Nevada’s 1st District. Amy served as Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat. “I am running to represent the working class,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table.” Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate — she knows the struggle firsthand. Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when tragedy struck in 2015. “The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise — or die trying. Electing true allies like Amy is how we change the composition of Congress and make democracy work. Now we need your help to win this crucial race for our movement. VOLUNTEER FOR AMY () ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution and Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network are backing Brittany Ramos DeBarros for Congress in NY-11! Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community. “I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible,” Brittany said on our National Organizing Call () on Monday. The Amazon Labor Union drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country.” Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story — though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship. “Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education.” Medicare for All and a Green New Deal are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said. In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.” If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. Click here to get started () ! “This race is a huge opportunity,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and we will make history.” We hope you’ll help Our Revolution ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. Your calls will make a huge impact in this district! SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER () ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Summer Lee for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District! Summer worked as a labor organizer with the Fight for $15, organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead voter mobilization efforts to strengthen our democracy. In 2018, she made history as the first Black woman from Western PA ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of Our Revolution. “Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office,” Summer said on our National Organizing Call () on Monday. “As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside — that’s a powerful movement right there,” she said. In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy. “The number one support for lazy incumbency is low voter turnout and voter suppression. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said. “We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape.” Rep. Lee has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution Pennsylvania. Help us elect progressive allies like Summer to make democracy work for all of us. ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters like Amy Vilela, Brittany Ramos DeBarros, Summer Lee, and of course Nina Turner! We must replace the enemies of progress in Congress with strong movement partners. Our Revolution Volunteer Taylor Pinckney told us how good it feels when our efforts pay off. While she was phone banking, a voter a voter mentioned that her call and a mailer from Our Revolution helped him switch from a centrist candidate to Erica Smith for Congress in NC-1. “He thanked us for opening his eyes that Erica was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor told us. “It was cool to see the impact — when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going.” If you have just one hour a week, you can make a difference, too! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! JOIN THE FORCE! () ★ ★ ★ BERNIE ENDORSES NIDA ALLAM Our Revolution is backing Nida Allam for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th district — and, now it’s official, Bernie is too! “Nida Allam knows that it takes a true grassroots movement to defeat big money special interests and deliver real change for working people,” Bernie said. “Together in Congress, we will fight for the working class by standing up for M4A, GND, and a living wage.” Nida was political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign and currently serves on the Durham County Commission. The first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in North Carolina, she voted to raise the minimum wage for county employees to a living wage. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ BERNIE STANDS WITH WORKERS, CALLS ON BIDEN TO ACT! This weekend, Our Revolution joined Bernie and AOC as they hit the road to rally with workers fighting to unionize against some of the most powerful corporate forces on Earth. On Sunday afternoon, Bernie addressed () Amazon Labor Union ahead of their 2nd union election at the LDJ5 facility in Staten Island. By evening, he was speaking to a crowd at a concert () for Starbucks Workers United in Richmond, Va. On Tuesday, Bernie was live on the Senate floor () calling out Amazon’s “illegal anti-union tactics” and calling on President Biden to issue an executive order prohibiting any company that engages in union-busting from getting federal government contracts, Reuters () reports. “Amazon is the poster child for why this anti-union busting Executive Order is needed,” Bernie said. “President Biden, you promised to prevent union-busters like Amazon from receiving lucrative contracts from the federal government. Keep that promise.” Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is — Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better future. It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward. Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us. Become a movement builder today to help carry the torch. () ★ ★ ★ Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day — the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day. Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.” Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice. Become a member of Our Revolution, and receive your commemorative MAY DAY STICKER today! () ★ ★ ★ LARRY COHEN ON THE LABOR FIGHT Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen, a lifelong labor leader, joined our National Organizing Call () on Monday to dig into the rise of worker organizing. “This is an exciting time — not only at Amazon and Starbucks, but there’s all kinds of organizing at workplaces across the country. The first Apple retail store joined my union CWA,” Larry said. “This is organizing from the bottom up, and that’s what we believe in here at Our Revolution.” Why now? Larry told Aaron White of Open Democracy () that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them.” ★ ★ ★ RO KHANNA TALKS POLICY FIGHTS Also on our latest National Organizing Call () , Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen asked US Rep. Ro Khanna about legislation to end taxpayer subsidies to the fossil fuel industry. “Greta Thunberg testified and said it would be a gut punch for Democrats to have both chambers and the presidency and not repeal fossil fuel subsidies,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.” To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s Billionaires Tax, Ro said: “There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires, and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.” Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “Folks don’t believe the promises anymore,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse — decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country.” Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build Our Revolution and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.” ★ ★ ★ FIGHTING FOR HEALTHCARE IN NY On Tuesday, Our Revolution joined Campaign for NY Health and other groups in Albany for a Day of Action calling on the state to pass the NY Health Act to provide universal healthcare to every New Yorker and end medical debt. Organizers, activists, labor leaders, and legislators all came together to march, rally, and speak in one voice to demand New York electeds prioritize healthcare justice before they go on recess on June 2 to campaign for re-election. Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar spoke to attendees at the rally: “Every New Yorker — and every person in America — deserves full healthcare and to be free from the burden of medical costs. Our lives are on the line.” Become a member of Our Revolution to help us continue this fight in New York and across the country. Every step towards Medicare for All is a step toward healthcare justice. () ★ ★ ★ 2022 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE KICKOFF! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack, and at $15, you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders, we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world, but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER () ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Mark your calendars for May 9th, when we’ll be joined by progressive powerhouse Rashida Tlaib on our next National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast — 8:30p ET/5:30p PT. RSVP TODAY () ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters and replace the corporate-aligned politicians up and down the ballot. If you have an hour or two a week, you can power our movement as a caller with the 2022 Phonebank Force () ! Our crew will be there to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! SIGN UP NOW! () ★ ★ ★ The Tar Heel State deserves a great progressive in Congress. State Sen. Erica Smith running in NC-1 fits the bill to a tee. Join Our Revolution’s Campaign Team and help us elect Erica! RSVP HERE () ★ ★ ★ Help us get Attica Scott to Congress! Join the Our Revolution Phonebank Force and help us make calls to Louisville and the rest of Kentucky’s 3rd congressional district to get another progressive in Congress! RSVP HERE () ★ ★ ★ On May 3rd, we’re holding a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot. We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! RSVP HERE () ★ ★ ★ Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month, you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack, and at $15, you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. | This seat is incredibly important. My seat is located in Reagan Country here in Orange County, California. This seat is a must-win in order to regain control of the House. Once we win this seat we will be on track to win back the White House in 2024 and then Start A New Conservative Movement here in California.
My opponent is Katie Porter and she is the leader of the Squad and the Radical Progressive Caucus. She is funded by all the special interests from every wing of the Democratic party.
This seat has always leaned right but Porter want to steal it and use it as a jumping off point to radically change our country.
Porter doesn't fear many Republicans but she knows I am a threat. I will take an America-First and common-sense conservative message to younger voters.
We will turn this state around!
We need to raise $50,000 for our big final push in this upcoming election. I will personally write a check matching every donation you give to my campaign.

I will personally write a check matching every donation you give to my campaign. | | | | == | Our next election is just one month away. Early voting begins in the next few days. I am personally writing to you to ask for your help as we big our final push for this next election. | | == | This seat is incredibly important. My seat is located in Reagan Country here in Orange County, California. This seat is a must-win in order to regain control of the House. Once we win this seat we will be on track to win back the White House in 2024 and then Start A New Conservative Movement here in California. My opponent is Katie Porter and she is the leader of the Squad and the Radical Progressive Caucus. She is funded by all the special interests from every wing of the Democratic party. This seat has always leaned right but Porter want to steal it and use it as a jumping off point to radically change our country. Porter doesn't fear many Republicans but she knows I am a threat. I will take an America-First and common-sense conservative message to younger voters. We will turn this state around! We need to raise $50,000 for our big final push in this upcoming election. I will personally write a check matching every donation you give to my campaign. From day one, Peter’s been saying that we need All Hands On Deck to defend our imperiled democracy.
And every day, it becomes more clear that protecting our freedoms and our democracy means holding and expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: Teachers Deserve Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RICHARD PAINTER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
| |

Dear Friend, This week was Teacher Appreciation Week. But what have we really done to appreciate teachers and the vitally important work they do? Nowhere near enough. My wife and I are teachers at a public university, so this is an issue close to our hearts. Here’s what I will ask Congress to do if I am fortunate enough to have voters elect me to represent Minnesota’s First Congressional District:
* Allocate federal funds for universal pre-K in every public school district in the United States.
* Allocate federal funds to supplement public school budgets in districts where property taxes are insufficient to adequately fund schools. Teachers and kids in rural areas or low-income urban areas should have just as much money per student as in wealthy suburban school districts. In addition, we must finally fully fund special education.
* Allocate federal funds to recruit teachers, substantially increase teacher pay and reduce classroom sizes.
* Fight efforts to privatize public schools or divert public school funds to private schools.
* Require big corporations and wealthy private universities to pay their fair share of property taxes as well as income taxes to help fund high quality Pre-K through 12 public education.
* Fight legislative efforts to take control of curriculum away from teachers, parents and local school boards or to require standardized testing.
* Support legislation to eliminate bullying and assure school safety, including sensible gun safety laws to protect students and teachers and let kids focus on learning and enjoying their childhood.

[I hope you can support our campaign today with a contribution. Every dollar makes a difference. Whether it’s $5, $25, $50, $100 or $250, it will take our campaign one step closer to victory. ](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=648411a61b&e=8914b14955) Thank you,
Richard

name: Amanda
subject: I'll go toe-to-toe with "the Squad" in English and Farsi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
My family didn't immigrate here to watch leftists destroy our nation. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=fe6cfbd6a23e425981fec739f9b21975&_e=KxZAHLX21CeQI6Esy9M0eON_BrQbkbbG5uSB150V0oJVrTby0PV8zlVldAoT2LpRDQ1a3uBP72dtNqWScwFo84S4qFa5DJ350erI1P7gwdNDX37VIirvquI9VdM9LiwH6umUfGvs6j-CjQIccuJIDTKTQVfxEPvfpHS74uZpplEBg8yZqZAIPSreiLtmTBfqt_F8WVvWm7xl35_UPW2pilSsRqHP9-XA5SpU1Xo5SEqkXNk80phpm5BMbsZe75eD7sDLUyj-mvAXDx6srXf_AXFXTpJE_tGAj7zxYSHBH58YKvI3lWUFrUtXcVrKQnLdEa5l_EhwXz0gZy8GaJFgYntIs8M55MQzt5jFpUDg0KrvSpp6dXrW-WmeNZe-Z-Xq5IUD9GfpeL5D44op0dIh9PDG0CjwLpU9y7p5MN9QSrOektozv2tj8tLaeXGL81Pw)
---
Peter -

My family and I fled Iran when I was an infant. We legally immigrated to the United States and fought hard to acheive the American Dream.

It pains me when I see members of _"The Squad"_ bash America, force their brand of Socialism on us, and call anyone who disagrees with them _"racists."_

As a Christian and a LEGAL immigrant, I know that American ideals are worth upholding, our economic system is worth protecting, and silencing your opposition is the first step in a slippery slope towards fascism.

[** STOP THE SQUAD** ](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=fe6cfbd6a23e425981fec739f9b21975&_e=KxZAHLX21CeQI6Esy9M0eON_BrQbkbbG5uSB150V0oJVrTby0PV8zlVldAoT2LpRDQ1a3uBP72dtNqWScwFo84S4qFa5DJ350erI1P7gwdNDX37VIirvquI9VdM9LiwH6umUfGvs6j-CjQIccuJIDTKTQVfxEPvfpHS74uZpplEBg8yZqZAIPSreiLtmTBfqt_F8WVvWm7xl35_UPW2pilSsRqHP9-XA5SpU1Xo5SEq0gVW_yk1IgkFpVZ2riBn0o0dhX4yDOj7oJV4RRXvsoj4qQa4NgMboaTCUgCF6G-uyjcQhYR2YKdYV15FMTWuhFa5GjkXnsKtT6CID5x6jv2DXkiWcg6--7ZnuPfwhy40DTgdLoiFxMbK19hmI9Ny4T7hlUvLaA19ruLN_7Rrm99RCw7Q2eWK5H0iSY6rr0fb4CCS8vIVlf91ZkvIwiE4K)
I will go toe-to-toe with the Squad when I'm elected. **I will combat their anti-American rhetoric with my own story about being a refugee and escaping a religious dictator’s regime. About how my mother worked two jobs while my father studied to become a surgeon, and how I worked hard and graduated from law school, then used my education to protect and defend our nation against foreign and domestic enemies.**

body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_t=1JffdK-BgJC720iki-kadMkE22jeEX99jQr4ueFak8giSheuXABuNuGDKl048QKLQSF_K1E4fDbOMIp7_o2_EQE8hahGassXsXWIB4votq6a3o6Umf3XMp_xxwnZ-rIWCtxtA8Lo5JAbd98HkxODSQqfzrt3ljVpmCfpFAE5ZEc%3D).

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZXyHqQS7TURZoHk8Z5ErFxI80hDDQupZqN9Aus7_kuyG7LO2IUYw39GxAyVCMV6kggF8rxE-n3M_bAAx_1ixIIX--5lYwPq5io8aiCoNw7c_QJW0i4rK18N_Tc7qGposa1_wT6_KBhP5steG1ppQCVQm36plnCbYiISK-GQyFW0gnT-QQ7NaubtEvPuxg_MuihOi-bJ2gbmhn8wn79JostM%3D)

Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZV44E2MdXuwwYMdwKvUOkv8-JR6dV16dJ8etUP2hGvQLGhPaZdMlWIMPjNo0ptYpWmWUbjC3WKMRzMx1Zimt0lM8fB-ZywSJqRblzEVG8lN0cRT6pWVmboyFiIWLyEvavYjzvgAp8WHzIMvVkb8WoxdXtO6TWQOyWdY289g_hWD8skxi29YUOQt72d44LYkY81b9sGiOnaOPKkKpHlJUD58%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZWQW-eA39AjZxNPxWhwtVqHSQ-zls6d2YffkfuSnGDH8zUmKR95OTwPv7qp6-V2turRYTHX344rIt8fvC1wI6-k_9R3TMphDQgKshDmEG2RWQMfFtourSyDKrH30xU8nQqMB0kxN0Ulj8FTmTygAMHr5L5_N4DsAqMqDTU1TG77YG_RncGvTybvliZdg-i87msPMI8GspZTAk2H1InQRL6o%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZazw-Hbrn7a3SCJ61G48xtDHVtb-_SXxro1-M15_43-jiw4YXGi52HE5vNBeuNuh8iVq5Mrn12vj48D2TI8ChLFcwvkK_6Z-VePwzfGaqYa9K46eZp61OvUPT4gOxhndKMVBDLY_Rviz5JDDqfEhyVfpyRtIGBeZ--1HdPC6yA06dDBFGPCslrJywE-UAgKU5h1xQVvBSp50tur7RKMSRhA%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** PLEASE SEND A DOLLAR OR TWO TODAY>>**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZX192zse81KmNBsoFVtH2HXqVzf-ingTnfESn6k9uPPxZmj73Cbpa5LtE3WCBYUEr5rSbPTIHlf5xpyl0JKghKf6VtmP7WGVl9z-OEL_mzcXsTETnnJegvXa-fWIF8IGUvwhRq4LsYdqVfhGjuSMMmiid4b0q3KNMYveASvVDlw3tCfH5K1m_yoJ5XrSBuYynrCcvlqhgDXpZoVXqgiCw6w%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZQOxvWsKEW45XGc3rbniY8rWbc-JxARjfBkIjeOBD4M5DZpZ3bPah94bzVc2TSVl2ko49FrAIOW5wGaaD7XHt5RXslgZsHm0vAisAMqSlwiCgOkLXAorf3Hn8rZnBOPgu3GU_JNW8fo5BjpgXdIRwfsjQigAs9SdX03KJ7_Ig0vi3yaTuSkT2WFQ6QJStkJP0W3uPFL-8YNoDIYoOh0zNoM%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZbAM6TUQoHrdNPQ292mn0Idu7n5CEkj1BeHA4y7fx8xkyn9aMVIhRZu1aJko085__m3bbXDcJMY4gPX9DHBww-Hr6ioZDPdWcsh1W15uFjuNPCoFBDOcer20DMSZWdZqRfmmiD0hxLP6ZQagN5z8-dXP55BJ2sTzm2Qn0oNER4CRwS66nIxPXt9pe_jjZ77DfxnwxPx-YqQaJmKdowa24q4%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** ASKING YOU TO TAKE A CHANCE ON ME
MAKE A GIFT TODAY >>**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZYxBwQABDHSC5fc2ERTGWCOjBDba7fxk5PaVFsQgcY1w1HcfldHo3tMT4H7sLw-sKqBSzGBNZf6j1PNmTIGtE592NxjdRPlrxRS01TZjonwuibpKVemD1uW_IXyEBZSIHZmr2fD-c1ldfgTWHrqzr02m1C7WkCvHfDqEKAjK1Ld301qHOslaUMmRONU7WXf07tmdBBjUrATPfe1A1BoxL60%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZfR0T8Ob2JL0HkpYpIpI226B2ga9NVyhrGV50VP-U-KyjkzkTkaMo1_w9b9BPBljIsWJmr5n0cGXqlKjAmcYjT753tsGDQXyIpMzZcNxR_rY28VoYjoCIf4g5cC-t7NYQ2ZvR9Z6RSG0dNIbuJQuXlPrTBb3RUhxGjuxq26VOqQ09lG53CT2DgAvfbu7urHNJV-xIW0fgh6ZA7Qh18Z20_o%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_e=3y2ZSK9uu8A_zoPP6gLbSBOLLar7lWccL_zYZBqbjDs079Ye54EJMSYVjtzu7lJ1pWDaCXiSAepTNfpOUlOHXugK66khuFFwUaKocDrQjRZSeChRxXPVUZyFiHkwbjz4h2daraBjMKI7qxr8FUJelTe7D5Ir4zEh9ggj--hL12zWrj4G9PaDnAASd69PPEDmfCQPBmtAgUtgYPhoYNtZhONoH189ci0tW7Az2Qa7Sfz6NULysgmopi5lS_RDOrTW_bRqv-ALCdX4zoOPeNrsZT70Osl6VBbocgpxYrd3qKzRYhjcjWqD4-G2SznDPHdFZBPZtuQYzAOhkV_MurwQO9o5zXOHK8n0sw7pgy4bW7OC-GP3BPMyY0ReuTA2Zp2sUSNi5xkTg_EjfenWOyC7HC480ebg0RWOtfNEdO-i6o1SB9Bhkch4nZMbzVp-hQDF8xVu8D2_CrDkUexIn186QHNXGiyYAZ0rpJWDCXtdsxY%3D)

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=26fd50e7e161486d8ab8ec793cb86500&_t=1JffdK-BgJC720iki-kadMkE22jeEX99jQr4ueFak8giSheuXABuNuGDKl048QKLQSF_K1E4fDbOMIp7_o2_EQE8hahGassXsXWIB4votq6a3o6Umf3XMp_xxwnZ-rIWCtxtA8Lo5JAbd98HkxODSQqfzrt3ljVpmCfpFAE5ZEc%3D).
clean_body: I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. For Country, Rod Dorilas | ABOUT ROD** Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

## **BREAKING: "McConnell Says National Abortion Ban Possible"**
| | [RUSH A DONATION NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45049088/344237155/-1829049351?refcode=mh-fr-20220507&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjAwNWY2Yy01MmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sRQzxE0FADavYlWgqkQir_jBa-Uu8044nl6hfNWcYkE=)

This is urgent —
**Mitch McConnell just said that if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned and Republicans take back the Senate, they could ban abortion nationwide.**
One of my Republican opponents voted just this week against codifying Roe. Another promised to "end abortion once and for all." The stakes have never been higher: if we’re going to protect the right to an abortion, we need to protect and expand our Senate majority.
Reproductive freedom is on the ballot in November, and I will never stop fighting to protect a woman’s fundamental right to make her own health care decisions. But I’m at the top of Mitch McConnell’s target list, and the GOP is doing everything they can to replace me with a far-right anti-choice Republican.
**[There’s too much on the line to stay on the sidelines. Please, can you rush an urgent donation to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45049089/344237156/-1829049351?refcode=mh-fr-20220507&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjAwNWY2Yy01MmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sRQzxE0FADavYlWgqkQir_jBa-Uu8044nl6hfNWcYkE=)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fcfa5f4619f04a0c93b7973e675c0b03&_e=x5Mhb7IdSuVkD9c7MTzjvsg4Z9iTylM5wY_ukM0UHigPnjtkYo2sVx9TyFgR9RcYBtYJbZUIPNKkpomuYla67_o_Kxth8533EeZO3cnD9ZoS_sNJLvgF6dNRj0QZmSOGDKQZDxv2SKpw3T_hzsjZ2b16QSVx5VnYr6ONaZ-nWR6Rw-3PjoSxeRgfi4QaFjq4tWOz_9cX1AxrzDdouiDArGDHb4fREQq17akMlurFnQzUpfSDUFSG0lGzKrs6dFBS6SKXndCI-Wf6A3YYgloLgVWr1u8FAkxM54y4GhDmW7ankNVx8LhExUDtW5nf0cTwfi2sFVbimmcgtaI84DxXzQ-E7PZ_WwzlswjGxCwP1xQloOgXyvAeiLmk3X0_M9fBkmTL-Ejuwm1itpwxeOI0A268Lb3BHqfNGr6cWKM0-OccXoMDJSebiA2QaRvE-He0)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fcfa5f4619f04a0c93b7973e675c0b03&_e=x5Mhb7IdSuVkD9c7MTzjvsg4Z9iTylM5wY_ukM0UHigPnjtkYo2sVx9TyFgR9RcYBtYJbZUIPNKkpomuYla67_o_Kxth8533EeZO3cnD9ZoS_sNJLvgF6dNRj0QZmSOGDKQZDxv2SKpw3T_hzsjZ2b16QSVx5VnYr6ONaZ-nWR6Rw-3PjoSxeRgfi4QaFjq4tWOz_9cX1AxrzDdouiDArGDHb4fREQq17akMlurFnQwearkgDtna_dlsoTOCO2I5ZfF_wubSPg-A0-tHnec23S50ewOhqzhVG4SfMEeRvQwo0K2sKi77Z9AkPwSFio2TnWpF9a4Rj2Wn3_IHCzY10rsfn__yBe8nbjycPpUkaWmYZOZqr22Pbx9XmV15iA-bs58coTNczRGKxg5Xin526Xh02G0ltqfEQtjW62xx3--UK2xEqrthSluXdMBxTGEy) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fcfa5f4619f04a0c93b7973e675c0b03&_e=x5Mhb7IdSuVkD9c7MTzjvsg4Z9iTylM5wY_ukM0UHigPnjtkYo2sVx9TyFgR9RcYBtYJbZUIPNKkpomuYla67_o_Kxth8533EeZO3cnD9ZoS_sNJLvgF6dNRj0QZmSOGDKQZDxv2SKpw3T_hzsjZ2b16QSVx5VnYr6ONaZ-nWR6Rw-3PjoSxeRgfi4QaFjq4tWOz_9cX1AxrzDdouiDArGDHb4fREQq17akMlurFnQyy5WuM-Gl37XB46xJ11w-7mnx3l4F4XX_QofE45VtZ3vaKxwWzDNp7pJSnFE_SYd-1NxFx9c1IvzaUs2xRuXdZXXE9WB9kJ7pS5vEGDxbkmNjC8M8IRheJNgsQUemTgSf6aj1djTAJoSNZp15YZmEubS3jTpQZRqCxmSSh0VPObHcV_Sa1kP2uB2VDZDepF40Xqtlh6wwb2Jei4ZcG62dj) Regards,

clean_body: | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Candace Owens
subject: Roe v. Wade is dead, but the fight for life is just beginning. Here’s how we win >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60334366:6l-E2WoNU:m:1:3253819041:1CE64EF980E775591B77277DD43B63D3:r)
---
| Peter,
This week, a leak showed the _Supreme Court is ready to overturn Roe v. Wade_...ending one of the greatest injustices in American history.
_No one_ understands the horrors of abortion more than the Black Americans...with **_more than 20 million Black babies killed_** through abortion since 1973.
But BLEXIT recognizes that ending _Roe v. Wade is NOT_ the end of our fight to protect life.
**We need to rebuild a culture of courage, personal responsibility, and respect for life in our communities.**
BLEXIT is doing tough work in our communities every day...and showcasing the _tremendous power_ of traditional American values:
* We believe that Black Americans have **unlimited potential to achieve the American Dream.**

* We know that our **nation 's values empower every one of us**, regardless of race.

* Unlike Black Lives Matter, **we fight to protect ALL Black lives..._including_ our unborn children.**

Black Americans are waking up. **[But BLEXIT's efforts to rebuild, reshape, and reclaim Black America can only be as successful as your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60334366:6l-E2WoNU:m:1:3253819041:1CE64EF980E775591B77277DD43B63D3:r)**
**[Pitch in $15 or more to help BLEXIT continue to lead this fight>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60334367:6l-E2WoNU:m:1:3253819041:1CE64EF980E775591B77277DD43B63D3:r)** | | | | [DONATE $15](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60334367:6l-E2WoNU:m:1:3253819041:1CE64EF980E775591B77277DD43B63D3:r)

Thanks,

Candace Owens
Founder and Co-CEO, BLEXIT Foundation

name: AbbyFinkenauer.com
subject: Abby is about to step on the debate stage ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
Abby is about to step on stage and speak to why we can and _must_ defeat extremist Sen. Chuck Grassley
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45049218/344237850/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1024-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTg2N2RmNS01NWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po61dbg85VOyzUIJF3xA1o3CLTVZs_w-69YlpZwOeO8=)
Peter,

The first debate of our campaign is moments away, and Abby is about to step on stage and speak to why we can and _must_ defeat extremist Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa. **[If you believe in this campaign and want to flip this seat blue, will you chip in a donation of $5 or more right now to help Abby win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45049219/344237851/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1024-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTg2N2RmNS01NWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po61dbg85VOyzUIJF3xA1o3CLTVZs_w-69YlpZwOeO8=)**
After 47 years in Washington, Sen. Chuck Grassley has _changed_ – and now, Iowans want a change too. They’re ready to retire him, once and for all.

During his nearly half a century in Congress, **he's decided to align himself with the growing extremism of his party.** He's voted against legislation that would empower unions and working families. He's fought year after year to overturn reproductive rights and is on the cusp of seeing it happen. He's cozied up to Big Pharma and voted against lowering prescription drug costs.
It's no wonder only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect Chuck Grassley – and Abby is Democrats' best hope of defeating him. She was the youngest woman to flip a battleground House seat from red to blue, and with your help, we'll flip this Senate seat blue and virtually guarantee that Democrats hold on to Senate control!
In this crucial moment for our campaign – at a time where Senate Republicans have $44 million for cash in the bank to attack us with – we need this grassroots team to fight alongside Abby. **Please, before she takes the debate stage, will you show Abby how much you support her by helping us raise $15,000 – every penny of it from grassroots Democrats like you – so we have the resources to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley?**

clean_body: Abby is about to step on stage and speak to why we can and must defeat extremist Sen. Chuck Grassley | | | = Peter, The first debate of our campaign is moments away, and Abby is about to step on stage and speak to why we can and must defeat extremist Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa. = After 47 years in Washington, Sen. Chuck Grassley has changed – and now, Iowans want a change too. They’re ready to retire him, once and for all. During his nearly half a century in Congress, he's decided to align himself with the growing extremism of his party. He's voted against legislation that would empower unions and working families. He's fought year after year to overturn reproductive rights and is on the cusp of seeing it happen. He's cozied up to Big Pharma and voted against lowering prescription drug costs. It's no wonder only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect Chuck Grassley – and Abby is Democrats' best hope of defeating him. She was the youngest woman to flip a battleground House seat from red to blue, and with your help, we'll flip this Senate seat blue and virtually guarantee that Democrats hold on to Senate control! In this crucial moment for our campaign – at a time where Senate Republicans have $44 million for cash in the bank to attack us with – we need this grassroots team to fight alongside Abby. Please, before she takes the debate stage, will you show Abby how much you support her by helping us raise $15,000 – every penny of it from grassroots Democrats like you – so we have the resources to defeat Sen. subject: Time To Make NM History Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
United Conservatives can accomplish amazing things! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/721b0ba904eb/mask-mandates-7112369?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=2564d360a2&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I had the wonderful opportunity of speaking at the Gubernatorial Candidate Forum hosted by _The Four Corners Federated Republican Women_ recently, and I told them about what spurred me to delve into the world of politics. **

I shared that I didn’t feel a lot of love growing up. So I thought I’d go into politics where there’s just so much love whenever you enter the room!

_Jokes aside_ , when I decided to get involved in politics, and decided to run for Sandoval County Commissioner, I was told,

_“Jay, you can’t do it. Nobody knows you. It’s a Democrat county. No Republicans ever won before and you can’t do it.” _

Well I dug in my heels, said I’m doing it anyways and will succeed!

**I knocked on 3,000 doors. I won that race in 2016, and turned Sandoval County Republican for the first time in history.**

I discussed this at the Gubernatorial Candidate Forum and you can watch it [here](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=2e6b544ed6&e=102b599530):
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=8e8a8bf68f&e=102b599530)
---
| **It’s time to make history for New Mexico again!**
_When we have the right leaders in place, we can achieve amazing results_. In Sandoval County, we took over as Conservatives and we pushed forward with economic development. That reduced unemployment by one third before the pandemic. We also reduced crime with a Democrat sheriff in all categories in 2021.

Nobody else in the race has this record. I want to take this model of excellence in Sandoval County and take it to Santa Fe, because New Mexico is an island of poverty in the Southwest, and we have to defeat this tyrannical governor!

**As a New Mexico First Governor** , I will fight for your families, finances, and freedoms. Your support of my campaign **with a donation of any amount** will show incompetent politicians that New Mexicans are digging in their heels and refusing to bow down to the Radical Left agenda any longer!
---
| [>>> DONATE NOW <<<](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=45786fc4ab&e=102b599530 ">>> DONATE NOW <<<")
---
| [DONATE ANY AMOUNT »](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=f7934cb636&e=102b599530 "DONATE ANY AMOUNT »")
---
| On _**June 7th**_ , I hope to earn your vote so we can make New Mexico history together! **Thank you.**
---
| | Yours In Liberty,
**_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret), USAF

[](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=eaecd577cd&e=102b599530)

This June 7th deadline will be our campaign’s biggest challenge to date, so I’m respectfully asking if I can count on you to step up today and help us out. That’s why we’re emailing you today — it’s critical that we secure the funds needed to put up a good showing on June 7th... which is coming up fast. name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: (bump) I will not hesitate to be the 51st vote to eliminate the filibuster and codify Roe into law.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Abortion is a constitutional right.
#

We wanted to make sure you saw Cheri’s response to the draft SCOTUS opinion that would overturn _Roe v. Wade._ Cheri will not hesitate to cast the decisive vote to protect our rights, but first, she needs our help to win this race!
[**Make a donation today to flip North Carolina and defend our rights.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=1&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=2&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
As a former judge and Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court, I want to be absolutely clear: abortion is a constitutional right that cannot be rolled back.
But reporting indicates that a politicized, right-wing majority of the Supreme Court intends to overturn Roe in full.
That is shameful, terrifying and unconstitutional. It is a direct attack on our freedom that demands urgent action.
The Senate’s failure to eliminate the filibuster and codify _Roe v. Wade_ to protect our rights is unacceptable. And we cannot back down. With our rights at stake, we must elect Senators who will expand our majority and protect our rights – and North Carolina is the best opportunity to do that.
[**If you are ready to protect our rights and codify Roe, please make a donation to our campaign today to help flip North Carolina’s Senate seat. A 50/50 Senate is not cutting it, and allowing Republicans to retake control will be even worse.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=3&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=22&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=23&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=24&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=25&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=26&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220507-2-t1&refcode2=838.357359.XuUmle&t=27&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle)**
---
****
I promise you this: I will not hesitate to be that 51st vote to eliminate the filibuster and codify Roe into federal law. Reproductive freedom is a constitutional right. It is health care. It is economic freedom. It is justice.
Thank you for standing with us in the fight.
\- Cheri Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=28&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=838_357359_XuUmle&akid=838%2E357359%2EXuUmle) today to help us make history.

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: We're building a powerful movement, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio
| | |
---
Friend, I’m asking you for $5 .
Here’s why: Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and, according to The Miami Times, I’m rapidly closing the gap.
I know $5 doesn't sound like much, but that's how we've built the momentum to make our race competitive. When thousands of people like you join our team with even $5 , we build a powerful and unstoppable movement.

But the GOP dark-money machine is determined to destroy our momentum and defeat me at any cost, so I’m leaning on this grassroots team again to help flip Florida blue.
**I've set a goal to raise another $20,000 before MIDNIGHT, but we’re still $2,592 short. And at this point in the election, when Rubio and the GOP are launching another round of vicious, nasty attack ads to defeat me, we need all the help we can get.**
In the time that it’s taken you to get to this point in the email, seven people have already donated $5 to join our team, but I’m counting on you to chip in too, friend.

clean_body: Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio | | | Friend, I’m asking you for $5 . Here’s why: Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and, according to The Miami Times, I’m rapidly closing the gap. I know $5 doesn't sound like much, but that's how we've built the momentum to make our race competitive. When thousands of people like you join our team with even $5 , we build a powerful and unstoppable movement. But the GOP dark-money machine is determined to destroy our momentum and defeat me at any cost, so I’m leaning on this grassroots team again to help flip Florida blue. I've set a goal to raise another $20,000 before MIDNIGHT, but we’re still $2,592 short. And at this point in the election, when Rubio and the GOP are launching another round of vicious, nasty attack ads to defeat me, we need all the help we can get. In the time that it’s taken you to get to this point in the email, seven people have already donated $5 to join our team, but I’m counting on you to chip in too, friend. = Please, don’t wait another moment. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. Hey I want you to be the first to see our new TV ad where I share my abortion story.

TV ads are expensive and with a flurry of attack ads funded by Super PACs flooding over $2 million dollars against me, it's crucial to get ahead of the game.

I’m here to share my abortion story and make it clear that we won’t go back. No one will fight harder than me for our right to choose in Congress.

But we need to ramp up our ad spending because Super PACs aren’t wasting a second and neither can we, with Election Day only 10 DAYS AWAY. We've launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that McConnell should never be in power again, _but we’re still missing 67 responses from Pennsylvania._ **Please, respond before midnight:**

| | | Friend, **__**Maggie Hassan must’ve gotten wind of the recent Granite State Poll that shows Chuck Morse _AHEAD_ of her in a head-to-head matchup... **She’s just issued a direct attack against Chuck to try to slow the momentum!** Now that Hassan and her D.C. allies have put our mission directly in their crosshairs, we need to be able to respond. Don’t let the Democrat mega-donors drown out our message or stop New Hampshire values from winning at the ballot box this year!

| | | What was this Ivy League lawyer’s line of attack? Trying to knock Chuck for his Pro-Life record and for working in the State Senate to pass a common-sense ban of _late-term and partial birth abortions_ \- **_a policy that the vast majority of Granite Staters support._** It wouldn’t be the first time that Hassan has shown she’s out-of-touch with New Hampshire, though... She’s stuck by the national Democrat agenda when it meant record inflation and illegal immigration - and she’s not stopping now that it means _blind support for unlimited, on-demand, taxpayer-funded abortion._ **The writing is on the wall - Hollywood Hassan is too extreme for New Hampshire.** Can Chuck and the team count on a contribution so we can fend off her attacks and stop her at the ballot box?

name: JohnFetterman.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Only 10 days left — can you help us win by making a $10 donation?
#
**$10. 🙏**
That’s what we’re asking for today. It might not seem like much. But when thousands of people are all chipping in **$10** at the same time, it adds up.
Derek, there are only **10** days left until Election Day in Pennsylvania. We can win this election + flip PA blue, but _only_ if we hit our goals in these final **10** days.
Here’s what your **$10** will do for Team Fetterman:
* Help us reach hundreds of thousands (!!!) of Pennsylvania Democrats via advertising + mail + organizing to ensure folks vote by mail or in person
* Counter the $50 million spent by Republicans with positive messaging about what John Fetterman will do for PA in the Senate
* Get us ready to take on Dr. Oz or Dave McCormick in the general election

[**Please — with only 10 days left — can you donate just $10 (or more) to help us reach our key fundraising goals? All these $10 donations add up big time. That’s how we win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220507-1?refcode=em20220507-5708&refcode2=5708_434096_9EL7-F&akid=5708%2E434096%2E9EL7-F)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220507-1?refcode=em20220507-5708&refcode2=5708_434096_9EL7-F&akid=5708%2E434096%2E9EL7-F)**
The Republicans will spend endless sums to hold Pennsylvania as a red state. Our pathway to victory = running a giant grassroots campaign that can raise serious money, organize an army of volunteers, and reach every PA voter in all 67 counties.
**_Your $10 makes it all possible._**
Thanks for everything,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220507-5708-footer&t=1&refcode2=5708_434096_9EL7-F&akid=5708%2E434096%2E9EL7-F)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=5708%2E434096%2E9EL7-F)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5708%2E434096%2E9EL7-F)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: And the racial attacks continue…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The simple truth is that the people attacking me know I pose a threat to the Democrat Party’s hold over Black voters. |
---

Fellow American,

**I'm sad to be writing to you - _yet again_ - about racist attacks against our campaign for U.S. Senate. **

First, a liberal commentator began his barrage of attacks against me by writing in _The Nation_ :

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."**_
---

Then he went on MSNBC to say:

_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**_
---

Now, _The Washington Post_ has published new attacks from other detractors:

_**"Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart."**_
---

and

_**"[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such."**_
---

**[The fact of the matter is this: the racist attacks are not going to stop anytime soon.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=aca2f0f34c724f71a77a0bf2ed5f8426&_e=YNI_Es4odVMvy8SrEu54B50HlyqV-k7bb6qYcj62NFrt03ZMJQWQkUDiFCdAl9ZyUCLzyurp1K2IEi2DF-2BfAhO_szQQJizAxW1QMN0cUv5edVTxKuPT7qfojPFYJ4q7cNGCp3Lqb5YuGlzaj6nYW5272FjfnysRzwxpGiD_BFuD3zqK_GPA9ysraRv07EdA9IsrWmh4NVqbwnSEBUiOOJPaaiQe8bBIs8B8MEfHmRELYIDnVzrO3qAQL_rAV5t93uNB4N0bm6cgzM_kbRuhqHNRbKIuEo6P_Zq4tgGtNy0jAWLVZ4nmuYGXKsWW-9S601Ruz4PwEvtBtWDAQbMde0dT5nZ1BocOmRer1NC6wLd1w1jaLBTg4aHYV0udc8KXPEIEWplwv7td0zEChRvPDJNElx8GPP_Q3xrSmqCwNkVxHPnEXFZ2O0gRjyFZU6vLy0liix-YPGMdHAvn2iZXO7fffoinvKsjsvJ_DJX5qwSoJdjLV56IIloRAXbgz7A)** We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election.

If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, **[would you chip in $4, $10 or maybe even $25 right now to help our campaign set the record straight?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=aca2f0f34c724f71a77a0bf2ed5f8426&_e=YNI_Es4odVMvy8SrEu54B50HlyqV-k7bb6qYcj62NFrt03ZMJQWQkUDiFCdAl9ZyUCLzyurp1K2IEi2DF-2BfAhO_szQQJizAxW1QMN0cUv5edVTxKuPT7qfojPFYJ4q7cNGCp3Lqb5YuGlzaj6nYW5272FjfnysRzwxpGiD_BFuD3zqK_GPA9ysraRv07EdA9IsrWmh4NVqbwnSEBUiOOJPaaiQe8bBIs8B8MEfHmRELYIDnVzrO3qAQL_rAV5t93uNB4N0bm6cgzM_kbRuhqHNRbKIuEo6P_Zq4tgGtNyv-4ODOtU20s4CeVuFBpQq3gUAbb3Mijl46TswCYemjpWASZvkJUsNPI8Rx2xopDs9BtZ-U7C-fapTst33gamJ1eNSnzCTDmaRl4vwlyTQ-VF1coGnLwVYScJqG8suR6MDk4nwgKPzyflEG9eK5m-DWopxKNNr1vorNoBvrJY_KxZkcIXXZGLA3N90sdkB0Vay4GaHQsVhIUO2G295Eajh)**

President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black."

**I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage.**

_**Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values.**_

The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared.

**[Please help our campaign fight back against these racist attacks by chipping in whatever you can right now.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=aca2f0f34c724f71a77a0bf2ed5f8426&_e=YNI_Es4odVMvy8SrEu54B50HlyqV-k7bb6qYcj62NFrt03ZMJQWQkUDiFCdAl9ZyUCLzyurp1K2IEi2DF-2BfAhO_szQQJizAxW1QMN0cUv5edVTxKuPT7qfojPFYJ4q7cNGCp3Lqb5YuGlzaj6nYW5272FjfnysRzwxpGiD_BFuD3zqK_GPA9ysraRv07EdA9IsrWmh4NVqbwnSEBUiOOJPaaiQe8bBIs8B8MEfHmRELYIDnVzrO3qAQL_rAV5t93uNB4N0bm6cgzM_kbRuhqHNRbKIuEo6P_Zq4tgGtNyu9Oh5kilL0MJIUillBZpl05CdfwJqSAq9LBzotnhwIiK7wSPjJgJEkiQJ8IVSUPjYBleIlvV2tvHppl5E_9ZNs10qI4sVy5i1QaCBoOVzidqUohF-kQTz60S3xzHKi0RBYZIvADgttRvjQt2knQ7t6ZjIgz7mYueiIF8UDmDHvCTLBHMQJx6cQ2OqZGFZ9CztEU6l6ufAEbYo0VcpAzUK)**

clean_body: The simple truth is that the people attacking me know I pose a threat to the Democrat Party’s hold over Black voters. | Fellow American, I'm sad to be writing to you - yet again - about racist attacks against our campaign for U.S. Senate. First, a liberal commentator began his barrage of attacks against me by writing in The Nation : | "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." Then he went on MSNBC to say: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." Now, The Washington Post has published new attacks from other detractors: "Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart." and "[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such." We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election. If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black." I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage. Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values. The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared. Thank you for helping us defeat these lies and win this critical Senate race. Respectfully, Herschel Walker PROUD AMERICAN | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
