Peter Willis, as we work desperately to keep the House this November, not only is Senator Joe Manchin blocking the Democrats’ agenda, _but he's making ads trying to help Republicans flip the House._
**That’s right, a Democrat who blames progressives for hurting the Democratic Party’s chances at the polls is directly telling voters to back a member of the opposing party.**
**[Help elect better Democrats by supporting our people-powered campaign to give NY-03 a bold, progressive leader in Congress >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv00kRJk_6YxeLoADDXAZsoPLvjckvbxefqpSugg7xQ-6y9UsvauTN0cjyFTa1X14sBJ4XkxxCZHbMk0kNFnBOmzEMQ7YoW8OKah5PVuCa8ppGz5Mn-5Q1GnqvzTZTDAYQF6X0oRBJWod4asL23EaylQUN1fT4DXQ7XtY-0R7wnS2rypEbUklmtAlq4p4IIV8FYeNiOxoi2EpGBb-dlAAMcLAFDtI8DUFdWqp_a_ZMaeH00RJkxg-S3h_njNeBzWQwirI4kxjYA-GTSHMgM-mmAM82wi5o4Dt3puIXSJeeotOrLyJcMkJiWqs81xbLH_mRzMGFRgxFiE59fkuv4K__42gWUiehoxL1VXUVDB0ros5g/3lu/Y3ymi5l5R1SNO3qutb_X0w/h1/CurptKO2D8PONSkr39NNgNEferRAYOyEGKjc71PYQQs)**
Not only is Manchin doing ads in support of Republicans, but he’s still refusing to abolish the filibuster in order to save abortion rights. _With “friends” like these it’s no wonder voters often sit out the midterms, cast their ballots for the GOP, and don’t trust Democrats to get things done._
Now is the time to vote in real progressive changemakers and kick the establishment, corporate Democrats to the curb. We need more representatives who will speak truth to power and fight unapologetically for a better future for all of us.
That’s why I’m running for Congress, and why I hope to have your support. I will fight for the bold, common-sense agenda that most voters actually back: **Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, ending corruption in government, and a tax system where everyone pays their fair share.**
Unlike the majority of Congress that has blocked progress in order to uphold the harmful status quo, I’m not funded by the corporations lobbying against the best interests of our communities. My campaign is entirely people-funded.
**[Will you make a donation today to help secure my victory in the primary and move our progressive movement forward?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv00kRJk_6YxeLoADDXAZsoPwLx_mJ41ljBYmwzb2ocz6pHtD5fQaNCCZ3ObdwpOImZNJirfu1l73VwO9sRBS1lOAkdl7qzbcTx2Ymen8TU0ExydKHJvXSvUzRL1wRy163nwFXBC3nVw_C1Vx8hrrVgQ-YHxcvRqlDd13XxYL8K6XQG1sfenoBn3TZqruamXt1vgK4MYcmfxsDg6reCM2bRQktwASzYRUMyBG0AJSUvs_Uqb9l4cqHq5tbg0laPCT7ha9P-8K8XX_ed4bYscKLgX-nzmQfxldtVh4H_rKMC57xik_Dbh9T2JP1sRCVO4mpT9ccsvf6UGPOuLHUEy8QQGk9o9H1ij8Qin0q6clrxZnA/3lu/Y3ymi5l5R1SNO3qutb_X0w/h2/iLVfRh0YZxj-uV6kP6czgpivzHhpaW0YcLD5cKHYNf0)**

subject: De Gregorio Slams Gottheimer Meddling in CD5 Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liberal Special Interests_
body:
Press Release | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=31104c58a7&u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=ed98b23223)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**CONTACT** : PRESS@NICKFORNJ.COM
---
| |
# ** ****De Gregorio Slams Gottheimer
Meddling in CD5 Primary**
_Calls on Pallotta to Disavow Mailer Promoting Him
Paid for by Liberal Special Interests_
---
| **FAIR LAWN** – Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran - who served in Iraq and Afghanistan - and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, issued the following statement in response to a new [mail piece](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=4e2ec4e9b5&e=31104c58a7) sent to Republican primary voters - and paid for by Josh Gottheimer - that favorably featured his Republican primary opponent Frank Pallotta. To be clear: former President Donald Trump has not endorsed Frank Pallotta, _but Josh Gottheimer now has_. The piece was sent following a media-sponsored debate where De Gregorio was the only CD5 primary candidate to appear, bringing [further scrutiny](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=cf7ce44013&e=31104c58a7) to the Pallotta campaign.

“It is clear who Josh Gottheimer wants to win this Republican primary - and it’s not the guy who served his country in four tours overseas and is now calling on him and others to sell off their stock portfolios to clean up Washington,” said De Gregorio.

He continued, “For years, Democrats like Josh Gottheimer talked ad nauseam about Russian interference in our elections. Now Josh, who consistently presents himself as a bipartisan, common sense Democrat who’s above the fray, is using liberal special interest money to wage his own Putin-style disinformation campaign to confuse Republican primary voters about who the true conservative leader in this race is. It’s dead wrong — and **if Josh is the statesman he claims to be, he will immediately stop any spending in the CD5 Republican primary. I also call on my opponent, Frank Pallotta, to immediately disavow Gottheimer’s attempt to put his thumb on the scale in this race**.”

De Gregorio concluded, “Josh is running scared with good reason. He knows that the cost of food and gas, along with the Biden Administration’s abject failure to secure the border and support our cops is indefensible here. **But here’s a message for you, Josh, man-to-man: I will never stop fighting for the future of this country against gutless cowards like you.** ”
---
| | | | | | | [](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=4fa96da088&e=31104c58a7)

It’s time for American green energy | | | Hi there, [**As the weather warms up, the West Coast is bracing for wildfire season. I am the only candidate in this race who wants to end the fossil fuel industry and bring the entire energy industry into public ownership. Can you chip in now to support my plan for American green energy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45050394/344252655/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBjMzk1Ni02NmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_LgQb3ZjP0mz_Ew4BUAkaX3-lf7NS0ub0tSJnhi_Qo=) Last summer, an intense heatwave in the Pacific Northwest killed over 1,000 people and cooked over 1 billion sea animals to death. clean_body: It’s time for American green energy | | | Hi there, = Last summer, an intense heatwave in the Pacific Northwest killed over 1,000 people and cooked over 1 billion sea animals to death. Temperatures were over 110 degrees. Hotels with air conditioning started price gouging — while poor people sweated it out. We are facing global climate catastrophe, but the federal government continues to subsidize fossil fuel companies and approve drilling permits. Instead, we should be transitioning rapidly to 100% renewable energy and bringing the energy industry into public ownership so it serves the people, not the profits of the wealthy few. That will never happen as long as we have Chevron-funded Democrats like my opponent in office. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Women are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

| | [Team, we are shocked.

A draft majority opinion from the U.S Supreme Court was released by _POLITICO_ , and **THE SUPREME COURT APPEARS TO BE ON TRACK TO OVERRULE _ROE v. WADE._

We’ll keep it short, team. This is a disaster for health care and abortion access around the country. People will die because of this ruling and we, as Democrats, HAVE to do everything in our power to stop this. I’m doing everything I can to support our veterans.

Hi Peter, this is a longer email about our veterans. Sadly, I know some people will just delete this email without reading it or look the other way, but I hope you're not one of them. This is very important.

U.S. military veterans have sacrificed so much to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests around the world. That’s why I believe our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve.

**And as the chairman for the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am hard at work to make sure our government lives up to that duty.

But sadly, our committee has found a serious, unique threat to veterans: Veterans are being targeted by violent, right-wing extremist groups for recruitment.**

We’ve also found that on Jan. 6, more than 10% of the insurrectionists had ties to the military. Veteran Ashli Babbitt was even shot dead by police while attempting to break into the House chamber.

Right-wing recruitment of veterans is a serious problem that would not only affect veterans but could further political violence in our country. So, I’m working day after day to protect veterans from this threat while also addressing other concerns that affect our veterans like ensuring access to critical benefits and health care.

**But troublingly, Republican lawmakers on the Veterans’ Committee have attempted to obstruct our work and attacked me personally for addressing these subjects.**

[**Peter, in a tough midterm year, Republicans will be targeting me for pushing strong progressive policies and protecting vulnerable Americans like our veterans. In order to fight back, my campaign has set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the month. Can I count on you to chip in $3 to support my campaign and my work in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45050515/344265621/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220507_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc4ODU0ZS02Y2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTQUPVH_0bj2W_SqsOB1Z73k-kJEJIL-pm2WSGJhz00=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45050522/344265628/653852622?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20220507_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc4ODU0ZS02Y2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTQUPVH_0bj2W_SqsOB1Z73k-kJEJIL-pm2WSGJhz00=)

body:
This week, our team made a tough call to launch a six-figure, statewide TV ad buy blasting Ron Johnson and the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedom. **This week, our team took a big risk to launch a six-figure, statewide TV ad buy blasting Ron Johnson and the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedom.**

The money wasn’t in the budget, but with Ron Johnson running his own ads and Mitch McConnell's super PAC reserving $15 million on TV to prop him up even more, we needed to get Sarah's message on the airwaves to fight back — especially now.

Placing another ad buy like this was a major investment, and it meant we would be creating a significant gap in our budget. So if we want as many Wisconsin voters as possible to see it, then we need your help to stay up on the air.

**[Our race will be the tipping point for Senate control, and the stakes have never been higher. We cannot allow Ron Johnson and the GOP to dominate the airwaves if we want to flip this seat blue, so please chip in what you can to keep our ad running:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45048608/344234216/43152360?refcode=em22_220507_ad_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220507_ad_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRlNmMxYy00Y2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79vMVXE38LWyQNNMi_IxBHv1Gd9Lu_k9vvFBeCHJjRs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45048609/344234217/43152360?refcode=em22_220507_ad_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220507_ad_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRlNmMxYy00Y2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79vMVXE38LWyQNNMi_IxBHv1Gd9Lu_k9vvFBeCHJjRs=)

As the only woman in this race, Sarah Godlewski has been loud, clear, and unwavering about her commitment to protecting abortion rights. She will never sit by and allow our reproductive freedom to be taken away.

This latest ad campaign will help us share why Sarah is the person Wisconsinites can trust to fight for them in the U.S. Senate, but defeating Ron Johnson won't be easy.

Republicans have already raised more than $200 million to take back the Senate majority, so we need your help to quickly close the gap in our budget, keep our ad on the air, and help Sarah flip this seat blue.

**[Please rush a contribution of any amount to help us compete with Ron Johnson and the Republicans on the airwaves. Sarah’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money in this race, which means we’re counting on you now more than ever. Thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45048615/344234223/43152360?refcode=em22_220507_ad_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220507_ad_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRlNmMxYy00Y2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79vMVXE38LWyQNNMi_IxBHv1Gd9Lu_k9vvFBeCHJjRs=)**

The vast majority of our donations come from online messages like this one. This incredible grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and that’s how we know we’ve got what it takes to win this seat.

Thanks for everything you do,

— Team Sarah
Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I will fight like hell to defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10789?t=6&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3) Friend,

Earlier this week, we learned the U.S. Supreme Court intends to deliver what my opponent, Republican Sen. Chuck Grassley, has been working toward for four decades: stripping women of our reproductive rights.

The seriousness of this moment cannot be overstated. Representation matters, and I'm resolved to fight like hell to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Democratic majority and - when I get to the U.S. Senate - vote to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. [**_If you 're with me, will you split a donation between Voter Protection Project and my campaign right now? Whatever you give will help us flip Iowa's Senate seat blue and virtually guarantee Democratic Senate control._**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10789?t=7&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Abby Finkenauer and VPP will go through immediately: | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10790?t=8&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
---
Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ has been a lifelong wish for Sen. Chuck Grassley. During his first term, he supported a constitutional amendment to overturn the landmark precedent protecting the right to choose, and he has voted multiple times to defund Planned Parenthood.

Worse still, he was instrumental in blocking President Obama's Supreme Court appointment of Merrick Garland, and conspiring with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump to install the far-right justices who are now voting to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. **Sen. Chuck Grassley bears direct responsibility for the end of federal abortion protections - and we have to hold him accountable.**

We will hold him accountable by defeating him at the ballot box. We will hold him accountable by electing a 33-year-old woman to his seat - a woman who has ALWAYS fought for the right to choose. We'll hold him accountable by blocking his extremist party from a majority, and we'll deliver on federal legislative protections for the right to choose.

This is why representation matters, and we can beat this guy! Only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and he's facing record-low approval. [_Please, I need you with me. Split a donation between Voter Protection Project and my campaign right now to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley, expand our Democratic majority and protect the right to choose._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10789?t=9&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Abby Finkenauer and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10790?t=10&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10791?t=11&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10792?t=12&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10793?t=13&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10794?t=14&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
Thank you. In moments like this, your support means everything to me.

- Abby
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=2176%2E878179%2EIWD-C3)

## Meet & Greet May 19th Torrance
---
|
---
**May 19th Derrick will be hosting a Meet & Greet in Torrance with several other exciting speakers. You will have plenty of time to have some food and ask questions. Make sure to bring a couple of friends. If you don't have friends you can make some at the event. The event page is [CLICK FOR EVENT PAGE](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=49547.319.1.4aaa9d95bed1341403e2341246ee9716) if you would like to use that to invite your social media friends.
7pm at the Pyramid Office building 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance, CA 90505**
|
---
# A LOT OF EXCITING THINGS
As you most likely _**_ know the campaign is heating up. Some days I'm in four to five meetings. Last night we had our first large candidate forum and the temperature of the room was that I came out on top.
The fight is not easy and it is impossible without you. Maybe names like George Soros & Klaus Schwab ring a bell. These are Multi Billionaires that heavily fund my opponents. I have only raised $15,000 and my opponents have raised millions. Even though we have done amazing with our hard work I'm concerned that it won't be enough if we don't pick up the pace.
I'm facing a crucial deadline, and I must raise an additional $10,000 to purchase my final primary materials and signs.
Can I count on you to chip in a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or $1,000 before the deadline?
[www.officialderrickgates.com](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=49547.320.1.ca6c90ad71ee76901d4e12a9307d49be)
The Washington swamp and those like George Soros and other leftist activists want to take me out and help me defend our country.
Once in congress, this Lion is going to tear the Rhinos to pieces and hold Washington accountable for its crimes.
We can't let the left succeed and that is why I'm fighting so hard and refuse to give up on California and the Nation.
So please chip in your most generous contribution today.
You have many chances to meet me every week, shake my hand, take a picture and ask questions. Please visit my events page on the website.
[www.officialderrickgates.com](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/416378?id=49547.321.1.f99acd52b2f637f3eacb89f7beec03df)
## CRA ENDORSEMENT

|

**I also won the California Republican Assembly endorsement this week. It is an honor to be endorsed by the group that Ronald Reagan referred to as the conscience of the Republican Party.**

Donald Trump and this rest of his MAGA Republicans are _drooling_ over Ron DeSantis’ draconian and hateful “Don’t Say Gay” bill.

Instead, I’ll make an example out of you by signing onto this letter and joining a grassroots movement of _FURIOUS_ Democrats.

I know that together, we can END your far-right career and PROVE to other Republican Governors that attacking LGBTQ Americans has grave consequences.

body:

Hi, Peter – it's Deb and Jerry, Abby's parents. **We just watched our daughter step off the debate stage – and we couldn't be prouder.**
We don't have the words to describe what it feels like to watch your daughter run for U.S. Senate – particularly against Chuck Grassley, who has been our senator since before our daughter was even born and has turned his back on working families like ours. As Abby took the debate stage tonight with a strong vision and conviction, we saw clear as day that our daughter is the right person to represent our community and state in the Senate. We know we’re a little biased – but if you were tuned in, we think you’d agree.
Tonight, we saw exactly why Abby is leading in this primary by 49 points. She is the best candidate to take on Sen. Grassley, and no one is going to work harder than she will to flip this seat blue.
After Abby's incredible performance on the debate stage tonight, she's one step closer to defeating Sen. Grassley. **But she still has a long path ahead of her, and she'll need major grassroots support behind her to compete with the Republicans' war chest of $44 million.**

name: Team Beto
subject: Take a look at today’s rally for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We have one choice to protect reproductive freedom in Texas: defeat Greg Abbott.
#
More than 5,000 people from all over Texas joined Beto earlier today in Houston for a rally for reproductive rights:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220507-2?refcode=ema20220507-188344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=188344_444211_JedGoa&akid=188344%2E444211%2EJedGoa)
**We have one choice if we want to protect reproductive freedom in Texas: defeat Greg Abbott.**
[**If you believe that we must fight back to protect every person’s freedom to control their own body, health care, and future, then please contribute $3 right now to help Beto defeat Greg Abbott.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220507-2?refcode=ema20220507-188344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=188344_444211_JedGoa&akid=188344%2E444211%2EJedGoa)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220507-2?refcode=ema20220507-188344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=188344_444211_JedGoa&akid=188344%2E444211%2EJedGoa)**
Greg Abbott only cares about scoring political points, not protecting or serving the people of Texas.
That’s not where the people of Texas stand. When we listen to our fellow Texans — Republicans, Democrats, and Independents alike — they stand with us in this moment. Four out of five Texas voters oppose banning abortion without exception.
**But we must be clear-eyed. Our fellow Texans are under attack unlike any other moment in our lifetime.** And in order to defeat Abbott and elect Beto, we need your help.
[**Please, pitch in $3 to help us reach voters all across Texas. In order to protect reproductive freedom in Texas, we have to get really serious about political power. We have to win. There is no other option.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220507-2?refcode=ema20220507-188344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=188344_444211_JedGoa&akid=188344%2E444211%2EJedGoa)
When we all come together and when we organize, we can take on the mega-corporate donors who are backing Abbott’s extremist campaign. We have that power, but we need you with us.
Thank you for your support,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220507-188344-footer&t=23&refcode2=188344_444211_JedGoa&akid=188344%2E444211%2EJedGoa)**

name: Izzi Levy
subject: Hillbilly Elegy is $7.85
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3650%2E3611125%2E1auLnU ][IMG]

Folks,

JD Vance’s garbage book, Hillbilly Elegy, costs $7.85.

You can buy a copy to use as a coaster (or a doorstop, or a chew toy for
your dog), OR you can donate $7.85 to our campaign to flip Ohio blue and
expand the Senate majority.

While JD Vance pretends to be your average Ohioan, he couldn’t be more out
of touch. After years of working in Silicon Valley boardrooms, Vance’s
qualifications for the Senate include the backing of a $15 million super
PAC from billionaire Trump lackey Peter Thiel, and a record of bashing the
working class and even blaming them for their economic struggles.
